sid: Kaote Sanyo Heeshshote Mootichi ledo xaada

ktb: Kiristoosiin Fau Daqqunne Abba Xaha Ikkoga

The outpouring of the Holy Spirit
The gifts of the Holy Spirit
The fruit of the Spirit and the works of the flesh

kqy-latin: Axi Ayaana Geeshuna kaxhe aafe gishaara achona e kaxhe aafe gishaara

kqy-ethiopic: ዎንቶ ዘወሥት ብድዜቶ ግሸ / ብድዜቶወከ ዬሴ ሱስ ግሻረ ሸሁትያከ ዬሴ መዸ ግሻረ
hdy: Amma’nnaa’n Wixxixxi Mi’n Mateeyyoo’m Bikkina (Mateeyyoomanne Yoo Maassi Bikkinaa Annannaatoominne Waaroo Hawwi Bikkinaa)

hdy: Qooccaanchii Qooccanchii (Qooccanchina Hasisoo Abooyyato Issimmi Bikkina)

amh: በሥራ ተግቶ ሀብት ማፍራት፣ ለቤተ ክርስቲያንና ለሌሎች መትረፍ
gaz: Hojiitti Dammaqanii Qabeenyaa Horachuu, Waldaa Kristaanaa fi Namoota Biroofis Bu'aa Ta'uu
kqy-latin: Oseydi hanti degessi Wonto zawaseni maaqqe fedase shati inge gisha
kqy-ethiopic: ኦሴይድ ሀንት ዴጌስ ዎንቶ ዘወሴን ማቄ ፌደሴ ሸት እንጌ ግሸ

sid: Loosunni jawaante jiro afi'ra Beetekiristaanetenna woleho ikke gata

gaz: Du'aa Ka'uu fi Jireenya Bara Baraa
kqy-latin: Haybowafa denxo gishaara koolo makkina yeso gishaara
kqy-ethiopic: ሀይቦወፈ ዴንሦ ግሻረ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሶ ግሻረ
ktb: Rehoochchi Keina Doollii Horiinka / gu'mmiinka Heaa Heechchatannee

gaz: Yesus Ulfina Isaa Bartoota Isaatti Mul'ise

ktb: Woggee Dooranchi Aaggi Bari / Abbiseenno Ayyaana

kqy-latin: Kristosay suxi mixi gara e haydho gisha
kqy-ethiopic: ክርስቶሰይ ሱሥ ምሥ ገረ ኤ ሀይዾ ግሸ

eng: Salvation through Christ and grace alone / Righteousness through faith alone / The Bible as the basis of faith alone
amh: መዳን በክርስቶስና በጸጋ ብቻ / ጽድቅ በእምነት ብቻ / የእምነት መሠረት መጽሐፍ ቅዱስ ብቻ ነው
gaz: Fayyinni Ayyaana Waaqayyoo qofaan, qajeelummaan amantii qofaan, hundeen amantii Macaafa Qulqulluu qofaa dha
kqy-latin: Maaroy Kristosanaara Wontoy axuse keenge e maxo modhtenaarawoko. Gizetey aadexonawoko. Aadexose e kaachoy Hayla Fissharowoko.
kqy-ethiopic: ማሮይ ክርስቶሰናረ ዎንቶይ አሡሴ ኬንጌ ኤ መሦ ሞዽቴናረዎኮ። ግዜቴይ ኣዴሦነዎኮ። ኣዴሦሴ ኤ ካቾይ ሀይለ ፍሸሮዎኮ።
hdy: Gatimmi xale’i Kiristoos anceetinnette; Muccuroom xale’i amma’nnatinnette, amma’nnaxxi shooho’i xale’i Keesammi Maxaafannette
ktb: Fau Kiristoosiinii Magani Aassanchiinii Xalliin Ikkoga
sid: Gato Kiristoosinnina elitotenni calla / keeraanchimma ammanate calla / Ammanate xinti Qullaawu Maxaafi callunni

amh: የመካነ ኢየሱስ የልጆች እና የወጣቶች የበጎ ፈቃድ ቀን

eng: Week of the EECMY ministry, partner churches and mission organizations
amh: ለኢ.ወ.ቤ.ክ.መ.ኢ. አገልግሎትና ለተባባሪ አብያተ ክርስቲያናት እንዲሁም ሚስዮናውያን ድርጅቶች ጸሎት የሚደረግበት ሳምንት

eng: This verse is not available in English.
Discussion questions for daily Bible reading and study
amh: ዕለታዊ የመጽሐፍ ቅዱስ ንባብና ጥናት የሚያገለግሉ የውይይት ጥያቄዎች
gaz: Gaaffiwwan marii Macaafa qulqulluu dubbisuu fi qo'achuuf guyya guyyaatti gargaaran
kqy-latin: Hayla Pissharuwaafa wontase zeerususesaara qordi beyesaara marese naqutta oychita
kqy-ethiopic: ሀይለ ፕሸሩዋፈ ዎንተሴ ዜሩሱሴሳረ ቆርድ ቤዬሳረ መሬሴ ነቁተ ኦይችተ

eng: What does the Bible passage of the day talk about?$How does the passage relate to the topic of the week's sermon?$What does the passage command us to do or forbid us to do? What does it teach us in general?
amh: የዕለቱ የመጽሐፍ ቅዱስ ክፍል ስለምን ይናገራል?$ክፍሉ ከሳምንቱ ስብከት ርዕስ ጋር ምን ግንኙነት አለው?$ክፍሉ ምን እንድናደርግ ያዘናል ወይም እንዳናደርግ ይከለክለናል፥ በአጠቃላይ ምን ያስተምረናል?
gaz: Kutaan Macaafa quluqulluu hra’aa wa’ee maalit dubbata?$Dubbis ha'raa mata duree lalaba torban kanaa wajjiin walitti dhufeenya akkamii qaba?$Dubbisi ha’raa maal akka goonu nu ajaja fi akka maal hin goone nu dhorka? Walumaa galatti, maal nu barsiisa?
kqy-latin: Ha wontase Hayla Pissharuwaafa gadutese godoy aba gishaw e zeere?$Ha godoy samintiya ohute kato denxora aba muhoni e keenge?$Ha godoy am nu hantorosa e woosse? Am nu hantuwanke e ooxe? Be uddina aban e eruse?
kqy-ethiopic: ሀ ዎንተሴ ሀይለ ፕሸሩዋፈ ገዱቴሴ ጎዶይ አበ ግሸው ኤ ዜሬ?$ሀ ጎዶይ ሰምንትየ ኦሁቴ ከቶ ዴንሦረ አበ ሙሆን ኤ ኬንጌ?$ሀ ጎዶይ አም ኑ ሀንቶሮሰ ኤ ዎሴ? አም ኑ ሀንቱወንኬ ኤ ኦሤ? ቤ ኡድነ አበን ኤ ኤሩሴ?

eng: Lord Jesus Christ! Come into the midst of your church and cleanse our hearts with your power. By your mercy free us from all the corruption of sin, so that we may receive you, our true King, with joy. Father, Son, Holy Spirit, one God who lives forever, hear our prayers. Amen.
amh: ጌታ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሆይ፤ አንተን እውነተኛውን ንጉሣችንን በደስታ እንቀበልህ ዘንድ ወደ ቤተ ክርስቲያንህ መካከል ገብተህ ልባችንን በኃይልህ አንጻ፣ በቸርነትህም ከኃጢአት ርኲሰት ሁሉ አንጻን፤ አብ፣ ወልድ፣ መንፈስ ቅዱስ ለዘላለም የምትኖር አንድ አምላክ ጸሎታችንን ስማን። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Yesus Kristos Gooftaa, Si Mootii keenya Isa dhugaa gammachuudhaan akka simannuuf Waldaa Kristaanaa Kee keessa seentee, garaa keenya humna Keetiin qulleessi, arjummaa Keetiinis xuraa'ummaa cubbuu hundumaattii nu qulleessi, Maqaa Abbaatti, kan Ilmaatti, kan Hafuura Qulqulluutti, bara baraan kan jiraattu Waaqayyo tokkoon, kadhannaa keenya nuuf dhaga'i. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Laaxi Yesuus Kristosa! Aadewo nu kaate maaqe nemba maggana nu mokkoronike ha zawaaka yoodi ne osana nu muxhuro geeshuwa.$Jhergaxe ne maaqe gisha numba tunussese cubbowafa haylonxuwa. Ade! Yele! Ayaana Geesho! Koolo makkina yese bidzi Wonto! Odde nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ! ኣዴዎ ኑ ካቴ ማቄ ኔምበ መገነ ኑ ሞኮሮንኬ ሀ ዘዋከ ዮድ ኔ ኦሰነ ኑ ሙጹሮ ጌሹወ።$ዤርገሤ ኔ ማቄ ግሸ ኑምበ ቱኑሴሴ ጩቦወፈ ሀይሎንሡወ። አዴ! ዬሌ! አያነ ጌሾ! ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ብድዝ ዎንቶ! ኦዴ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoosa, keese hanqo’i ni adila liiranchinne aa’nnoommisina ki amma’nnaa’n beyyo ki mine aaggaa ni wodano ki malaayyinne muccusse; ki biijoominnem baaxii’l haashaaranchi hundiinsi muccusse. At Anni Waa’i, Beet Waa’i, Keesammi Ayyaan Waa’i, heer heerina hee’lloo matem Waa’i; ni uunxato macceese. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Qarichcho Yesuusi Kiristoosa! Gare womanne ikkoonti kees bajigoon aaqqinunta amma'nnaanni maabarikki mereeru aaggi wozananne Xummaancho Ayyaani maqeen muccurs. Biizimaantakkin baaxiiliichchinne horiichchin / gu'mmiichchin muccursituntanne Anni su'mmiin, Beeti su'mmiin, Xummaancho Ayyaani su'mmiin doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaanti Mexxu Maganu uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Mooticha Yesuusa Kiristoosa, Ate halaalaancho Mootenke hagiirrunni adhinammohera Beetekiristaanekki mereero e'e wodananke wolqakkinni keereensi. Shaqqillikkinnino cubbinke batte baalatenni keereensinke. Annunni, Beettunni, Qullaawu Ayyaani hegerera hee'rattohu Mittu Magani huuccattonke macciishshi. Hamii'ni.

eng: Lord God, let us wait with thanksgiving for the coming of your Son, the Lord Jesus Christ. Awaken our hearts to prepare the way for him, and serve him with free will and a clear conscience. We ask you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns with you and the Holy Spirit, one God now and forever. Amen.
amh: ጌታ እግዚአብሔር ሆይ፣ የልጅህን የጌታ የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን መምጣት በምስጋና እንድንጠባበቅ፤ መንገዱን እንጠርግለት ዘንድ፣ በሙሉ ፈቃድና በንጹህ ሕሊና እናገለግለው ዘንድ ልባችንን ቀስቅስ። ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋር ለዘላለም በሚነግሥ በተወደደው ልጅህ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa, dhufaatii Ilma Kee Yesus Kristos Gooftichaa, galataan akka eeggannu, karaa Isaas akka tolchinuufiif, fedha guutuu fi yaada qullaa'aadhaan akka Isaaf hojjennuuf garaa keenya dammaqsi. Maqaa Ilma Kee Isa jaallatamaa, Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristos Isa Siif Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin jiraatee, bara baraa hamma bara baraatti mo'uutiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxe maaqe Wonto! Ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa yowe nemba galatisine nu kaforonike e oge nu fitoronike bidzi muxhuronaara geeshi maxonaara esa marisine nu kaforonike numba denxuwa. Neerani maaqqe Ayaana Geeshaara wolko koolo makki aallo kaate eehutte ne yele Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሤ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ዮዌ ኔምበ ገለትስኔ ኑ ከፎሮንኬ ኤ ኦጌ ኑ ፍቶሮንኬ ብድዝ ሙጹሮናረ ጌሽ መሦናረ ኤሰ መርስኔ ኑ ከፎሮንኬ ኑምበ ዴንሡወ። ኔረን ማቄ አያነ ጌሻረ ዎልኮ ኮሎ መክ ኣሎ ካቴ ኤሁቴ ኔ ዬሌ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Waa’a, ki Beet ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoosika waaro galaxxinummuuyyi egelloommisaa ixxi googom axinsoommisaa wo’m iittinnee muccur tiirinnee ixxena awwaandoommisina ni wodano fooqaa’e. Kiinninnee Keesammi Ayyaaninnee heer heerinam adil ihoo iittamaakkoo ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne keese uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Qarichcho Magano! Beetoank Qarichcho Yesuusi Kiristoosi waalu naoot galatiin aaqqinota uuccinaanke. Woqqaasin qixxansinuntaa gare wozaniin wiimaanne sawwittiin isii soqqammuntaa wozananne qixxansi. Kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniinii mexxu ikki doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka wommoo'mmano iittitaanti beetoanki Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Mooticha Magano, Beettikki Mootichu Yesuusi Kiristoosi daa galatunni agadhinammora doogosi fiineemmo gede wo'ma fajjonninna co'ichu tii'inni soqqammeemmosi gede wodananke baqqi assi. Atenna Qullaawu Ayyaani ledo hegerera moohannohunni baxaminohu Beettikki Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord our God, help us as we wait in faith for the coming of your Son Jesus Christ to this earth. Visit us your children and help us prepare our hearts for him. Strengthen us in grace by your Holy Spirit so that we will be truly ready for the coming of Jesus Christ our Lord. Amen.
amh: ጌታ እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ የአዳኛችንና የጌታችን የአንድያ ልጅህ የኢየሱስ ክርሰቶስ ወደዚህች ምድር መምጣት በእምነት ከምንጠብቅበት ወቅት ስላደረስኸን እናመሰግንሃለን። በዚህ ሰዓት እኛን ልጆችህን እንድትጎበኘንና ለእርሱ የልባችንን መንገድ እንድናስተካክል ታደርገን ዘንድ እንለምንሃለን። ለኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ መምጣት የልባችንን በር እንደሚገባ እንድናዘጋጅ ኃይልና ጽኑ እምነት ሆነህ በመንፈስ ቅዱስና በጸጋህ እንድታቆመን እንማጸንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, ayyaana gara biyya lafaa kanaa dhufuu Fayyisaa keenyaa fi Gooftaa keenya Isa tokkicha Ilma Kee Yesus Kristos yeroo itti amantiidhaan eeggannun waan nu geesseef Si galateeffanna. Yeroo kana nuyi ijoollee Kee akka nu ilaaltuu fi daandii garaa keenya akka Isaaf sirreessinu akka nu gargartuuf Si kadhanna. Dhufaatii Yesus Kristosiif balbala garaa keenyaa akka ta'utti akka qopheessinuuf humnaa fi jabina nuuf taatee Hafuura Qulqulluu fi ayyaana Keetiin amantiitti akka nu dhaabduuf Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxe maaqe Wonto! Nu dhaliyaara nu Laaxaara maaqe bidzi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa ha saha gara e yoonesa aadexona nu kaforo wogga nuuse ne indo gisha nemba galatako nu galate. Hatte ha woggaa numba ne nayshe yoodi ne beyoronikiyaara nu muxhuro esuse nu do’oronikiyaara numba ne mahorosako nemba nu shi’e.$Yesuusi Kristosa yowese nu muxhuro suma dodhi e worgusenike nu naquttoronike nuuse osaara miimo aadexowaara inguwa. Ne Ayaananaara axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhetenaara numba ne essoronikeko nemba nu shi’e. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሤ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኑ ዸልያረ ኑ ላሣረ ማቄ ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሀ ሰሀ ገረ ኤ ዮኔሰ ኣዴሦነ ኑ ከፎሮ ዎገ ኑሴ ኔ እንዶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ። ሀቴ ሀ ዎጋ ኑምበ ኔ ነይሼ ዮድ ኔ ቤዮሮንክያረ ኑ ሙጹሮ ኤሱሴ ኑ ዶኦሮንክያረ ኑምበ ኔ መሆሮሰኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ዮዌሴ ኑ ሙጹሮ ሱመ ዶዽ ኤ ዎርጉሴንኬ ኑ ነቁቶሮንኬ ኑሴ ኦሳረ ሚሞ ኣዴሦዋረ እንጉወ። ኔ አያነናረ አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼቴናረ ኑምበ ኔ ኤሶሮንኬኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Waa’a, neese gatisaanchi ni Moollanni matem ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoos ka uulla waarimma amma’nnatinne egelloommi ammanenne afissitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Ka ammanenne neese ki ooso moo’lloo’isinaa ixxena ni woda’n googo gudinsoommisinaa hara’mmitoo’isina keese uunxinoommo. Yesuus Kiristoos waarimmina ni woda’n gooca laboo’isinne gudinsoommisina niina malaayyee qoxxaalli amma’nnatoo ikkaa Keesammi Ayyaaninnee ki qishixxatinnee neese uullissoo’isina uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nii Qarichcho Magano! Faisaanchunnee Qarichchunnee ikko mexxukki beetu Yesuusu Kiristoosu tanni uulla aleen ilammoga qaageenno sanna amma'nnatiin inki qoraphphinaammi jeechchuta iillissoontinnehannii galaxxinaanke. Ta jeechchuta nees oosukki xuudduntanneenii Qarichcho Yesuusi waalitannee wozananne qixxansituntannenii uuccinaanke. Ammoo Yesuusi Kiristoosi waalitannee wozananne hasisanogiin qixxansinunta maqoohaa qaara amma'nnatuhaa aassit Xummaancho Ayyaani abba aassanchiintakki qaarsit uurrissuntanne uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Mooticha Kaaliiqa Maganonke, gatisaanchinkeenna Mootichinke Mitticho Beettokki Yesuusa Kiristoosa tenne gobba daannota ammanatenni agadhineemmo yanna iillishoottonkehura galaxxineemmohe. Tenne saatenni ninke oosokki towatattonkeranna Isira wondaninke doogo seekki'neemmo gede assatonkera huucci'neemmohe. Yesuusi Kiristoosi daara wodaninke waalcho hasiisanno garinni qixxeessinammora wolqanna jawaattino ammana ikkite Qullaawu Ayyaaninninna eltokkinni uurrisattonkera huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Holy God our Father, we thank you for the joy you give us by the coming of your Son into this world. Help us by your Holy Spirit, for the sake of your holy name and your glory, to receive him with joy as our only Savior. Amen.
amh: ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር አባታችን ሆይ፣ በልጅህ ወደዚህች ዓለም መምጣት እኛ እንድንደሰት ስለአበቃኸን እናመሰግንሃለን። አሁንም ደግሞ ኢየሱስ መድኃኒታችን ነህ ብለን በደስታ እንድንቀበልህ እንደዚሁም ዳግመኛ በኋለኛው ቀን ስትመጣ ያለፍርሃት እንድንሆን በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ እርዳን፣ ስለ ቅዱስ ስምህና ስለ ክብርህም ብለህ። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Qulqulluu Abbaa keenyaa, gara biyya lafaa kana dhufuu Ilma Keetti gammaduudhaan waan nu geesseef Si galateeffanna. Ammas immoo Yesus Ati Fayyisaa keenya Siin jennee, gammachuudhaan akka Si simannu, akkasuma immoo guyyaa booddee sanatti lammaffaa yommuu Ati dhuftu sodaa malee akka taanuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu gargaari, isa qulqulluu Maqaa Keetii fi ulfina Keetiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nuuse ade maaqe hayla Wonto! Ne yeley ha saha gara yoosune nu maggoronike numba ne elusso gisha nemba galatako nu galate.$Hatteni Yesuusa neni nu dhaleko hidi maggana nemba nu mokkoronikiyaara lakkunxo yekke ne yoosune jhashe baaka neera nu muhoronikiyara ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba maruwa.$Hayla ne sunxi gishaara ne kuxa gishaara nemba nu shi’esa  siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑሴ አዴ ማቄ ሀይለ ዎንቶ! ኔ ዬሌይ ሀ ሰሀ ገረ ዮሱኔ ኑ መጎሮንኬ ኑምበ ኔ ኤሉሶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ሀቴን ዬሱሰ ኔን ኑ ዸሌኮ ህድ መገነ ኔምበ ኑ ሞኮሮንክያረ ለኩንሦ ዬኬ ኔ ዮሱኔ ዠሼ ባከ ኔረ ኑ ሙሆሮንክየረ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሀይለ ኔ ሱንሥ ግሻረ ኔ ኩሠ ግሻረ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ  ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Keesammi Niyyanni Waa’a, ki Beet ka uulla waarimminne neese liirammoommisa issitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Kabadem ihukkaare ni Qaraar Yesuusatte yinaa liiranchinne keese aa’nnoommisaa lasaanchi ballanne odim daba’llitaa waattoo ammane baddinoombee’isaa ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne hara’mme. «Ki keesammi summi bikkinaa ki lombi bikkinaa yitaa ni uunxato macceese» yinaa uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Xummaancho nii anna Magano! Beetukki Yesuusi Kiristoosu ta uulla ali waalliyan naoot bajiqqamunta assitoontihannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Teesuu naoot Yesuusa «At nesaa zabboanne» yin bajigoon aaqqinunta kaa'llinne. Hittigunta zakkaanchoon fanqalti waaltaanti bari saalu yoobai keenu inkunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llinne. Uusatunne xummaancho su'mmikkitannee yit maccoocci. Amii'nni.
sid: Qullaawa Magano Annanke, Beettikki tenne alame daasinni ninke hagiidhineemmo gede assoottonke daafira galaxxineemmohe. Xaano qolle Yesuusa Ati Xagichonkeeti yine hagiirrunni adhinammohera hattono layinkimeeshsho gedensiidi barra daatto woyite ayyaanikkinni kaa'linke. Qullaawu su'mikkiranna ayirrinyikkira yite macciishinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, we thank you for sending your only Son Jesus Christ for our salvation and blessing. He is the light of your glory, the visible image of the invisible God. Help us by the power of the Holy Spirit to open our hearts to Him so that we may be cleansed of all sin and live with Him in heaven. Hear us in the name of your Son, Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል ጌታችን አምላካችን ሆይ፣ ለደኅንነታችንና ለብፅዕናችን አንዱን ልጅህን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን ስለላክህልን እናመሰግንሃለን። እርሱ የክብርህ ብርሃን፣ የአካልህም ምሳሌ ነው። እኛም ልባችንን ለእርሱ ከፍተን ከኃጢአታችን ሁሉ ነጽተን ከእርሱ ጋር በሰማይ እንድንኖር በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይል እርዳን። ስለ አንዱ ልጅህ ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ብለህ ስማን። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, fayyina keenyaa fi qajeelina keenyaaf tokkicha Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiin waan nuuf ergiteef Si galateeffanna. Inni ifa ulfina Keetii fi fakkeenya qaama Keetii ti. Nuyis garaa keenya Isaaf bannee, cubbuu keenya hundumaattiis qulloofnee, Isaa wajjin waaqa irra akka jiraannuuf humna Hafuura Qulqulluutiin nu gargaari. Maqaa tokkicha Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiif jettee nuuf dhaga'i. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e nu Laaxe maaqe Wonto! Numba loolusesaara numba haylonxesaara bidzi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa nuuse ne anso gisha nemba galatako nu galate.$Esi beese kuxuttese fo’e ne maaqenike ne oonunte beysesako. Nu muxhuro esuse dodhi nu cubbowafa geejhi esaara wolko afaa nu yesoronike ne Ayaana Geeshi osana numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi bidzi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኑ ላሤ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኑምበ ሎሉሴሳረ ኑምበ ሀይሎንሤሳረ ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ኑሴ ኔ አንሶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ኤስ ቤሴ ኩሡቴሴ ፎኤ ኔ ማቄንኬ ኔ ኦኑንቴ ቤይሴሰኮ። ኑ ሙጹሮ ኤሱሴ ዶዽ ኑ ጩቦወፈ ጌዥ ኤሳረ ዎልኮ አፋ ኑ ዬሶሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo ni Moollanni Waa’a, ni gatimminaa ni muccuroominaa yitaa ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoosa niina asse’llitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Ixxi ki lombina caakkaa ki qooccinam kobi’llishshaa. Neese ixxena ni wodano fooqaa’nnaa neese banxummi baaxiil hundiinsi muccullaa ixxenne maqirem iimanenne hee’nnoommisina Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne hara’mme. Ki mexxo’i Beet Yesuus Kiristoos summi bikkina yitaa ni uunxato macceese. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti nii Qarichcho Magano! Nees faisiihaa muccursiihaa mexxukki beetu Yesuusi Kiristoosa sokkoontinnehannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Is kii abbinni xuudisanoa caakka. Ammoo is kii mahoomata agudiishsha. Naoont wozananne isii fanni baaxiiliichchinne horiichchin / gu'mmiichchin muccunni isiin bargammi samee wommoomaan he'nnunta Xummaancho Ayyaani maqeen kaa'llituntanne mexxoanki beeto Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmii uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu Mooticha Maganonke, keeraanchimmankera maassamankera mitto Beettokki Yesuusa Kiristoosa soottonke daafira galaxxineemmohe. Isi ayirrinyikki xawaabbati, bisikki lawishshaati. Ninkeno wodananke Isira fanne cubbinke baalunni keeraa'mine Isi ledo gordoho hee'nammora Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqanni kaa'linke. Mittichu Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Holy God our Father, our Lord Jesus Christ humbled himself, taking on our human nature, and also showed us your power. Grant to us your children that we may live in peace without fear. Hear us in the name of your beloved Son, Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
amh: ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር አባታችን ሆይ፣ ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ተዋርዶ እንደ እኛ በመሆኑ የአንተ ኃይል ተገለጸልን፣ ስለዚህ በርሱ እኛ ልጆችህ በሰላም ያለ ፍርሃት እንኖር ዘንድ እንለምንሃለን፤ ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋር ለዘላለም በሚነግሥና በሚኖር በተወደደው ልጅህ በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ስትል ስማን። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo qulqulluu Abbaa keenyaa, Gooftaan keenya Yesus Kristos gadi of deebisee, akka keenya ta'uu Isaatiin, humni Kee nutti mul'ateera. Kanaaf karaa Isaa nuyi ijoolleen Kee sodaa malee nagaatti akka jiraannuuf Si kadhanna. Tokkicha Ilma Kee Yesus Kristos Isa Sii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin bara baraan jiraatuu fi mo'uutiif jettee nuuf dhaga'i. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nuuse ade maaqe hayla Wonto! Nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosay bemba ulla hissi eerdi hade nuunke e maaddhosuna ne osay nuuse addeydo.$Ye e gisha nuni ne nayshi esuna modhetena jhashe baaka nu yesoronikeko nemba nu shi’e. Neerani maaqqe Ayaana Geeshaara wolko koolo makki aallo kaatesaara yesesaara maaqe ne eehe ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑሴ አዴ ማቄ ሀይለ ዎንቶ! ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰይ ቤምበ ኡለ ህስ ኤርድ ሀዴ ኑንኬ ኤ ማዾሱነ ኔ ኦሰይ ኑሴ አዴይዶ።$ዬ ኤ ግሸ ኑን ኔ ነይሽ ኤሱነ ሞዼቴነ ዠሼ ባከ ኑ ዬሶሮንኬኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ። ኔረን ማቄ አያነ ጌሻረ ዎልኮ ኮሎ መክ ኣሎ ካቴሳረ ዬሴሳረ ማቄ ኔ ኤሄ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Keesammi Niyyanni Waa’a, ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos ixxi gaga heeshaa’aa ni’isa ihimminne niina malaayye uwwukko. Ee bikkina neese ki oos ixxi kollinne baddinoo’n xumminne hee’nneena keese uunxinoommo. «Kiinninnee Keesammi Ayyaaninnee maqire heer heerina adil ihoohaanninnee hee’oo iittamaakkoo ki mexxo’i Beet Yesuus Kiristoos bikkina yitaa ni uunxato macceese» yinaa uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Xummaancho nii anna Magano! Qarichchunne Yesuusu Kiristoosu biillimata aaqqi niiganka ikki maala oddaqqi lalliyan kii maqoo xuudammonne. Hikkannii isi wudiin naoot oosukki baambu'nnaachchi xummiin he'nnunta assinne. Kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniinii bargammi doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka wommoo'mmanona heano iittitaanti beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Qullaawa Kaaliiqa Annanke, Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi sholle ninke gedeeha ikkeenna Ate wolqa xabbunke, konnira Isinni ninke oosokki waajja nookkiha kerrunni hee'nammora hucci'neemmohe. Atenna Qullaawu Ayaani ledo hegerera moohannohunna hee'rannohu baxaminohu Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty and eternal God, as you led the wise men by the star of your Son Jesus Christ, we ask you in his name to guide us, who believe and trust in you by the power of the Holy Spirit, to behold his glory forever in heaven. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል ዘላለማዊ አምላክ ሆይ፣ በዚች ቀን ጠቢባንን ወደ ልጅህ ወደ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ኮከብ እንደመራሃቸው፣ እኛንም ደግሞ ምእመናንህ የሆንን በሰማይ ያለውን የእርሱን ክብር እናይ ዘንድ በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይል እንድትመራን በተወደደው ልጅህ በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa Kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa bara baraan jiraattuu, namoota ogeeyyii urjichi gara Ilma Kee Yesus Kristositti akka isaan geggeesse, akkasuma nuunis amantoota Kee, guyyaa har'aa kana ulfina Isaa isa waaqa irraa akka arginuuf humna Hafuura Qulqulluutiin akka nu geggeessituuf maqaa Isa jaallatamaa Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e koolo makkina yese Wonto! Hanzo oshichi bade eraxiti ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa beyese xhoolintey durtineko yoodi u beedo. Nuni hanzo ye esako nu maxe. Nemba aadexiyaaka yese numbani afaa yese ne kuxa nu beyoronike Ayaana Geeshi osana ne durkorosako ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’e siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ሀንዞ ኦሽች በዴ ኤረሥት ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ቤዬሴ ጾልንቴይ ዱርትኔኮ ዮድ ኡ ቤዶ። ኑን ሀንዞ ዬ ኤሰኮ ኑ መሤ። ኔምበ ኣዴሥያከ ዬሴ ኑምበን አፋ ዬሴ ኔ ኩሠ ኑ ቤዮሮንኬ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኔ ዱርኮሮሰኮ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo heer heerinam hee’lloo Niyyanna, kaballa ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoos beyyo qoor manna boollaankichchi awwonsukkisam neesem keese amma’nninummi keen ixxeka iima’n lomba moo’nnoommisina Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne awwonsitona iittamaakkoo ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaanti Magano! Yesuusu Kiristoosu ilammo bari enkee'nnannaakkat beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosiba waaltunta beezzeen awwansitoontissaganka amma'nnaannukki inkoommi neesin samaan yoo isi abbinni xuundunta Xummaancho Ayyaani maqeen awwansituntanne iittitaanti beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu hegere Magano, konni barrinni egennaamma Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi beeddakkowa massagittonte gede, ninkeno qolle ammanaanokki ikkinoommori gordoho nooha Isi ayirrinye la'neemmo gede Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqanni massagattonkera baxaminohu Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, you are the one who gives strength to those who ask. Because our human efforts are powerless without you, help us by the power of your Holy Spirit, given through baptism, to walk as your children in this life now, and to inherit eternal life in the world to come. Hear the prayers of your children who pray in Jesus' name. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል አምላክ ሆይ፣ ለሚለምኑህ ኃይልን የምትሰጣቸው አንተ ነህ፣ የሰው ጉልበት ያለአንተ ደካማ ነውና፣ ስለዚህ በቅዱስ ስምህ የተጠመቅን እንደ ልጆችህ እንሄድ ዘንድ ከዚህች ሕይወት በኋላም የዘላለም ሕይወት እንወርስ ዘንድ በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይል እርዳን፤ ስለ አንዱ ልጅህ ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ብለህ ጸሎታችንን ስማ። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa warra Si kadhataniif humna kan isaaniif kennu Si'i; humni namaa Si malee dadhabaadha'o; Kanaaf Qulqulluu maqaa Keetti kan cuuphamne akka ijoollee Keetti akka deddeebinuuf, jireenya ammaa kana booddees jireenya bara baraa akka argannuuf humna Hafuura Qulqulluutiin nu gargaari, Maqaa tokkicha Ilma Kee Yesus Kristos Gooftaa keenyaaf jettee kadhannaa keenya nuuf dhaga'i. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e Wonto! Bohe gafaxiti gisha nemba shi’eesituse osa ingesi nembako. Hayla ne sunxuna nu xhamaquttese gisha hade ne nayshuke nu yesoronike mati hatte ha nu yeso geede koolo makkina yeso nu dhaaloronike Ayaana Geeshi osana numba maruwa. Bidzi ne yele Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ዎንቶ! ቦሄ ገፈሥት ግሸ ኔምበ ሽኤስቱሴ ኦሰ እንጌስ ኔምበኮ። ሀይለ ኔ ሱንሡነ ኑ ጸመቁቴሴ ግሸ ሀዴ ኔ ነይሹኬ ኑ ዬሶሮንኬ መት ሀቴ ሀ ኑ ዬሶ ጌዴ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሶ ኑ ዻሎሮንኬ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ መሩወ። ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo Niyyanna, keese uunxitam keenina malaayye uwwitoottok atette. Mannik malaayyi at bee’eka hoogaancho. Ee bikkina ki keesammi summinne xammaqammummi keen ki oos inkaa hee’nnoommisinaa ka heechchiinsi lasagem heer heerinam hee’oo heechcha siixxinoommisinaa ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne hara’mme. «Ki mexxo’i Beet ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summi bikkina yitaa ni uunxato macceese» yinaa uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti Magano! Uuccaqqitaakkerii maqoo aassitaantii ateet. At kaa'llitumbudda mannu hoogimaa. Hikkannii xummaancho su'mmiintakki xammaqammoommiru naoot kii oosuta inki woqqaantakki marammunta kaa'llinne. Ammoo ta heechchaachchi zakkiinin doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaa heechchata raga'nnunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniin kaa'llinne yinan mexxoanki beeto Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaatto Magano, huuccidhannoherira wolqa aattonsahu Ateeti. Manchi wolqa ateweelo daafuraanchote. Konni daafira qullaawu su'mikkinni xammaqammoommori oosokki ikkine ha'neemmo gede kawiichi heeshsho gedensaanni hegere heeshsho ragi'neemmo gede Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqanni kaa'linke. Mittichu Beettikki Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite huuccattonke macciishshi. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord our God, who created and sustains the world with your great power, you love your whole creation and desire that all people be saved and come to know the truth. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, who is the Savior of the world, we ask you to raise up servants of your kingdom to preach the gospel, both inside and outside our country, and to give listening ears and hearts of repentance to those who hear their message. Amen.
amh: በታላቅ ኃይልህ ዓለምን የፈጠርክ፣ በእርስዋም የሚኖሩትን ሁሉ የምትገዛና የምታኖር እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ ሰዎች ሁሉ እንዲድኑና እውነቱን ወደ ማወቅ እንዲደርሱ ትወዳለህ። በአገራችን ውስጥም ሆነ ከአገራችን ውጭ ወንጌልን የሚያበሥሩ የመንግሥትህን አገልጋዮች በየጊዜው እንድታስነሣ፣ መልእክታቸውን ለሚሰሙ ሰዎች ደግሞ ሰሚ ጆሮና የንስሐ ልብ እንድትሰጣቸው መድኃኒዓለም በሆነው በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Humna Kee isa guddaadhaan biyya lafaa kan uumte, ishee keessa kan jiraatan hundumaa kan bulchituu fi kan jiraachiftu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, namoonni hundinuu akka fayyanii fi dhugaa beekuu bira akka ga'an jaallatta. Biyya keenya keessattis ta'e, biyya keenyaan alatti Wangeela kan labsan tajaajiltoota mootummaa Keetii yeroodhaa gara yerootti akka kaaftu, ergaa isaanii warra dhaga'aniif immoo gurra dhaga'uu fi yaada qalbii diddiirratu akka kennituuf Fayyisaa biyya lafaa Isa ta'e Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Ha saha orje ne osana meddha Wonto! Ha saha gara yesesa gadesaara ahesaaray nembako. Axi be uddina looloronikiyaara aade erese u danda’oronikiyaara eehako ne eehe.$Nu wude Tobhiyani maaqqe Tobhiyame wude ne Modhe Odo ohe ne kaatetese hante maraxita uddi wogga ne denxoronikiyaara u ohesa siine axituse siine washe ne ingete siidi be cubbo dhaddi u maaqoronikiyaara ne mahoronikeko ha saha dhale maaqe Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ሀ ሰሀ ኦርጄ ኔ ኦሰነ ሜዸ ዎንቶ! ሀ ሰሀ ገረ ዬሴሰ ገዴሳረ አሄሳረይ ኔምበኮ። አሥ ቤ ኡድነ ሎሎሮንክያረ ኣዴ ኤሬሴ ኡ ደንደኦሮንክያረ ኤሀኮ ኔ ኤሄ።$ኑ ዉዴ ቶጵየን ማቄ ቶጵየሜ ዉዴ ኔ ሞዼ ኦዶ ኦሄ ኔ ካቴቴሴ ሀንቴ መረሥተ ኡድ ዎገ ኔ ዴንሦሮንክያረ ኡ ኦሄሰ ሲኔ አሥቱሴ ሲኔ ወሼ ኔ እንጌቴ ሲድ ቤ ጩቦ ዸድ ኡ ማቆሮንክያረ ኔ መሆሮንኬኮ ሀ ሰሀ ዸሌ ማቄ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Kiihaanninne lophphaakkoo malaayyinne heer uulla qooccittok, ixxonnem hee’oo keeno hundam gassitoottokii hee’issoo ni Moollanni Waa’a, manni hundim gatoo’isaa hanqa la’oo’isaa issimma iittitootto. Ni uullannetteme ihukko ni uulliinsi tochchonne mishiraachchi sagara kuttam ki adilla’n awwaadaano amman hundam ki’issoo’isinaa ixxuwwi kuttam ki saga’l assom macceessam mannina odim macceesoo maccee baaxiilo biiraa yoo wodanoo uwwitoo’isinaa heer uullina Qaraar ihu ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne keese uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Abbaanki maqeen samaahaa uullataa qooccitoonti, ammoo uulla aleen yoo horanka / gu'mmanka xaqqitaantina heissaanti nii Qarichcho Magano! At mannu horunku / gu'mmunku amma'nni fauntaa gare woqqaa daguntaa hassaant. Hikkannii baadoontannee ikko hada baadoon Mishiraachchi laagata kultaa kii wommooma soqqamaannu jeechchoon jeechchoon keissuntaa ammoo isso'oot kultaa kii laagata maccooccano manniinka maccootaa maccataa zahiccano wozanahaa aassituntassaa faisaanchu ikko Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Rooriidi wolqakkinni kalqe kalaqoottohu, giddose hee'rannore baala gashshattohunna worattohu Kaaliiqa Maganonke, mannu baalu gataranna halaale afannowa iillara baxatto. Gobbanke giddono ikko, gobbankera gobbaanni Dancha Duduwo lallabbannore gashshootikki soqqamaano yanna yannantenni kayisattota, sokkansa macciishshanno mannirano qolte Macciishshanno maccanna aagintaawate wodana aattonsa gede gobbate Gatisaancho ikkinohunni Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, because you are the ruler of heaven and earth, help us by the power of the Holy Spirit to live in praise of your name all our days, in the name of Jesus Christ your Son our Lord. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል አምላክ ሆይ፣ ሰማይንና ምድርን የምትገዛ አንተ ነህና በዘመናችን ሁሉ ስምህን እየወደስን እንኖር ዘንድ በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይል እርዳን፣ ጸሎታችንን ትሰማን ዘንድ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo, waaqaa fi lafa kan bulchu Si'i waan ta'eef, bara jireenya keenyaa hundumaatti maqaa Kee jajachaa akka jiraannuuf nu gargaari. Kadhata keenya akka nuuf dhageessuuf Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e Wonto! Afaara sahaara ahesi nembako. Nu yese bera aallo uddi ne sunxe kedda kedda hisisine nu yesoronike Ayaana Geeshi osana numba maruwa. Nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ዎንቶ! አፋረ ሰሃረ አሄስ ኔምበኮ። ኑ ዬሴ ቤረ ኣሎ ኡድ ኔ ሱንሤ ኬደ ኬደ ህስስኔ ኑ ዬሶሮንኬ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ መሩወ። ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo iimanee uullaa gassitoo Niyyanni Waa’a, iimanee uullaa gassitoottok atette. Neese hee’nnoommi doollenne hundannem kiina lomba uwwinummuuyyi hee’nnoommisina Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne hara’mme; «Niikka uunxato macceese» yinummuuyyi ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne keese uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti Magano! Samaahaa uullataa xaqqitaantii kees ikkoontitannee doollaantanne horaanin su'mmakki abbinsan he'nnunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaatto Magano, gordonna baatto gashshattohu Ateetina dirinke baalunkunni su'makki ayirrinsanni hee'neemmo gede Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqanni kaa'linke. Huuccattonkeno macciishshattonkera Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty and eternal God, daily increase your Holy Spirit and your grace so that we may trust more and more in the hope that you have given us. Awaken us and help us with your power so that we may live safely under your guiding hand. Hear us in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል የዘላለም አምላክ ሆይ፣ በሰጠኽን ተስፋ እናምን ዘንድ ቅዱስ መንፈስህንና ጸጋህን ዕለት ዕለት አብዛልን። ከእጅህም በታች ሆነን በደኅንነት እንኖር ዘንድ ዘወትር አንቃንና በኃይልህ እርዳን፣ ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ብለህ ስማን። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa bara baraan jiraattuu, abdii nuuf kennitetti akka amannuuf Hafuura Kee Qulqulluu fi ayyaana Kee guyyaa hundumaa nuuf baay'isi. Harka Kee jala taanee nagaadhaan akka jiraannuuf yeroo hundumaa nu dammaqsii, humna Keetiin nu gargaari. Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiif jedhii nuuf dhaga'i. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e koolo makkina yese Wonto! Numba ne gobbusese gobbo aadekoydi nu hiyoronike ne Ayaana Geeshaara axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhetiyaara wontana wontana nuuse lagusuwa. Ne kuche oomo modhetena nu yesoronike uddi wogga numba birkusisine ne osana numba maruwa. Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኑምበ ኔ ጎቡሴሴ ጎቦ ኣዴኮይድ ኑ ህዮሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሻረ አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼትያረ ዎንተነ ዎንተነ ኑሴ ለጉሱወ። ኔ ኩቼ ኦሞ ሞዼቴነ ኑ ዬሶሮንኬ ኡድ ዎገ ኑምበ ብርኩስስኔ ኔ ኦሰነ ኑምበ መሩወ። ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo heer heerina hee’lloo Niyyanna, at niina uwwitti neeyyatonne amma’nninona ki Keesammi Ayyaanaa anceetaa ballina ballina lonsitaa uwwe. Ki angiinsi woroonetti inkaa xumminne hee’nnoommisina hundi ammanem ki malaayyinne baqaa’iminne hara’mme. Ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summi bikkina yitaa «Ni uunxato macceese» yinaa uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti Magano! At aassitoontinne tassaa amma'nninunta Xummaancho Ayyaanikki abba aassancha bariin bariin aassinne. Ammoo kii qorabi aazeen inki xummiin he'nnunta horanta jaata baq-baqqi assinnenii maqeentakki kaa'llinnenii yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu hegere Magano, oottonke hexxo ammanneemmo gede Qullaawa Ayyaanakkinna eltokki barru barrunkunni batisinke. Angakkira woroonni hee'ne gatotenni hee'nammora wo'manka woyite baqqi assite wolqakkinni kaa'linke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty Heavenly Father, you know that, because of the weakness of our flesh, we cannot overcome all trials and tribulations. Therefore we ask you to strengthen our bodies and souls in times of trouble and hardship, so that we may triumph in the power of your Holy Spirit. Hear us in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል ሰማያዊ አባት ሆይ፣ ሥጋችን ደካማ ስለ ሆነ መከራንና ፈተናን ሁሉ ማሸነፍ እንደማንችል አንተ ታውቃለህ። ስለዚህ በጭንቅ ጊዜና በፈተናም ጊዜ በአንተ ቅዱስ መንፈስ ኃይል ድል እንድንነሣ ለሥጋችንና ለነፍሳችን ኃይልን እንድትሰጠን እንለምንሃለን ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ስትል ስማን። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu, Yaa Abbaa waaqa irraa, foon keenya dadhabaa waan ta'eef dhiphinaa fi qoramsa hundumaa mo'uu akka nuyi hin dandeenye Ati beekta. Kanaaf yeroo dhiphinaa fi yeroo qoramsaatti humna Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin mo'icha akka argannuuf foon keenyaa fi lubbuu keenyaaf humna akka nuuf kennituuf Si kadhanna, Maqaa Yesus Kristosiif jedhii nuuf dhaga'i. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e afaaka yese ade! Nu achoy gafaxe maaqe gisha maddhaara nu gara yoone naa’uwaara uddi iicheshe nu danda’uwasa erako ne ere.$Ye e gisha maddha woggani maaqqe naa’o woggani ne Ayaana Geeshuna nu iichoronike nu achosheni maaqqe nu lubboseni osa ne ingoronikeko nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ አፋከ ዬሴ አዴ! ኑ አቾይ ገፈሤ ማቄ ግሸ መዻረ ኑ ገረ ዮኔ ናኡዋረ ኡድ ኢቼሼ ኑ ደንደኡወሰ ኤረኮ ኔ ኤሬ።$ዬ ኤ ግሸ መዸ ዎገን ማቄ ናኦ ዎገን ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑ ኢቾሮንኬ ኑ አቾሼን ማቄ ኑ ሉቦሴን ኦሰ ኔ እንጎሮንኬኮ ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanna, niikki maar hoogaanchi ihu bikkina hawwoo hawwinne waaroo keenanchaa hundam kaa’nneena xanoombee’isa at laqqootto. Ee bikkina «U’nnanchii keenanchii afoo ammane ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne kaa’nnona ni maarinaa ni foorinaa malaayye uwwe» yinaa ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne keese uunxinoommo; ixxi summi bikkina yitaa macceese. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti samaan yoonti anna Magano! Naoot maala oddaqqineemmi hoogimmata inkoommitannee hawwahaa keenanchahaa horanka / gu'mmanka qeelii dandinumburra inkoommiga atin daggaant. Hikkannii hawwu affonne jaataa keenanchu iilleenne jaataa kii Xummaancho Ayyaani maqeen qeelu daqqinunta maaliihannee fooliihannee maqoo aassituntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu Gordu Anna, maalinke daafuraancho ikkino daafira qarranna fonqolo duucha qeelara dandaannokkita Ati egennootto. Konni daafira shettote yannara fonqolu yannarano Atetenni Qullaawu Ayyaani heeshshonkera wolqa aattonkera huucci'neemmohena Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: God, heavenly father, be a refuge for those who believe in you and hope only in your grace. Protect your people with the power of your Holy Spirit so that they may live in your love; in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር ሰማያዊ አባት ሆይ፣ በጸጋህ ብቻ ለሚያምኑና ተስፋ ለሚያደርጉ ሰዎች መጠጊያ ሁናቸው፤ ሕዝብህም በፍቅርህ እንዲኖሩ በቅዱስ መንፈስህ ኃይል ጠብቃቸው፣ ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa, Isa waaqa irra jiraattuu, namoota ayyaana Kee qofa amanatanii fi abdataniif da'oo isaaniif ta'i. Amantoonni Kees jaalala Keetti akka jiraataniif humna Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin isaan egi, Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Afaaka yese nuuse ade! Axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhetena nemba aadexeesitusaara nemba gobbeesitusaara kiidhe ne maaqorosako nemba nu shi’e. Ne woylay ne eehana yesoronike ne Ayaana Geeshi osana kakkuwa.$Haanxho uddi nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: አፋከ ዬሴ ኑሴ አዴ! አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼቴነ ኔምበ ኣዴሤስቱሳረ ኔምበ ጎቤስቱሳረ ኪዼ ኔ ማቆሮሰኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ። ኔ ዎይለይ ኔ ኤሀነ ዬሶሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ከኩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iima’n Anni Waa’a, xale’i ki anceet amma’nnitam keeninaa ki neeyyatonnem bakke’llam keeninaa bakkechchi ihe. Ki minaadabim ki iittinne hee’oo’isina ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne ixxuwwa egere. Ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos bikkina yitaa «Ni uunxato macceese» yinaa uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti anna Magano! Kii abba aassanchaan xallaan amma'nnitaana tassaa assitaa manna dikkisissa. Minaadabukkin iittaantakki heunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llituntassa Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa gordu Anna, eltokkinni calla ammantinoriranna hexxo assitanno mannira irko ikkinsa. Dagakkino baxillikkinni heedhara Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqakkinni agarinsa. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: God, Heavenly Father, you are the Author and Finisher of all the good in our hearts. Help us by your Holy Spirit, in the name of your only Son, Jesus Christ, to grow in the love of Christ and in good deeds, knowing that we receive everything good from your grace alone. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር ሰማያዊ አባት ሆይ፣ በልባችን መልካም የሆነውን ሥራ ጀማሪና ፈጻሚ አንተ ነህ። ከጸጋህ ብቻ ሁሉን እንደምናገኝ እያወቅን በክርስቶስ ፍቅር በመልካም ተግባርም እየበዛን እንድንሄድ በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ እርዳን ስለ አንዱ ልጅህ ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ስትል። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa, Isa waaqa irra jiraattuu, hojii gaarii ta'e garaa keenya keessatti kan jalqabu, kan fixaan baasus Si'i. Ayyaana Kee qofa irraa wanta hundumaa akka argannu beekuudhaan, jaalala Kristositti, hojii gaarii hojjechuuttis jabaachaa akka adeemnuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu gargaari; Maqaa tokkicha Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Afaaka yese nuuse ade! Nu muxhurowa modhe hanta hante aykesaara e aallicira aallo alsesaaray nenko. Axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhetiyaafa densi uddi abako nu degexenike erdi Kristosa eehana modhe hanta hantese nu gara kossi kossi nu hamoronike ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: አፋከ ዬሴ ኑሴ አዴ! ኑ ሙጹሮወ ሞዼ ሀንተ ሀንቴ አይኬሳረ ኤ ኣልጭረ ኣሎ አልሴሳረይ ኔንኮ። አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼትያፈ ዴንስ ኡድ አበኮ ኑ ዴጌሤንኬ ኤርድ ክርስቶሰ ኤሀነ ሞዼ ሀንተ ሀንቴሴ ኑ ገረ ኮስ ኮስ ኑ ሀሞሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, ni wodanonne eran ihu baxo asheeraanchii goollaanchii atette. «Ki anceetinne hundem luwwam siixxinoommisa lanqaa Kiristoos iittinne er bax hundinne li’nnummuuyyi mallona hara’mme» yinaa «Ki mexxo’i Beet Yesuus Kiristoos summinne ni uunxato macceese» yinaa uunxinoommuulla. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti anna Magano! Nii heechchaan bareedata hujita hujattaantiihuu hujis xoofsiissaantiihuu ateet. Naoont kii abba aassanchiichchi keoo horarranka daqqinaammiga dangi Yesuusi Kiristoosi iittaan bareedata hujita hujatiin maqoo daqqinan mannunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llituntanne mexxoanki beeto Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Magano Gordu Anna, wodaninkera dancha ikkino looso hanafattohuno gudattohuno Ateeti. Eltokkinni callate wo'mankare afi'neemmota anfanni Kiristoosi baxillinni danchummate loosinni bati'nanni ha'nammora Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni kaa'linke. Mittu Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite. Hamii'ni.

eng: Dear God, when we were worthy of death for our sins, you redeemed us through your only Son Jesus Christ. Comfort us now with your Holy Spirit, and in your mercy save us. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ቸሩ እግዚአብሔር ሆይ፣ ስለ ኃጢአታችን የሞት ፍርድ የሚገባን ሆነን ሳለ፣ በአንዱ ልጅህ በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ዋጅተኸናል። በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ አጽናንተኸን በቸርነትህ ታድነን ዘንድ እንለምንሃለን፤ ስለ አንዱ ልጅህ ስለ ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ብለህ። አሜን።
gaz: Arjaa kan taate yaa Waaqayyo, sababii Cubbuu keenyaaf duuti kan nuuf ta'u taanee utuu jirruu, tokkicha Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiin nu furteetta. Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu jajjabeessitee, arjummaa Keetiin akka nu fayyiftuuf Si kadhanna; Maqaa tokkicha Ilma Kee Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Jhergaxe maaqe Wonto! Nu cubbo gisha hayboy nu gara kaatechoyne bidzi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosana numba wozziko ne yese. Ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba minsi ne jhergetena numba ne loolusoronikeko nemba nu shi’e.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ዤርገሤ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኑ ጩቦ ግሸ ሀይቦይ ኑ ገረ ካቴቾይኔ ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰነ ኑምበ ዎዝኮ ኔ ዬሴ። ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ ምንስ ኔ ዤርጌቴነ ኑምበ ኔ ሎሉሶሮንኬኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Biijaalli Waa’a, ni baaxii’l bikkina niina leh laboo keen inkaa hee’nnonam ki mexxo’i Beet Yesuus Kiristoosinne neese bito aa’llaatto. Ee bikkina ki biijoominne neese gatise. Ki mexxo’i Beet ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos bikkina yitaa «Ni uunxato macceese» yinaa uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Biiza Magano! Baaxiiliichchinne keoo nesaa reho firdu hasisanonnee ihaniyan at mexxoanki beeto Yesuusi Kiristoosi wudiin nees wozzeentinne. Hikkannii at Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki nees qaarsit biizimaantakki faissuntanne mexxoanki beeto Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Shaqqado Magano, cubbinke daafira reyote yoo malte heedheennankenni, Mittu Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosinni wodoottonke. Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni sheshifachishshenke shaqqillikkinni gatisattonke gede huucci'neemmohena Mittu Beettikki Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Lord, you know that we cannot understand your Word by our own strength or wisdom. We ask you in the name of Jesus Christ that your Holy Spirit, who is our teacher, will guide us in all truth and protect us from everything that prevents us from understanding your Word. Amen.
amh: በጉልበታችን በምናደርገው መታመን ቃልህን ማስተዋል እንደማንችል ታውቃለህ። አስተማሪአችን የሆነ ቅዱስ መንፈስህ እንዲያስተምረንና ቃልህን ማስተዋል ከሚከለክለን ሁሉ እርሱ እንዲጠብቀን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, jabinaa fi humna keenyaan dubbii Kee hubachuu akka nuyi hin dandeenye Ati beekta. Barsiisaa keenya kan ta'e, Hafuurri Qulqulluun Kee akka nu barsiisu, dubbii Kee hubachuu kan nu dhowwu hundaas akka Inni nurraa eeguuf Si kadhanna. Maqaa Yesus Kristosiif jettee nuuf dhaga'i. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Wonto! Nu  osa goddi nu hante hantaafa densi ne kato gara gaxe nu keenguwanike erako ne ere.$Numba erusesa maaqe ne Ayaana Geeshi numba e erusoronikiyaara ne kato nu gaxhuwanike tuce abako uddi nu garafa e kaforonikiyaarako haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’e  siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ዎንቶ! ኑ  ኦሰ ጎድ ኑ ሀንቴ ሀንታፈ ዴንስ ኔ ከቶ ገረ ገሤ ኑ ኬንጉወንኬ ኤረኮ ኔ ኤሬ።$ኑምበ ኤሩሴሰ ማቄ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኑምበ ኤ ኤሩሶሮንክያረ ኔ ከቶ ኑ ገጹወንኬ ቱጬ አበኮ ኡድ ኑ ገረፈ ኤ ከፎሮንክያረኮ ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ  ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Niyyanni Waa’a, ni malaayyenne amma’nnimminne banxoommi baxinne ki sagara qoossinaa lanqeena xanoombee’isa laqqootto. Ni losisaanchi ihu ki Keesammi Ayyaan losisoo’isinaa ki sagara qoossinoombee’isa hooroo luwwi hundiinsi egeroo’isinaa Yesuus Kiristoos summi bikkina yitaa «Ni uunxato macceese» yinaa uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Magano! Naoot nii maqoon dikka'nni laagakki zahiccii dandinumburra inkoommiga atin daggaant. Hikkannii rosisaanchunne ikko Xummaanchu Ayyaanukki rosissuntannenii laagakkin zahiccinumboga kamanonne horaarriichchin is qorabuntannenii Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wolqankenni assineemmo hexxonkenni Qaalekki huwata dandiineemmokkita afootto. Rosiisaanchonke ikkinohu Qullaawu Ayyaanikki rosiisankeranna qaalikkira qaaggo hooltannonkeri baaluwiinni Isi Ayyaanu agarannonke gede Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Lord our God, you tell us that everything done without love is worthless. Pour out your love in our hearts by the power of the Holy Spirit, so that we may be cleansed from sin and live with you forever. In the name of Jesus Christ our Lord. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ ያለፍቅር የሚደረገው ነገር ሁሉ ዋጋ እንደሌለው ታስታውቀናለህ። ከኃጢአት ነጽተን እስከ ዘላለምም ከአንተ ጋር እንድንኖር በልባችን በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይል ፍቅርህን አፍስስልን ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ብለህ። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, wanti jaalala malee hojjetamu hundinuu gatii akka hin qabne nutti in beeksista; cubbuuttii qulloofnee bara baraan Si wajjin akka jiraannuuf humna Hafuura Qulqulluutiin garaa keenya keessatti jaalala Kee nuuf dhangalaasi. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxo! Nu Wonto! Eeha keenguwasa maaqe abakoy uddi go’uwasa e maaqesa uddi numba erusiyako ne yese. Cubbowafa geejjhi koolo makkina neera wolko nu yesoronike nu muxhurowaka Ayaana Geeshi ne eeha nuuka lagussi gaduwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሦ! ኑ ዎንቶ! ኤሀ ኬንጉወሰ ማቄ አበኮይ ኡድ ጎኡወሰ ኤ ማቄሰ ኡድ ኑምበ ኤሩስየኮ ኔ ዬሴ። ጩቦወፈ ጌዥ ኮሎ መክነ ኔረ ዎልኮ ኑ ዬሶሮንኬ ኑ ሙጹሮወከ አያነ ጌሽ ኔ ኤሀ ኑከ ለጉስ ገዱወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Niyyanni Waa’a, iitti bee’eka issakkam luwwi hundim maham awwaadoobee’an ihukkisa niina la’issaatto. «Baaxiiliinsi muccullaa heer heerinam kiinninne maqire hee’nnoommisina ni wodanonne ki iitto dune. Ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne ni uunxato macceese» yinaa uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nii Qarichcho Magano! At iittat yoobaii asseennoru horurrunku tamit yoobaii ikkoga rosissaantinne. Hikkannii naoot baaxiiliichchinne muccunni doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka kesaan bargammi he'nnunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki iittakki aassituntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Maganonke, baxilliweelo assinanni coyi baalu guma afi'rinokkita afisattonke. Cubbunni keeraa'mine hegere geeshsha Ate ledo hee'nammora wodaninke giddo Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqanni baxillekki duninke, Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite. Hamii'ni.

eng: God, our Heavenly Father, you sent your only Son to be tried and tested in our trials and tribulations. Help us by your Holy Spirit to be his followers, and overcome our enemy with his power. In the name of Jesus Christ our Lord. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር ሰማያዊ አባት ሆይ፣ አንድያ ልጅህ ወደ ጭንቀትና ጣር ገብቶ እንዲፈተንና በፈተናችንም ጊዜ ረጅአችን እንዲሆንልን ሰጥተኸናል። እኛም የእርሱ ተከታዮች እንሆንና በእርሱ ኃይል ጠላታችንን ድል እንነሣ ዘንድ በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ እርዳን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Waaqa irra kan jiraatu yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa, tokkichi Ilmi Kee gidiraa fi muddamatti galee akka qoramu, yeroo nuyi qoramnus gargaaraa keenya akka nuuf ta'uuf nuuf kenniteetta; nuyis duuka-buutota Isaa ta'uudhaan humna Isaatiin diinota keenya akka mo'annuuf, Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu gargaari, Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Afaaka yese nu Wonto! Bidzi ne yeley maddhaakaara waayakaara gelli e naa’uttoronikiyaara nuni naa’utteniyaaka numba maresa e maaqoronkiyaara nuuse indiko ne yese. Nunini esaara wolko hangesaara e osana nu iilaxe nu iichoronikiyaara ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: አፋከ ዬሴ ኑ ዎንቶ! ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌይ መዻካረ ዋየካረ ጌል ኤ ናኡቶሮንክያረ ኑን ናኡቴንያከ ኑምበ መሬሰ ኤ ማቆሮንክያረ ኑሴ እንድኮ ኔ ዬሴ። ኑንን ኤሳረ ዎልኮ ሀንጌሳረ ኤ ኦሰነ ኑ ኢለሤ ኑ ኢቾሮንክያረ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, kiikki mexxo’i Beet hawwonnee asqachchannee aagaa keenamoo’isinaa neese keenammoommi keenanchannem niina hara’mmaanchi ihoo’isinaa uwwitaatto. Neesem ixxo awwonnoommi keen inkaa ixxi malaayyinne diina’a hundam kaa’nnoommisina ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommuulla. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti anna Magano! At mexxukki beetu Yesuusu Kiristoosu hawwahaa u'nnataa aaqqi keenamunta assit nesaanka keenanchu iilleenne jaata is kaa'lluntanne higissi aassiteent. Ammoo naoont isi awwanaannu ikkuntaa isi maqeen diinanne qeennuntaa Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llituntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Gordu Anna, mitto Beettokki qarrunna reyote biqora e”e fonqolamaranna fonqolinke yannarano kaa'laanchonke ikkankera oottonke. Ninkeno Isi ha'runsaasine ikkinammoranna Isi wolqanni baarigaaranke qeelleemmo gede Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni kaa'linke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni. Hamii'ni.

eng: Most High God, Heavenly Father, you know that by ourselves we can do nothing good. Protect our bodies from all evil, and cleanse our souls from all wicked thoughts, and protect us throughout our earthly and spiritual lives, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ልዑል እግዚአብሔር ሰማያዊ አባት ሆይ፣ እኛ ራሳችን ምንም መልካም መሥራት እንደማይቻለን ታውቃለህ፤ ስለዚህ ሥጋችንን ከክፉ ሁሉ ጠብቅልን፣ ነፍሳችንንም ከክፉ አሳብ ሁሉ አንጻት፤ በዓለማዊና በመንፈሳዊ ኑሯችን እንድትጠብቀን እንለምንሃለን፣ ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ስትል ስማን። አሜን።
gaz: Hundaa ol kan taate, yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa Isa waaqa irra jiraattuu, nuyi ofii keenyaa hojii gaarii ta'e tokko iyyuu hojjechuun akka nuuf hin danda'amne Ati beekta; kanaafis foon keenya hamaa hundumaattii nuuf eegi; lubbuu keenyas yaada hamaa hundumaattii nuuf qulleessi; jireenya keenya biyya lafaatii fi jireenya keenya hafuuraas akka nuuf eegduuf Si kadhanna. Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiif jettee nuuf dhaga'i. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Kaate maaqe Wonto! Afaaka yese nuuse ade! Nuni nuuse modhe hanta hantese nu danda’uwasa erako ne ere. Ye e gisha numba iitaafa uddi kakkuwa. Nu muxhuroni iita maxuwaafa uddi geeshuwa.$Nu achoshe worgusesaara nu lubbose worgusesaara nuuse ne mahoronikeko nemba nu shi’e.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ካቴ ማቄ ዎንቶ! አፋከ ዬሴ ኑሴ አዴ! ኑን ኑሴ ሞዼ ሀንተ ሀንቴሴ ኑ ደንደኡወሰ ኤረኮ ኔ ኤሬ። ዬ ኤ ግሸ ኑምበ ኢታፈ ኡድ ከኩወ። ኑ ሙጹሮን ኢተ መሡዋፈ ኡድ ጌሹወ።$ኑ አቾሼ ዎርጉሴሳረ ኑ ሉቦሴ ዎርጉሴሳረ ኑሴ ኔ መሆሮንኬኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo adil Niyyanni Waa’a, neese ni gaginne mah er baxom banxeena xannoombee’isa at laqqootto. Ee bikkina ni maaraa fooree jor luwwiinsee sawwitiinsee hundiinsim egere; ni foorem jor sawwit hundiinsim muccusse. Niikka maa’l heechchaa foo’l heechchaa egettoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommuulla. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti anna Qarichcho Magano! Naoot gagiintanne mexxita bareedimataa assii dandinumburra inkoommiga atin daggaant. Hikkannii nees hiilaarriichchi horiichchin / gu'mmiichchin qorabinne. Foolinnen hiilaarriichchi horiichchin / gu'mmiichchin muccurimaan qorabi. Ammoo maaliinii fooliinii indo amma'nnati heechchaanii uulla aleen he'nnaammi heechchaanii qorabbuntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Roore Magano Gordu Anna, ninke uminke mittoreno danchare loosa dandiineemmokkita afootto. Kunni daafira mannimmanke bushu coyiwiinni agarinke. Lubbonkeno busha hedo baalatewiinni keereensise, tenne baatto heeshshoranna ayyaanaame heeshshora agarattonkera, Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, we thank you for drawing us to yourself so that we can escape from the powers of darkness and always walk as children of light. In the name of your only Son Jesus Christ, we now ask you to keep us in your mighty power all the days of our lives. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል አምላካችን ሆይ፣ ከጨለማ ሥልጣናት እንድናመልጥና ሁልጊዜ እንደ ብርሃን ልጆች እንድንመላለስ ወደ ራስህ ስለሳብኸን እናመስግንሃለን። ስለዚህ አሁን በኃይልህ ጠብቀን እያልን በአንዱ ልጅህ በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, humnoota dukkanaa jalaa akka baanuu fi yeroo hundumaa akka ijoollee ifaatti akka deddeebinuuf gara ofii Keetti waan nu harkifteef Si galateeffanna. Kanatiifis humna Keetiin nu eegi jennee, Maqaa tokkicha Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e nu Wonto! Cencha osaxiti oomofa tulxhi uddi woggaa hade go’e nayshuke sekke hanke nu hantoronike neeko numba goosshi ne oodo gisha nemba galatako ta galate.$Ye e gisha hatte numba ne osana kakkuwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኑ ዎንቶ! ጬንቸ ኦሰሥት ኦሞፈ ቱልጽ ኡድ ዎጋ ሀዴ ጎኤ ነይሹኬ ሴኬ ሀንኬ ኑ ሀንቶሮንኬ ኔኮ ኑምበ ጎሽ ኔ ኦዶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ተ ገለቴ።$ዬ ኤ ግሸ ሀቴ ኑምበ ኔ ኦሰነ ከኩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo Niyyanna, tuunsi malaayyi yoo keeniinsi xolloommisinaa hundi ammanem caakki oosisa daba’llammoomisinaa ki kollonne wottootti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Ee bikkina kaba «Ki malaayyinne neese egere» yinummuuyyi ki mexxo’i Beet Yesuus Kiristoos summinne keese uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti Qarichcho Magano! Tunsoga ikko hiila ayyaaniichchi fushshaqqinuntaa horanta jaata caakki oosuta inki fanqalaammuntaa kiiba gaitoontinnehannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Hikkannii teesuu maqeentakki qorabbuntanne mexxoanki beeto Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu Maganonke, tunsichu wolqa giddonni fulleemmo gedenna wo'manka woyite caabbichu ooso gede ikkine ha'rammammora Atewa qolte goshooshoottonke daafira galaxxineemmohe. Konni daafira xa wolqakkinni agarinke yinanni Mittu Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, it is your will to save us, who are sorely afflicted by sin. Make us hunger and thirst for your righteousness. Strengthen our hearts with the power of your Holy Spirit. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ እኛን በኃጢአት የተቸገርን ሰዎችን ልታድነን ፈቃድህ ሆኖአል። ስለዚህ ጽድቅህን የሚራቡና የሚጠሙ አድርገን። በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይል ልባችንን እንድታጸናልን እንለምንሃለን። በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, nuyi namoota cubbuudhaan rakkanne fayyisuun jaalala Kee ta'eera. Kanaafis warra qajeelummaa Kee beela'anii fi dheebotan nu taasifadhu. Humna Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiinis garaa keenya akka nuuf cimsituuf, Maqaa Gooftaa Keenya Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e nu Wonto! Numba cubbona maddhundese axita maarese ne maxo maaddhiko e yese.$Naydese axi kaxa worgenikiyaara sazzese axi waaxe worgenikiyaara ne gizete nu worgoronike numba maruwa. Ayaana Geeshi osana nu muxhuro ne minxoronikeko nemba nu shi’e.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኑ ዎንቶ! ኑምበ ጩቦነ መዹንዴሴ አሥተ ማሬሴ ኔ መሦ ማዽኮ ኤ ዬሴ።$ነይዴሴ አሥ ከሠ ዎርጌንክያረ ሰዜሴ አሥ ዋሤ ዎርጌንክያረ ኔ ግዜቴ ኑ ዎርጎሮንኬ ኑምበ መሩወ። አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑ ሙጹሮ ኔ ምንሦሮንኬኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo Niyyanni Waa’a, neese baaxiilinne hawwinaammo manna gatisseena ki doo’l ihaakko. Ee bikkina muccuroomina sibaalloommi keenoo xeebe’nnoommi keenoo isse. Ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne ni wodano muccussitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka danditaanti nii Qarichcho Magano! Baaxiiliichchinne keoo hawwineemmi nees manni oosuta faissonneta at iittiteent. Hikkannii nees muccurimakki hansaammiraa qulxinaammiraa assinne. Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakkin qaarsituntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu Kaaliiqa Maganonke, ninke cubbunni shentoommo manna gatisattonkera fajjokki ikkino. Konni daafira keeraanchimmakkira hudidhannorinna goo'riitannori gedeere assinke. Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqanni wodananke jawaachishatto gede huucci'neemmohe. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, look upon your people, the church, for whom our Lord Jesus Christ suffered the pain of death on the cross. Give us your power to be faithful followers, and make us partakers of the salvation which he has prepared for us. In the name of your beloved Son, Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ የመስቀል ሞት ሥቃይ የተቀበለላትን ቤተ ክርስቲያን በቸርነትህ ተመልከታት። እኛ ም ታማኞች ተከታዮች እንድንሆን ኃይልህን ስጠን። በርሱ የተዘጋጀልንን ደኅንነትም ተካፋዮች አድርገን። ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋር ለዘላለም በሚኖርና በሚገዛ በተወደደው ልጅህ በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, Waldaa Kristaanaa Gooftaan keenya Yesus Kristos dhiphina du'a fannoo fudhateef, gaarummaa Keetiin ilaali. Nuyis duuka buutota Kee warra amanamoo akka taanuuf humna Kee nuuf kenni. Hirmaattota fayyina karaa Isaa nuuf qophaa'ees nu taasisi. Maqaa Ilma Kee Isa jaallatamaa Gooftaa Keenya Yesus Kristos Isa Sii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin bara baraan jiraatuu fi mo'uutiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e nu Wonto! Nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosay suxi mixi gara be hay’oro aallo usume waaye e beedo axita ne jhergo aafena beewa. Nunini neera wolko bidzi muxhurona hangeesita nu maaqoronike osa nuuse inguwa. Kristosana nuuse naquttese loolose shahaxe nu maaqoronike numba mahuwa. Neerani maaqqe Ayaana Geeshaara wolko yesesaara ahesaara maaqe ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኑ ዎንቶ! ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰይ ሱሥ ምሥ ገረ ቤ ሀይኦሮ ኣሎ ኡሱሜ ዋዬ ኤ ቤዶ አሥተ ኔ ዤርጎ ኣፌነ ቤወ። ኑንን ኔረ ዎልኮ ብድዝ ሙጹሮነ ሀንጌስተ ኑ ማቆሮንኬ ኦሰ ኑሴ እንጉወ። ክርስቶሰነ ኑሴ ነቁቴሴ ሎሎሴ ሸሀሤ ኑ ማቆሮንኬ ኑምበ መሁወ። ኔረን ማቄ አያነ ጌሻረ ዎልኮ ዬሴሳረ አሄሳረ ማቄ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo Niyyanni Waa’a, ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos masqalanne lehaa hawwo aa’u amma’nnaa’n wixxite ki biijoominne moo’e. Neese amma’nnammaammoo awwonaan inkoommisinam ki malaayye uwwe. Ixxenne gudu gatimmam baxxamaan isse. Kiinninnee Keesammi Ayyaaninnee, maqire heer heerina hee’oohaanninnee gassoohaanninnee, iittamaakkoo ki Beet ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommuulla. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti nii Qarichcho Magano! Qarichchunne Yesuusu Kiristoosu masqali aleen saqalammi hawwa aaqqikei rehi faishsho amma'nnaanni maabara biizimaantakki xuudi. Naoont amma'nnammeemmi awwanaannukki inkunta maqoo aassinne. Hittigunta isi wudiin qixxammonne fai heechchata daqqinaammi keenu assinne yinan kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniinii bargammi doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heanona xaqqano iittitaanti beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu Kaaliiqa Maganonke, Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi Masiqalu aanita reyoote qarra adhinoseta Beetekiristaane shaqqillikkinni laise. Ninkeno ammanammoommo ha'runsaasinekki ikkinammora wolqakki uyinke. Isinni qixxaabbinonketera gatote beeqqaano assinke. Atenna Qullaawu Ayyaani ledo hegerera hee'rannohunninna gashshannohunni baxamino Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty and eternal God, our Savior Jesus Christ was humbled to become man and die on the cross for us. In his mightly and exulted name, help us by your grace to be partakers of the joy of the resurrection with him. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል የዘላለም አምላክ ሆይ፣ አንተ መድኃኒታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሰው ሆኖ ስለ እኛ በመስቀል እንዲሞት አሳልፈህ ሰጥተኸዋል በትሕትናውም ምሳሌ ሆኖአልና እኛም የሚመጣብንን መከራ ሁሉ በትዕግሥት እንድንቀበለው መንፈስ ቅዱስህ ያግዘን፤ ከርሱ ጋርም የትንሣኤው ደስታ ተካፋዮች እንድንሆን በጸጋህ እርዳን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ስትል። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa isa Hundumaa dandeessuu, Gooftaa bara baraa, Fayyisaan keenya Yesus Kristos, Waaqayyo ta'ee utuma jiruu gadi of deebisuudhaan, nama ta'ee akka nuuf jedhee fannoo irraatti du'uuf dabarsitee kennite. Gadi of deebisuu Isaatiin fakkeenya akka nuuf ta'e, nuyis dhiphina nutti dhufu hundumaa obsaan akka fudhannuuf Hafuurri Qulqulluun Kee nu haa gargaaru; gammachuu du'aa ka'uu Isaas Isaa wajjin hirmaattuu akka taanuuf ayyaana Keetiin nu gargaari. Maqaa Gooftaa Keenya Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e koolo makkina yese Wonto! Nu dhale maaqe Yesuusi Kristosay axe maaddhi nu gisha suxi mixi gara e hay’oronike garsi indiko ne yese. Nunini esukeydi shenaxe maaddhi nu gara yoone maddha uddi dandadhi nu eforonike ne Ayaana Geeshi osana numba kiidhuwa. Kristosaara wolko e denxose magga shahaxe nu maaqoronike axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhetena numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኑ ዸሌ ማቄ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰይ አሤ ማዽ ኑ ግሸ ሱሥ ምሥ ገረ ኤ ሀይኦሮንኬ ገርስ እንድኮ ኔ ዬሴ። ኑንን ኤሱኬይድ ሼነሤ ማዽ ኑ ገረ ዮኔ መዸ ኡድ ደንደዽ ኑ ኤፎሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ ኪዹወ። ክርስቶሳረ ዎልኮ ኤ ዴንሦሴ መገ ሸሀሤ ኑ ማቆሮንኬ አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼቴነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo heer heerina hee’lloo Waa’a, ni Qaraar Yesuus Kiristoos manchi ihaa ni bikkina masqalanne lehoo’isina higissaa uwwitaatto. Niina ixxi maashaalloominne kobi’l ihaakko. Eehannina neese odim neesenne afoo hawwi hundam iyyaqqimminne aa’nnaa ixxenne maqirem lehiinsi kichchi liirancha baxxammoommi keen inkoommisina Keesammi Ayyaana niina hara’mme. Neesem ixxenne maqire kichcha baxxamaan inkoommisina ki eroomminne hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaanti Magano! Zabbunne ikko Yesuusi Kiristoosu manchu ikki niitannee hawwa aaqqi masqali aleen saqalammi rehunta at higissi assiteent. Is maashimaantas nesaa agudiishshata ikkotannee naoont iillanonne hawwa horanka / gu'mmanka iyyaqqunta Xummaanchu Ayyaanukki kaa'llunne. Yesuusu rehoochchi keoganka naoont isiinin bargammi rehoochchi ke'nni bajigo beeqqamaannu inkunta abba aassanchiintakki kaa'llituntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu hegere Magano, Ati Xagichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi manna ikke ninke daafira Masiqalu aana reyara sayisse ootto. Shaqqillisinnino lawishsha ikkinona. Ninkeno daannonke qarra baala cincatenni adhinammora Qullaawu Ayyaanikki irkisonke. Yesuusi ledo Kaote hagiirri beeqqaano ikkinammora eltokkinni kaa'linke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Eternal God, when we remember the severity of our sins for which your Son, our Lord Jesus Christ suffered, we are brought again to repentance and faith. Thank you for blotting out our sins by his death and resurrection. In Jesus' name. Amen.
amh: ዘላለማዊ አምላክ እግዚአብሔር ሆይ፣ ልጅህ ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሥቃይ የተቀበለበትን የኃጢአታችንን ጠንቅ ስናስታውስ እጅግ ያሰቅቃል። ግን በሥቃዩ ኃጢአታችንን ስለደመሰስህ እናመሰግንሃለን፤ አሁንም ስለ ልጅህ ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ስትል ኃጢአታችንን ይቅር በለን። አሜን።
gaz: Bara baraan kan jiraattu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa, Ilmi Kee Gooftaan keenya Yesus Kristos sababii cubbuu keenyaaf dhiphina Inni dhiphate yeroo yaadannu baay'ee dhagna nu suukessa. Garuu dhiphina Isaatiin cubbuu keenya waan nu irraa calaasteef Si galateeffanna. Ammas Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiif jettee cubbuu keenya nuuf dhiisi. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Koolo makkina yese Wonto! Nu Wonto! Nu Laaxe maaqe ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa maddhaa gelsa nu cubbo hargey waydi keddaydese iita e maaqesi iitanako numba suuxe e yese. Nenimay e maddhaafa dendase nu cubbo ‘Attuwaye’ hidi ne hido gisha nemba galatako nu galate.$Hatteni ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nu cubbo ‘Attuwaye’ hidi hiwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኑ ዎንቶ! ኑ ላሤ ማቄ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ መዻ ጌልሰ ኑ ጩቦ ሀርጌይ ወይድ ኬደይዴሴ ኢተ ኤ ማቄስ ኢተነኮ ኑምበ ሱሤ ኤ ዬሴ። ኔንመይ ኤ መዻፈ ዴንደሴ ኑ ጩቦ ‘አቱወዬ’ ህድ ኔ ህዶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ሀቴን ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኑ ጩቦ ‘አቱወዬ’ ህድ ህወ። አሜን።
hdy: Heer heerinam hee’lloo ni Moollanni Waa’a, ki Beet ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos aa’u ni baaxii’l hawwo sawwinoommaare lobakata asqa’isoohane. Ihukkaarem ixxi asqachchinne ni baaxiilo shiinshitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Kabadem ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoos bikkina yitaa ni baaxiilo «Uroommo» yihe. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaanti Magano! Beetukki Yesuusu Kiristoosu nii baaxiilitannee yi aaqqee abba hawwa qaangaammida nii baaxiilu abbishshi shishixxisanoa. Ikkodaa is aaqqee abba hawwiin at baaxiilanne faun yitoontihannii abbins galaxxinaanke; nii Magano! Teesuu beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoositannee yit baaxiilanne faun yi. Amii'nni.
sid: Hegere Magano Kaaliiqa, Beettikki Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi qarra adhita, cuubbinke sarxe qaangeemmo woyite lowonta shagaggi yaanno. Ikkollana qarramasinni cubbonke hunoottohura galaxxineemmohe. Xaano Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite cubbonke aguroommona yiinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Our Holy Heavenly Father, you did not spare your only Son, but gave him up to die for us on the cross. In his name, we now ask you to send your Holy Spirit to dwell in our hearts. Lead us to trust only in your grace, and so obtain eternal life through the blood of your Son Jesus. Amen.
amh: ቅዱስ ሰማያዊ አባታችን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ፣ ስለኛ ብለህ አንዱን ልጅህን ሳትራራለት በቸርነትህ አሳልፈህ ለመስቀል ሞት ሰጠኸው። እኛ በጸጋህ እንድናምንና በልጅህ ደም የዘላለምን ሕይወት እንድናገኝ ቅዱስ መንፈስህን በልባችን ውስጥ አሳድርልን ብለን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Qulqulluu, waaqa irra kan jiraattu Abbaa keenyaa, tokkicha Ilma Keef utuu hin oo'in waa'ee keenyaaf jettee, gaarummaa Keetiin du'a fannootti dabarsitee Isa kennite. Nuyi ayyaana Keetiin akka amannuuf, dhiiga Ilma Keetiitiin jireenya bara baraa akka argannuuf Qulqulluu Hafuura Kee garaa keenya keessa nuuf bulchi, jennee, Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Haylaara nuuse adiyaara maaqe afaaka yese Wonto! Nuume hissine bidzi ne yele “Ha essi e gara ellofe” hido badi ne jhergetena garsi suxi mixi gara suxhutti e hay’oronike  ne indo. Nuni axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhetiyaafa densi nu aadexona nu miimoronikiyaara ne yele suuxuna koolo makkina yeso degexese nu oseyoronikiyaara nuuka yese ne Ayaana Geeshi osana numba durkuwa.$Haanxho uddi nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa ssiwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ሀይላረ ኑሴ አድያረ ማቄ አፋከ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኑሜ ህስኔ ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ “ሀ ኤስ ኤ ገረ ኤሎፌ” ህዶ በድ ኔ ዤርጌቴነ ገርስ ሱሥ ምሥ ገረ ሱጹት ኤ ሀይኦሮንኬ  ኔ እንዶ። ኑን አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼትያፈ ዴንስ ኑ ኣዴሦነ ኑ ሚሞሮንክያረ ኔ ዬሌ ሱሡነ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሶ ዴጌሤሴ ኑ ኦሴዮሮንክያረ ኑከ ዬሴ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ ዱርኩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Keesantaattoo iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, ni bikkina yitaa kiikka mexxo’i Beeto qishixxitoo’n ki biijoominne masqalanne lehoo’isina higissaa uwwitaatto. Neesem at uwwitti eroommanne amma’nninonaa ki Beet xiiginnem doolli hundinam hee’oo heechcha siixxinonaa «Kiikka Keesammi Ayyaana ni woda’n woronne hee’oo’isa isse» yinaa ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne keese uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti Xummaancho nii anna Magano! At niitannee yit mexxoanki beetii qishixxitu'nnaachchi masqali aleen saqalammi rehunta higissi aassiteent. Naoont kii abba aassanchaan amma'nninuntaa beetikki qegiin doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaa heechchata daqqinuntaa Xummaanchu Ayyaanakki aazeentanne ihanoga assitunta Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Qullaawa Gordu Annanke Kaaliiqa, ninkera yite Mitto Beettokki mararittokkinni shaqqillikkinni sayisse masiqalu reyora uyittosi. Ninke eltokkinni ammannammoranna Beettikki mundeenni hegere heeshsho afi'nammora Qullaawa Ayyaanakki wodaninke giddo gashshinke yine Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty and eternal God, you led your people out of the land of Egypt under the leadership of Moses and commanded them to eat the Passover every year. We ask now you to lead us out of our spiritual slavery to sin and make us partakers of the true Passover Lamb. On this day, our Lord Jesus Christ defeated death by His resurrection from the dead and opened the way for us to eternal life. Because he now lives, he will reign with you and the Holy Spirit forever. Glory and praise be to him. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል የዘላለም አምላክ ሆይ፣ ሕዝብህን በምስር አገር በሙሴ መሪነት ያወጣሃቸውና በየዓመቱ ፋሲካን እንዲበሉ ያዘዝኻቸው አንተ ነህ። እኛንም ደግሞ ከመንፈሳዊ ምስር እንድታወጣንና እውነተኛ የሆነውን ፋሲካ ተካፋዮች እንድታደርገን እንለምንሃለን። ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ደግሞ ዛሬ ሞትን በትንሣኤው ድል አደረገና ለእኛ የዘላለም ሕይወት መንገድ ከፈተልን፤ አሁንም ሕያው ሆኖአልና ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋራ እስከ ዘላለም ድረስ ይነግሣል ለእርሱ ክብርና ምስጋና ይሁን። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Gooftaa bara baraa, saba Kee Situ harka Museetiin biyya Misirii isaan baasee, waggaa waggaatti Faasikaa akka nyaatan isaan abboome; Nuunis Misir isa hafuuraa keessaa (garbummaa hafuuraa keessaa) nu baaftee hirmaattuu Faasikaa isa dhugaa ta'ee akka nu taasiftu Si kadhanna. Gooftaan keenya Yesus Kristos immoo du'a mo'atee ka'uu Isaatiin, karaa jireenya bara baraa nuuf baneera. Ammas jiraataa ta'eera; Sii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin hamma bara baraatti in mo'a, Isaaf ulfinnii fi galanni haa ta'u. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e koolo makkina yese Wonto! Ne axita Misire wudiyafa Musey durtine  etti kessi berana berana garo massala muudi u kuxoronike matay nembako. Numbani assi neera maaquwasa nu yecho yesuwafa kessi aade maaqe garo massalase shahaxe nu maaqoronikeko nemba nu shi’e.$Nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosay haybo iishi be dendosuna nuuse koolo makkina yeso oge dodhiko e yese. Hatteni en’a maaddhi be yese gisha neeran maaqqe Ayaana Geeshaara wolko koolo makki aalloko e kaate. Esuse kuxaara galataaray elluwaye. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኔ አሥተ ምስሬ ዉድየፈ ሙሴይ ዱርትኔ  ኤት ኬስ ቤረነ ቤረነ ገሮ መሰለ ሙድ ኡ ኩሦሮንኬ መተይ ኔምበኮ። ኑምበን አስ ኔረ ማቁወሰ ኑ ዬቾ ዬሱወፈ ኬስ ኣዴ ማቄ ገሮ መሰለሴ ሸሀሤ ኑ ማቆሮንኬኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰይ ሀይቦ ኢሽ ቤ ዴንዶሱነ ኑሴ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሶ ኦጌ ዶዽኮ ኤ ዬሴ። ሀቴን ኤንአ ማዽ ቤ ዬሴ ግሸ ኔረን ማቄ አያነ ጌሻረ ዎልኮ ኮሎ መክ ኣሎኮ ኤ ካቴ። ኤሱሴ ኩሣረ ገለታረይ ኤሉወዬ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo heer heerina hee’lloo Niyyanna, ki minaadaba Gibxi uulliinsi Muse’enne fissiissittokii hiinchonne hiinchonne Shaashshiqqi Ugudo lonsitona ijaajjittokii atette. Neesem uullanne yoo Gibxiinsi fissitoo’isinaa hanqo’an ihu Shaashshiga baxxamaan inkona issitoo’isinaa uunxinoommo. Ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos kaballa leho kaa’aa heer heerina hee’oo heechchina niina googo fooqaa’ukko. Kabadem lehiinsi ki’aa hee’oohan ihaa kiinninnee Keesammi Ayyaaninnee heer heerinam adil ihoo bikkina ixxena lombii galatii ihona. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti Magano! Minaadabakki Gibxi baadiichchi Muse wudiin ikki awwansit fushshitoontiihuu woggaan woggaan Shaashshiga qixxansit ittunta azzazzoontiihuu ateet. Magano! Neesin amma'nnati heechchaan he'nnumbogga assano Gibxi baadiga yoo heechchaachchi fushshit gare Shaashshigi beeqqamaannu assituntanne uuccinaanke. Ammoo Qarichchunne Yesuusu Kiristoosu kabari rehuta qeellikei nesaa doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaa heechcha woqqaa fanneei. Teesu is rehoochchi kei doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heanoo ikki kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniinii doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka wommoo'mmanotannee isii abbinnuhuu galatuhuu ihus. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu hegere Magano, mannakki Missirete gobbara Muse massaganna fushshittonsahunna diru dirunkunni Mararrote Ayyaani sagale ittanno gede hajajittonsahu Ateeti. Ninkeno qolte fajjote Missirenni fushshattonkeranna halaalaancho ikkitinota Mararrote Ayyaani sagale beeqqaano assattonkera huucci'neemmohe. Mootichu Yesuusi Kiristoosi qole techo reyo kaosinni qeele ninkera hegere heeshsho doogo faninonke. Xaano heeshshonniha ikkinona Atenna Qullaawu Ayyaani ledo hegere heeshshora moohanno. Isira ayirrinyunna galatu ikkosi. Hamii'ni.

eng: God, our heavenly Father, we thank you that your Son Jesus Christ rose from the dead and appeared to his disciples. Reveal him to us in your living Word. Help us by the power of your Holy Spirit to be witnesses of his resurrection until the end. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር ሰማያዊ አባታችን ሆይ፣ ልጅህ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ከሙታን ተነሥቶ ለደቀ መዛሙርቱ ስለ ተገለጠላቸው እናመሰግንሃለን። እርሱን ለእኛም በሕያው ቃልህ ግለጥልን። እስከ መጨረሻ የትንሣኤው ምስክሮች እንድንሆን በቅዱስ መንፈስህ ኃይል እርዳን። በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa waaqa irraa, Yesus Kristos Ilmi Kee warra du'an keessaa ka'ee bartoota Isaatti waan mul'ateef Si galateeffanna. Jiraataa dubbii Keetiin Isa nuttis mul'isi. Hamma dhumaatti dhuga baatuu du'aa ka'uu Isaa akka taanuuf nu gargaari; Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nuuse ade afaaka yese Wonto! Ne yele Yesuusi Kristosay haybowafa dendi be erusichoshituse e addeydo gisha nemba galatako nu galate. Esa nuusen en’a maaqe ne katona addusuwa. Aallcira aallo ne aadexose ato nu maaqoronike ne Ayaana Geeshi osana numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑሴ አዴ አፋከ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰይ ሀይቦወፈ ዴንድ ቤ ኤሩስቾሽቱሴ ኤ አዴይዶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ። ኤሰ ኑሴን ኤንአ ማቄ ኔ ከቶነ አዱሱወ። ኣልጭረ ኣሎ ኔ ኣዴሦሴ አቶ ኑ ማቆሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoos lehiinsi ki’aa ixxi losaanina moo’amu bikkina keese galaxxinoommuulla. Ixxom niina ki sagarinne caakkise. Lasaanchi afeebe’e ixxi lehiinsi kichchi bikkina kulloommi keen inkoommisina ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti nii anna Magano! Beetukki Yesuusu Kiristoosu rehoochchi kei awwanaanniihank lalleehannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Hittigunta isu heechcha laagakki wudiin nesaanka caakkisinne. Ammoo zakkaanchu iillanqaxeechchin Yesuusu rehoochchi keoga naqqansan he'nnunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llituntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Gordu Annanke, Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi reyotenni kae rosaanosira leellinonsahura galaxxineemmohe. Iso ninkera heeshshonnihu qaalikkinni xawisinke. Goofimarchu geeshsha Kaote farci'raano ikkinammora Qullaawu Ayyaanikki wolqanni kaa'linke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty and eternal God, we thank you with all our heart for bringing us to the celebration of the feast of the Resurrection. Give us faith in the forgiving word of the cross. Cleanse us from sin and give us power to walk in newness of life. In the name of your only Son, Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል የዘላለም አምላክ ሆይ፣ እነሆ፣ የትንሣኤን በዓል ለማክበር ስላደረሰኸን ከልባችን እናመሰግንሃለን። በየልባችን የመስቀሉን ቃል ተቀብለን ዕለት ዕለት ከኃጢአት እንድንነጻና በአዲስ ሕይወት እንድንመላለስ እርዳን። ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋር ለዘላለም በሚኖርና በሚነግሥ በአንዱ ልጅህ በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Gooftaa bara baraa, kunoo ayyaana du'aa ka'uu ayyaaneffachuudhaan waan nu geesseef garaa keenya guutuu Si galateeffanna. Yaada yaada keenyatti dubbii Fannoo Isaatii fudhannee, guyyaa guyyaatti cubbuu keenyattii akka qulloofnu, jireenya haaraattis akka adeemnuuf nu gargaari, Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristos Isa Sii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin bara baraan jiraatuu fi mo'uutiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e koolo makkina yese Wonto! Garda wonte Kristosa denxo massala nu kuxoronike numba ne mato gisha nemba nu muxhurowafa kessiko nu galate.$Nu muxhurowa muxhurowa suxi mixi kato etti wontana wontana cubbowafa nu geejhoronikiyaara kille yeso nu yesoronikiyaara numba maruwa. Neerani maaqqe Ayaana Geeshaara wolko koolo makki aallo yesesaara kaatesaara maaqe bidzi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ገርደ ዎንቴ ክርስቶሰ ዴንሦ መሰለ ኑ ኩሦሮንኬ ኑምበ ኔ መቶ ግሸ ኔምበ ኑ ሙጹሮወፈ ኬስኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ኑ ሙጹሮወ ሙጹሮወ ሱሥ ምሥ ከቶ ኤት ዎንተነ ዎንተነ ጩቦወፈ ኑ ጌዦሮንክያረ ክሌ ዬሶ ኑ ዬሶሮንክያረ ኑምበ መሩወ። ኔረን ማቄ አያነ ጌሻረ ዎልኮ ኮሎ መክ ኣሎ ዬሴሳረ ካቴሳረ ማቄ ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo heer heerinam hee’lloo ni Waa’a! Oono’o, lehiinsi Kichchi Ugudo lonsinona afissitti bikkina keese ni wodaniinsi ki’insaa galaxxinoommo. Neese annannichchim ni wodanonne ni bikkina yaa saqalamaa neese baaxiiliinsi muccussu ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos haareechchi heechchanne ballina ballina daba’llammoommisina hara’mme. Kiinninnee Keesammi Ayyaaninnee maqirem heer heerina hee’oohaanninnee adil ihoo mexxo’i ki Beet Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaantina doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaanti Magano! Yesuusi Kiristoosu rehoochchi keo bari abbiseenno ayyaani bari iillissoontinnehannii wozaniichchinne keins galaxxinaanke. Naoot horunkunne / gu'mmunku'nne kii masqali laagata aaqqin bareen bareen baaxiiliichchinne muccunnuntaa haaroo heechchaan he'nnuntaa kaa'llituntanne kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniin bargammi doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heanona wommoo'mmano mexxoanki beeto Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu hegere Magano, kuneeti, Kaote Ayyaana ayirrisate iillishoottonke daafira wodaninkenni galaxxineemmohe. Wodani wodaninkenni masiqalu qaale adhine barru barrunkunni cubbinkewiinni keeraa'minammoranna haaro heeshshonni ha'rammammora kaa'linke. Atenna Qullaawu Ayyaani ledo hegerera hee'rannohunninna moohannohunni Mittu Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, we thank you for saving our sinful world through the resurrection of your Son Jesus Christ from the dead. In his name, help us by the power of your Holy Spirit so that we may always hold fast to you in faith and be saved from eternal death, to become partakers of eternal joy with all believers. Amen.
amh: ልዑል እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ በልጅህ ውርደት በኃጢአት የወደቀችውን ዓለም ስለ አስነሣሃትና ስለ አዳንሃት እናመሰግሃለን። እኛ ሁልጊዜ በአንተ እንጸና ዘንድና ከዘላለም ሞት እንድን ዘንድ ከምእመናን ሁሉ ጋር የዘላለምን ደስታ ተካፋዮችም እንሆን ዘንድ በቅዱስ መንፈስህ ኃይል እንድትረዳን እንለምንሃለን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa gararraa kan jiraattu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, biyya lafaa cubbuudhaan kufe gadi of-deebisuu Ilma Keetiitiin kaaftee waan fayyifteef Si galateeffanna. Nuyi yeroo hundumaa Sitti akka jabaannuuf, du'a bara baraas akka oofkalluuf, amantoota hundumaa wajjinis hirmaattuu gammachuu jireenya bara baraa akka taanuuf nu gargaari jennee Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Kaate maaqe Wonto! Ne yele yowena cubbona undecha ha saha wokke ne denso gisha nemba galatako nu galate. Uddi woga neena nu miimoronikiyaara koolo makkina haybowafa nu attoronikiyaara numba maruwa. Koolo makkina yese magga shahaxe nu maaqoronike ne Ayaana Geeshi osana numba kiidhuwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ካቴ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኔ ዬሌ ዮዌነ ጩቦነ ኡንዴቸ ሀ ሰሀ ዎኬ ኔ ዴንሶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ። ኡድ ዎገ ኔነ ኑ ሚሞሮንክያረ ኮሎ መክነ ሀይቦወፈ ኑ አቶሮንክያረ ኑምበ መሩወ። ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ መገ ሸሀሤ ኑ ማቆሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ ኪዹወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Adil ni Moollanni Waa’a, ki Beet ixxi gaga heeshaa’imminne baaxiilinne ubu uulla ixxi kollinne ki’issitti bikkinaa gatissitti bikkinaa keese galaxxinoommo. Neese hundi ammanem keesenne qoxxinoommisina, heer heer lehiinsi gantoommisinaa amma’nnaan hundinnem heer heerina hee’oo liirancha baxxammoommi keen inkoommisinaa ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nii Qarichcho Magano! Beetukki Yesuusu Kiristoosu hawwa aaqqiyan baaxiiliichchi keoo bushsho uulla ali minaadaba rehoochchi keissi faissoontihannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Naoont horanta jaata kesaan qaanni he'nnuntaa doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka ikkaa rehoochchi fa'nnuntaa ammoo amma'nnaanniin horiinin doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka ikkaa bajigo beeqqamaannu inkuntaa Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Roore Kaaliiqa Maganonke, Beettikki shollimmanni cubbunni ubbino alame kayisoottohuranna gatisoottosehura galaxxineemmohe. Ninke wo'manka woyite Atenni kaajjineemmo gedenna hegere reyonni ganteemmo gede ammanaano baalante ledo hegere hagiirri beeqqaano ikkineemmo gede Qullaawu Ayyaanikki wolqanni kaa'lattonkera huucci'neemmohe. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'miini. Hamii'ni.

eng: God our Heavenly Father, you are the one who rules the hearts of all believers and gives them unity with your Holy Spirit. Help all of us who are walking in this world, which is passing away, to rest our hearts in Jesus and so set our minds on the world that will not pass away. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሰማያዊ አባት እግዚአብሔር ሆይ፣ በምእመናን ሁሉ ልብ የምትገዛና በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ አንድነትን የምትሰጣቸው አንተ ነህ። ስለዚህ እኛ በምታልፈው ዓለም የምንመላለስ ሁላችን ተስፋ የሰጠኸንን የማታልፈውን ዓለም እንድናስብ ልባችን በሰማይ እንዲያርፍ እርዳን ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
