gaz: Waaqa irra kan jiraattu yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa, yaada garaa amantoota hundumaa keessatti kan mo'u fi Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin tokkummaa kan isaaniif kennu Si'i. Egaa biyya lafaa isa darbu keessa kan deddeebinu hundi keenya gara isa hin darbinee biyya Ati nu abdachiifte akka yaadnu, yaadni keenyas waaqa irratti akka boqotuuf nu gargaari. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nuuse ade maaqe afaakka yese Wonto! Aadexeesiti muxhurowaka yessi uso ahesa maaddhi Ayaana Geeshuna bizeto inday nembako. Ye e gisha dhaddi gare saha gara yese nuni uddi dhaddi garese danda’uwa Yerusalaame nu maxoronike nu muxhuroni afaaka nu mahoronike numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑሴ አዴ ማቄ አፋከ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኣዴሤስት ሙጹሮወከ ዬስ ኡሶ አሄሰ ማዽ አያነ ጌሹነ ብዜቶ እንደይ ኔምበኮ። ዬ ኤ ግሸ ዸድ ገሬ ሰሀ ገረ ዬሴ ኑን ኡድ ዸድ ገሬሴ ደንደኡወ ዬሩሰላሜ ኑ መሦሮንኬ ኑ ሙጹሮን አፋከ ኑ መሆሮንኬ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, amma’nnaa’n wodanonne adil ikkaa gassittuuyyi Keesammi Ayyaaninne mateeyyooma uwwitoottok atette. Ee bikkina neese ka higoo uullanne hee’nnummuuyyi niina hundinam higoobee’i uullina neeyyato uwwitti higoobee’i uulla sawwinoommisina niikki tiirim iima’n uullanne usheexxoo’isina hara’mmitona ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti anna Magano! Horaanka / gu'mmaanka amma'nnaanni wozanaan ikki awwansitaantiihuu Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki mexxoomata aassitaantissaahuu ateet. Hikkannii higgaa ta uulla aleen fanqalaa'llammaammiru horunkunne / gu'mmunku'nne tassaa aassitoontinne higgumbuta samee wommoomata sawwinunta ammoo wozanaantanne kiiba sawwinan foolooccinunta kaa'llinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Gordu Anna Kaaliiqa, ammanaano baalate wodanira heedhe gashshattohunna Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni mittimma aattonsahu Ateeti. Konnira ninke sa'anno alame giddo ha'rammeemmori baalu hexxo oottonketa sa'annokki alame hendammora wodaninke gordoho fooliishshi'ranno gede Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: O merciful and gracious God, you are the one who guides all on the path of truth by the light of your Word. Bring back those who have strayed from your truth. Give your grace to all who call on the name of Christ, to leave the evil and follow the good. Protect your children from this evil world by your Word and your Holy Spirit, and grant them eternal life in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: መሐሪና ጸጋ ሰጪ አምላካችን ሆይ፣ የእውነትን መንገድ ስተው የሚሄዱትን ሁሉ በእውነትህ ብርሃን ወደ እውነት የምትመልሳቸው አንተ ነህና አሁንም የክርስቶስን ስም የሚጠሩ ሁሉ ክፉውን ትተው መልካሙን እንዲከተሉ ጸጋህን ስጣቸው። ከዚህ ከፉ ዓለም ልጆችህን በቃልህና በቅዱስ መንፈስህ ዘወትር እየጠበቅህ ወደ ዘላለማዊ ሕይወት አግባቸው። ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ስትል። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Isa araaraa fi ayyaana namaaf kennitu, namoota karaa isa dhugaa irraa kaatan Ati ifa dhugaa Keetiin gara dhugaatti in deebista. Ammas Maqaa Kristos kan waammatan hundinuu isa hamaa dhiisanii isa gaarii duukaa akka bu'aniif ayyaana Kee isaaniif kenni. Dubbii Keetii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin biyya lafaa isa hamaa kana ijoollee Kee irraa yeroo hundumaa eegii jireenya bara baraatti isaan galchi, Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Wonto! Axe maaresaara axuse modhe maxo ne kengesafa densi ingo inge Wontowaaray nembako. Aade oge halli hangeesita uddi aade maaqe fo’ena fo’iya mahesi nembako. Hatteni Kristosa sunxe xheygeesiti uddi iita dhaddi modhe geede hamoronike axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhetena mahuwa. Ha saha iita garafa ne nayshe ne katonaara ne Ayaana Geeshunaara uddi wogga katti koolo makkina yesuwaka gelsuwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ዎንቶ! አሤ ማሬሳረ አሡሴ ሞዼ መሦ ኔ ኬንጌሰፈ ዴንስ እንጎ እንጌ ዎንቶዋረይ ኔምበኮ። ኣዴ ኦጌ ሀል ሀንጌስተ ኡድ ኣዴ ማቄ ፎኤነ ፎእየ መሄስ ኔምበኮ። ሀቴን ክርስቶሰ ሱንሤ ጼይጌስት ኡድ ኢተ ዸድ ሞዼ ጌዴ ሀሞሮንኬ አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼቴነ መሁወ። ሀ ሰሀ ኢተ ገረፈ ኔ ነይሼ ኔ ከቶናረ ኔ አያነ ጌሹናረ ኡድ ዎገ ከት ኮሎ መክነ ዬሱወከ ጌልሱወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Adil Niyyanni Waa’a, hanqo’i googiinsi huushanta’a mattam keeno hundam ki hanqo’i caakkinne hanqi googonne dabattoottok atette. Kabadem Kiristoos summa weeshoo keen hundim jor luwwa uraa er luwwa awwonoo’isina ki anceeta uwwe. Ka jor uulliinsi ki ooso ki sagarinnee ki Keesammi Ayyaaninnee amman hundam egettittuuyyi heer heerina hee’oo ki mine aagissoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommuulla. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Faun yitaantina aassancha aassitaanti nii Magano! Gare woqqaa luussi orootaara horanka / gu'mmanka gare caakkiintakki garekkiba fanqashshitaantii kees ikkoontitannee teesuu Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mma gaitaaru horunku / gu'mmunku hiilarra assu agurti bareedarra assitunta abba aassanchakki aassissa. Ammoo ka hiila uulla ali heechchaachchi oosukki laagaantakkii Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakkii horanta jaata qorabban doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaa heechchaba iillissuntassa Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Maarattohunna elto aattohu Maganonke, halaali doogo sodhe hadhanno baala halaalu caabbichikkinni halaalunniwa qolattonsahu Ateetina xaano Kiristoosi su'ma woshshitanno baali bunshe agurte danchumma ha'runsitara eltokki uyinsa. Tenne busha alamewiinni oosokki qaalikkinninna Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni wo'manka woyite agartanni hegere heeshshowa massinsa. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Our kind and loving God, we thank you for hearing and answering our prayers. We pray to you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, trusting that you will grant us our requests as we ask in faith according to your will. Amen.
amh: ጸሎት /ከብሉይ ኪዳን ንባብ አስቀድሞ የሚጸለይ/። ቸርና አፍቃሪ አምላካችን ሆይ፣ ለምኑ ይሰጣችሁማል፣ ፈልጉ ታገኙማላችሁ፣ መዝጊያ አንኳኩ ይከፈትላችሁማል ብለህ ቃል የገባህልን አምላክ፣ የእኛን ጸሎት ስምተህ ስለምትመልስልን እናመሰግንሃለን። አሁንም እንደ ፈቃድህ በእምነት ስንለምን ልመናችንን እንድትፈጽምልን ተስፋ አድርገን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Arjaa fi jaalala qabeessa kan taate Waaqayyoo keenyaa, kadhadhaa isiniif kennamaa, barbaadaa in argattuu, balbala rukutaa isiniif banamaa, jettee waadaa kan nuuf galte Waaqayyo, kadhata keenya dhageessee waan nuuf deebistuuf Si galateeffanna. Ammas akka fedha Keetti amantiidhaan yommuu Si kadhannu, kadhata keenya akka nuuf raawwaattu abdannee Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Eehaara jherguwaara keenge nu Wonto! “Shi’uwayte, hinuse inguttoko e ingutte. Worguwayte, degexako hi degexe. Gasa doluwayte do’uttoko e do’utte.” hidi numba gobbussay nembako.$Nu shi’e siidi e utta nuuse ne mahe gisha nemba galatako nu galate. Hatteni ne maxoke nuuse mahoko ne mahe hidi gobbisine nemba nu shi’esa nuuse ne mahoronikeko haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኤሃረ ዤርጉዋረ ኬንጌ ኑ ዎንቶ! “ሽኡወይቴ፥ ህኑሴ እንጉቶኮ ኤ እንጉቴ። ዎርጉወይቴ፥ ዴጌሠኮ ህ ዴጌሤ። ገሰ ዶሉወይቴ ዶኡቶኮ ኤ ዶኡቴ።” ህድ ኑምበ ጎቡሰይ ኔምበኮ።$ኑ ሽኤ ሲድ ኤ ኡተ ኑሴ ኔ መሄ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ። ሀቴን ኔ መሦኬ ኑሴ መሆኮ ኔ መሄ ህድ ጎብስኔ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ኑሴ ኔ መሆሮንኬኮ ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Biijaalli neese iittitoo Waa’a! «Xa’mmehe, ki’nnuwwina uwwamookko. Hassehe, siiddakkamo. Goocanne uullitakka’a weeshshehe, ki’nnuwwinam fooqookko» yitaa niina sagara aaggitti Waa’i ni uunxato macceessaa dabattoo bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Kabadem ki doo’llisa amma’nnatinne uunxinoommaare neese uunxinummi luwwa issitoo’isa neeyyato issinaa ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Iittitaantinne biiza nii Magano! At «Uucciyye aassamanokki'nne; hashshiyye daqqiteenta; gooca qocciyye fanamanokki'nne» yit laagata aaggoontinne Maganu nii uusatunta maccoot fanqashshitaantinnehannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Hittigunta teesuu kii sawwittiga amma'nnatiin uuccinaanke jaata uusatunne maccootaantiga tassaa assin Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Shaqqadonna baxillaancho Maganonke, huuccidhe uyinanni'nena, hasidhe afidhinannina, woshidhe fannanni'nena yite qaale eoottonke Magano, ninke huuccatto macciishshite dawarattonkehura galaxxineemmohe. Xaano fajjokki gede amma'natenni huucci'neemmo huuccattonke wonshattonkera hexxo assi'ne Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, grant to all of us who believe in our ascended Savior Jesus Christ that we will live with him in heaven. Lord Jesus Christ, you who live and reign with the Father and the Holy Spirit, you defeated the power of death and sin and redeemed us, opening for us the door of heaven. Free us from sin and make us heirs of eternal life. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል እግዚአብሔር አምላክ ሆይ፣ ወደ ሰማይ ባረገው በመድኃኒታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ የምናምን ሁላችን ከእርሱ ጋር በሰማይ ለመኖር እንድታበቃን እንለምንሃለን። ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋር ለመንገሥና ለመኖር የሚችል ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ የሞትን ኃይልና ኃጢአትን ድል አድርጎ እኛን ዋጀን። የመንግሥተ ሰማይ በር ከፈተልን፤ ከኃጢአት ነጽተን የዘላለም ሕይወት ወራሾች እንድንሆን ታበቃን ዘንድ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, Isa gara waaqaatti ol ba'e Fayyisaa keenya Yesus Kristositti kan amannu hunduma keenya Isaa wajjin waaqa irra jiraachuudhaan akka nu geessu Si kadhanna. Yesus Kristos Inni Sii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin bara baraan jiraatuu fi mo'u, aangoo du'aa fi cubbuu mo'uudhaan nu fureera. Mootummaa Waaqaas nuuf baneera. Nuyis cubbuuttii qulloofnee warra jireenya bara baraa argatan akka taanuuf akka ittiin nu geessu maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e Wonto! Dhaddi afaa kessa nu dhale maaqe Yesuusi Kristosa aadexiyaaka yese uddi nuni esaara wolko afaa yesese nu danda’oronike numba ne marorosako nemba nu shi’e. Neerani maaqqe Ayaana Geeshaara wolko kaatesaara yesesaara danda’e Yesuusi Kristosay haybo osaara cubbowaara iishi numba e wozzo. Afa kaatete gasa nuuse e dodho. Cubbowafa geejjhi koolo makkina yeso shaxe nu maaqoronike numba ne ellusoronike haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ዎንቶ! ዸድ አፋ ኬሰ ኑ ዸሌ ማቄ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ኣዴሥያከ ዬሴ ኡድ ኑን ኤሳረ ዎልኮ አፋ ዬሴሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኑምበ ኔ መሮሮሰኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ። ኔረን ማቄ አያነ ጌሻረ ዎልኮ ካቴሳረ ዬሴሳረ ደንደኤ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰይ ሀይቦ ኦሳረ ጩቦዋረ ኢሽ ኑምበ ኤ ዎዞ። አፈ ካቴቴ ገሰ ኑሴ ኤ ዶዾ። ጩቦወፈ ጌዥ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሶ ሸሤ ኑ ማቆሮንኬ ኑምበ ኔ ኤሉሶሮንኬ ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo ni Moollanni Waa’a, iimane maru ni Qaraar Yesuus Kiristoosanne amma’nninummi keen hundim ixxenne maqirem iimanenne hee’nnoommi keen issitoo’isina uunxinoommuulla. Kiinninnee ki Keesammi Ayyaaninnee maqirem adillano aa’eenaa hee’eenaa xanoo ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos leh malaayyee baaxiiloo kaa’aa neese gatisukko. Iima’n adilla’n goocam niina fooqaa’ukko; neesem baaxiiliinsi muccullaa heer heerina hee’oo heechcha siixxinoommi keen inkoommisa issitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti Qarichcho Magano! Samaa fullo zabboanne Yesuusi Kiristoosaan amma'nninaammi horunkunne / gu'mmunku'nne isiinin bargammi samaan he'nnunta iillisinne. Kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniinii bargammi wommoo'mmanona heano Yesuusu Kiristoosu rehutaa baaxiili maqoohaa qeelli nees wojjeenne. Samee wommoomanta aasseenne. Hikkannii baaxiiliichchinne muccunni doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaa heechchata ragaisiisinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu Kaaliiqa Magano, gordo fulinoha Mootichanke Yesuusa Kiristoosa ammannoommo baali Isi ledo gordoho hee'rate iillishattonkera huucci'neemmohe. Atenna Qullaawu Ayyaani ledo moohatenna hee'ra dandaannohu Yesuusi Kiristoosi reyote wolqanna cubbo qeele ninke woxxinke. Gordu gashshooti waalcho faninke; cubbo keeraa'mine hegere heeshsho ragi'raano ikkineemmo gede assattonkera Mootichu Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord our God, we thank you for enlightening and comforting the hearts of believers with your Holy Spirit. Help us by your Spirit to think only of what is right and true. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns with you and the Holy Spirit, one God forever and ever. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ በቅዱስ መንፈስህ የምእመናንን ልብ ስለ አበራህላቸውና ስለ አጽናናሃቸው እናመሰግንሃለን። አሁንም እኛ ቅን የሆነውን ነገር ለማሰብ እንድንችል በመንፈስህ እርዳን። በእርሱም መጽናናት ደስ እያለን እንድንኖር አብቃን ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋር በሚነግሥና በአንድ አምላክነት ከዘላለም እስከ ዘላለም ድረስ በሚኖር በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, yaada garaa amantootaa Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin waan isaaniif ibsiteef, waan isaan jajjabeessiteef Si galateeffanna. Ammas waan qajeelaa ta'e yaaduu akka dandeenyuuf Hafuura Keetiin nu gargaari. Jajjabeessuu Isaattis gammannee akka jiraannuuf Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristos Isa Sii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin mo'uu fi Isa Waaqayyummaa tokkotti bara baraa hamma bara baraatti jiraatuutiin nuuf dhaga'i. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nuuse ade! Nu Wonto! Aadexesiti muxhurowa ne fadho gishaara ne minso gishaara nemba galatako nu galate.$Hatteni gizo maaqe zeere maxese nu danda’oronike ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba maruwa. Ayaana Geeshi minxe minxona maggisine nu yesoronike numba mahuwa. Neerani maaqqe Ayaana Geeshaara wolko kaatesara neera bidzi Wonto maaddhi koolo koolo aallo yesesaara maaqe Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑሴ አዴ! ኑ ዎንቶ! ኣዴሤስት ሙጹሮወ ኔ ፈዾ ግሻረ ኔ ምንሶ ግሻረ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ሀቴን ግዞ ማቄ ዜሬ መሤሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ መሩወ። አያነ ጌሽ ምንሤ ምንሦነ መግስኔ ኑ ዬሶሮንኬ ኑምበ መሁወ። ኔረን ማቄ አያነ ጌሻረ ዎልኮ ካቴሰረ ኔረ ብድዝ ዎንቶ ማዽ ኮሎ ኮሎ ኣሎ ዬሴሳረ ማቄ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Waa’a, ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne amma’nnaa’nneka wodano caakkissitti bikkinaa qoxxisitti bikkinaa keese galaxxinoommo. Kabadem neese xabbeen ihu luwwa sawwineena xannoommisina at niina hara’mme. Ixxi qoxxisoo qoxxishshannem liirammummuuyyi hee’nnoommisina xansiissoo’isina kiinninnee Keesammi Ayyaaninnee maqire adil ihoohaannonnee mexxo’i waa’oominne heer heerina hee’oo ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nii Qarichcho Magano! Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki amma'nnaanni wozana caakkissoontihanniihaa qaarsitoontihanniihaa abbins galaxxinaanke. Teesuu naoot xabbeena ikkora sawwinunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llinne. Hittigunta is kaa'llaniyanne bajiqqamman he'nnunta iillisinne yinan kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniinii bargammi wommoo'mmanona mexxo Maganoomaan doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heano Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Magano, Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni ammanaanote wodana xawisoottonsahuranna sheshifachishoottonsahura galaxxinemmohe. Xaano ninke suwashsho ikkino coye heda dandiineemmo gede Ayyaanikkinni kaa'linke. Isi sheshifachishannino tashshi yaannanke hee'rate iillishinke; Atenna Qullaawu Ayyaani ledo moohannohunninna mitte maganimmanni hegere hegerera hee'rannohunni Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Lord, our God, King of heaven and earth, we thank you for giving your only Son, our Lord Jesus Christ, to be our Savior. Holy Spirit, our God, we thank you for keeping us safe from the evil of this world and guiding us to walk in the path of holiness. Hear our prayers and accept our praise in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: የሰማይና የምድር ንጉሥ እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ አንዱን ልጅህን ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን አዳኛችን እንዲሆን ስለ ሰጠኸን እናመሰግንሃለን። መንፈስ ቅዱስ አምላካችን ሆይ፣ ከዚህች ዓለም ክፋት እየጠበቅኸንና በቅድስና ጎዳና እንድንሄድ እየመራኸን ዘወትር አጽናኛችን ሆነህ ስለምታኖረን እናመሰግንሃለን። እኛም የምናቀርብልህን ውዳሴያችንን ትቀበለን ዘንድ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Mootii waaqaa fi lafaa, Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, tokkicha Ilma Kee Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin Fayyisaa Keenya akka ta'uuf waan nuuf ergiteef Si galateeffanna. Yaa Gooftaa keenyaa Hafuura Qulqullu, jal'ina biyya lafaa kanaattii nu eegdee, karaa qajeelaa irra akka adeemnuuf nu geggeessitee, yeroo hundumaa nu jajjabeessitee waan nu jiraachiftuuf Si galateeffanna. Galata nuyi siif dhi'eessinus akka nuuf fudhattuuf Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Afaseni sahaseni kaate maaqe Wonto! Bidzi ne yele Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa numba e loolusorosa ne anso gisha nemba galatako nu galate.$Nu Wonto maaqe Ayaana Geesho! Ha saha iitete garafa kakkisiniyara haylooma ogiyaka nu hamoronike durkisiniyaara uddi wogga numba minxesa maaddhi ne gade gisha galatay nemba elluwaye. Neese nu uquse galata ne eforonike haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: አፈሴን ሰሀሴን ካቴ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ኑምበ ኤ ሎሉሶሮሰ ኔ አንሶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ኑ ዎንቶ ማቄ አያነ ጌሾ! ሀ ሰሀ ኢቴቴ ገረፈ ከክስንየረ ሀይሎመ ኦግየከ ኑ ሀሞሮንኬ ዱርክስንያረ ኡድ ዎገ ኑምበ ምንሤሰ ማዽ ኔ ገዴ ግሸ ገለተይ ኔምበ ኤሉወዬ። ኔሴ ኑ ኡቁሴ ገለተ ኔ ኤፎሮንኬ ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimaninaa uullinaa adil ikkitti ni Moollanni Waa’a, kiikka mexxo’i Beeto ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoosa neese gatisaanchi issitaa uwwitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Ni Moollanni Keesammi Ayyaana, ka uulli jolliinsi neese egettittuuyyii keesamaakkoo googonne malloommisina awwonsittuuyyii amman hundam neese qoxxisaanchi ikkaa hee’issoo bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Odim neese hincaa’nnoommi galata aa’lloo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Sameena uulla Qarichchu ikkoonti nii Qarichcho Magano! Mexxukki beetu Qarichchu Yesuusi Kiristoosa faisaanchunne assit aassitoontinnehannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Nii Maganu ikkoonti Xummaancho Ayyaana! Nees ta uulla ali hiila hujeechchi qorabbanii muccurimaan he'nnunta xabbeena woqqaan awwansitanii horanta jaata qaarsaanchunne ikki heissaantinnetannee galaxxinaanke. Naoont aassinaanke galati aaqqitunta Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Gordunna baattote Moote Kaaliiqa Maganonke, mitto Beettokki Mootichanke Yesuusa Kiristoosa Gatisaanchonke ikkanno gede oottonkehura galaxxineemmohe. Qullaawa Ayyaana Maganonke, tenne alame bunshewiinni agaranninke qullaawa doogora ha'neemmo gede massagganninke wo'manka woyite sheshifachishaanchonke ikkite worattonke daafira galaxxineemmohe. Ninkeno shiqishi'neemmoheha guweenyanke adhattora Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Our living and eternal God, we thank you for giving us your Holy Spirit to help and guide us in our life and ministry. We pray that in your holy church, built on the foundation of apostles and prophets, the gifts of the Holy Spirit may work according to your will, for your honor and for the edification of all believers. Inspire us to humble service, so that these gifts will not be a reason for us to boast, but a reason for all people to glory in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሕያውና ዘላለማዊ አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ፣ በሕይወታችንና በአገልግሎታችን የሚረዳንና የሚመራን መንፈስ ቅዱስህን ስለሰጠኸን እናመሰግንሃለን። በሐዋሪያትና በነቢያት መሠረት ላይ በታነጸችው ቅድስት ቤተ ክርስቲያንህ ውስጥ የመንፈስ ቅዱስ ስጦታዎች እንዳንተ ፈቃድ፣ ለአንተ ክብርና ለምዕመናን ሁሉ መታነጽ እንዲሠሩ ታደርግልን ዘንድ እንጸልያለን። የመንፈስ ቅዱስ ስጦታዎች ያንተ ክብር መገለጫዎች እንጂ ለሰዎች መታበያ ምክንያቶች እንዳይሆኑም በፍርሀትህ ተቆጣጠረን። በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Jiraataa bara baraa kan taate, yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, jireenya keenyaa fi tajaajila keenya irratti kan nu geggeessu Hafuura Qulqulluu Kee waan nuuf kenniteef Si galateeffanna. Hundee ergamootaa fi raajotaa irratti kan dhaabatte Waldaa Kristaanaa Kee ishee qulqullooftuu keessatti kennaawwan Hafuura Qulqulluu akka fedha Keetti, ulfina Kee fi cimina amantoota hundaaf akka hojjetu akka nuuf taasiftuuf Si kadhanna. Kennaawwan Hafuura Qulqulluu ulfinni Kee kan ittiin mul'atu malee, of-tuulummaa namootaaf sababa akka hin taaneefis sodaa Keetiin nu to'adhu. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: En’a maaqe koolo makkina yese Wonto! Nu yesonani maaqqe nu maronani numba durke Ayaana Geeshe nuuse ne indo gisha nemba galatako nu galate. Anxuttaasitaara kaayaxitaaray kaasho kaacho gara keexhuttiya yese hayla maaqe ne zawa Ayaana Geeshi ingoy ne maxoke ne kuxasaara aadexesita uddi dicheshaara u hantoronike ne mahorosako nemba nu shi’e.$Ayaana Geeshi ingiti ne kuxa fuulay aba maaqesa addusesako baaka axiti esuna nashuttesa e maaquwanike neni naddhi numba beewa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኤንአ ማቄ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኑ ዬሶነን ማቄ ኑ መሮነን ኑምበ ዱርኬ አያነ ጌሼ ኑሴ ኔ እንዶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ። አንሡታስታረ ካየሥታረይ ካሾ ካቾ ገረ ኬጹትየ ዬሴ ሀይለ ማቄ ኔ ዘወ አያነ ጌሽ እንጎይ ኔ መሦኬ ኔ ኩሠሳረ ኣዴሤስተ ኡድ ድቼሻረ ኡ ሀንቶሮንኬ ኔ መሆሮሰኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$አያነ ጌሽ እንግት ኔ ኩሠ ፉለይ አበ ማቄሰ አዱሴሰኮ ባከ አሥት ኤሱነ ነሹቴሰ ኤ ማቁወንኬ ኔን ነዽ ኑምበ ቤወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Heer heerina hee’lloo ni Moollanni Waa’a, ni heechchannee ni awwaadonnee niina hara’mmookkokaa neese awwonsoo ki Keesammi Ayyaanaa niina uwwitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Asse’amaa’nnaannonnee hiraagaa’n shooho’onnee baxamu keesamaakkoo amma’nnaa’n wixxixxi mi’n woronne Keesammi Ayyaa’n uwwanchuwwi ki doo’llisanne ki lombinaa amma’nnaan hundim qoxxoo’isinaa baxamoo’isa issitoo’isina keese uunxinoommo. Keesammi Ayyaa’n uwwanchi ki lombi moo’amoo keeno bagaan manni bolximmina ihoo mashka’a ihoobee’isa neese keese baddinoommisa issitaa allaattoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Heaantina doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka yoonti nii Qarichcho Magano! Heechchaantannee kaa'llinaammi kaalatoontannee maqoo aassi kaa'llanonnena awwansanonne Xummaanchu Ayyaanakki aassitoontinnehannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Soqqamaannina hiraagaanni roshsha shooho aleen shoohammo amma'nnaanni maabarikki aazeen Xummaancho Ayyaani aassanchu kii sawwittigiin kii abbinnihaa amma'nnaanni qaarimaahaa ihunta uuccinaanke. Xummaancho Ayyaani aassanchaakkat kii abbinni xuudissaahaarra. Naoot gaginnne abbinnii assin bolxiin ta'mminumbogga qorabinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Heeshshonnihunna hegerehu Maganonke Kaaliiqa, heeshshonkeranna soqqanshonkera kaa'lannonkehanna massagannonkeha Qullaawa Ayyaanakki oottonkehura galaxxineemmohe. Soqqamaanotenna himanaanote xinti aana safantinotera qullaawa beetekiristaane giddo Qullaawu Ayyaani afansha Ate hedo gede, Ate ayirrinyiranna ammanaano baalate xintamara loossanno gede assattonkera huucci'neemmohe. Qullaawu Ayyaani afanshi Ate ayirrinye leellishannoha ikkara ikkinnina mannu naaxxara kaima ikkannokki gede Ate waajjillinni agarinke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord our God, Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, glory be to you! It is your will that all who believe in your Son, and are your children through holy baptism, be filled with the Holy Spirit. Lord, make us strong Christians, your sons and daughters, visible witnesses of the fruit of the Spirit in our lives. We pray in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, who died and redeemed us with his blood, that you will always help us by the power of the Holy Spirit to grow towards your holiness and to put away the works of the flesh. Amen.
amh: የጌታችን የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ አባት እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ በልጅህ አምነው በቅዱስ ጥምቀት የአንተ ልጆች የሆኑ ምዕመናን ሁሉ በመንፈስ ቅዱስ እንዲሞሉ የአንተ ፈቃድ ስለሆነ ክብር ለአንተ ይሁን። አቤቱ እንደተለወጡ ክርስቲያኖች፣ ወንዶችና ሴቶች ልጆችህ የመንፈስ ፍሬ በሕይወታችን የሚታይ ምስክሮችህ ታድርገን ዘንድ እንጸልያለን። የሥጋን ሥራ እያስወገድን ወደ ቅድስናህ የምናድግ እንድንሆን በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይል ዘወትር እንድታግዘን፣ ሞቶልን በደሙ በገዛን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንጸልያለን። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristos, amantoota Ilma Keetti amananii Cuuphaadhaan ijoollee Kee ta'an, hundinuu Hafuura Qulqulluudhaan akka guutamaniif fedha Kee waan ta'eef ulfinni Siif haa ta'u. Akka Kristaanota jijjiiramaniitti nuyi ijoolleen Kee iji hafuuraa akka nurraa argamuuf, dhuga baatota Kees akka nu taasiftuuf Si kadhanna. Hojii foonii of irraa dhowwinee, qullaa'ummaatti kan guddannu akka taanu humna Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin gaafa hundumaa akka nu gargaartuuf Isa nuuf du'ee dhiiga Isaatiin nu bitate Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhannaa. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosaade nu Wonto! Ne yele aadessi hayla xhinqatena ne nayshe maaddha aadexeesiti uddi Ayaana Geeshuna kumoronike ne maxo e maaddho gisha nemba galatako nu galate.$Odde Wonto! Ne nayshe maaqe nuni killoondese aadexesita maaddhi Ayaana aafey nu yesuwa bente neese eedhese ato nu maaqoronike ne mahorosako nemba nu shi’e. Acho hanta inxha’isine hayloomako nu dicoronike ne mahorosaara Ayaana Geeshuna uddi wogga numba ne marorosaarako nemba nu shi’e.$Haanxho uddi nuumeydi haydhi be suuxuna numba wozza nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሳዴ ኑ ዎንቶ! ኔ ዬሌ ኣዴስ ሀይለ ጽንቀቴነ ኔ ነይሼ ማዸ ኣዴሤስት ኡድ አያነ ጌሹነ ኩሞሮንኬ ኔ መሦ ኤ ማዾ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ኦዴ ዎንቶ! ኔ ነይሼ ማቄ ኑን ክሎንዴሴ ኣዴሤስተ ማዽ አያነ ኣፌይ ኑ ዬሱወ ቤንቴ ኔሴ ኤዼሴ አቶ ኑ ማቆሮንኬ ኔ መሆሮሰኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ። አቾ ሀንተ እንጸእስኔ ሀይሎመኮ ኑ ድጮሮንኬ ኔ መሆሮሳረ አያነ ጌሹነ ኡድ ዎገ ኑምበ ኔ መሮሮሳረኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኑሜይድ ሀይዽ ቤ ሱሡነ ኑምበ ዎዘ ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoosina Anni ikkitti ni Moollanni Waa’a, ki Beetonne amma’nnita’a keesamaakkoo ximqatinne ki oos ikko’i amma’nnaan hundim Keesammi Ayyaaninne wo’mmitamisina ki doo’l ihu bikkina kiina lombi ihona. Niyyanna, dabassanto’i amma’nnaa’nnisa goon oosikii landi oosikii Ayyaa’n mish ni heechchanne moo’amoo naqaashshuwwi issitoo’isina uunxinoommo. Maa’l mixano ni heechchiinsi qeessinummuuyyi muccuroominne li’nnona ki keesammi malaayyinne amman hundam niina hara’mmitoo’isina ni bikkina lehaa ixxi xiiginne neese bitaa’u ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi anna ikkoonti nii Qarichcho Magano! Beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosaan amma'nnit Xummaancho xammaqanchiin kii oosuta ikkoo amma'nnaannu horunku / gu'mmunku Xummaancho Ayyaaniin wiintunta kii qaada ikkotannee kesaa abbinnu ihun. Magano! Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki doorammeemmi amma'nnaannu inki Xummaancho Ayyaani laalut heechchaantanne yoo keenu assinne. Kiitannee naqqansaammi keenunka assinne. Naoot hiilata maali hujita agunni kii muccurimaan le'nnunta horanta jaata kaa'llinne yinan niitannee rehi qegiintas wojjonne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi Anna Kaaliiqa Maganonke, Beettokki ammante Qullaawa Ximqatenni Ate ooso ikkitino ammanaano baalanti Qullaawu Ayyaaninni wo'mitara Ate fajjo ikkitino daafira ayirrinyu Atera ikko. Eeggatena soorrante wole ikkitino Kiristaanooti gede labballunna meentu oosokkira Ayyaanu gumi heeshshonkera leellanno naqaashshekki assattonkera huucci'neemmohe. Maalu looso hunnanni qullaambekkiwa hinge lophineemmore ikkinammora kaa'lattonke gede, reenke mundeesinni hidhinonkehunni Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty and eternal God, we, who are the work of your hands, thank you for giving us true faith so that we know you, our heavenly Father, your Son Jesus Christ, and the Holy Spirit. God, we pray that you comfort your church with this true faith and protect it from all harm and evil in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል የዘላለም አምላክ ሆይ፣ እኛ የእጆችህ ሥራዎች የሆንን የሰው ልጆች አንተን ሰማያዊ አባታችንን፣ ልጅህን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስንና መንፈስ ቅዱስን ለማወቅ ስለ ረዳኸን፤ እንደዚሁም እውነተኛ ሃይማኖትንም ስለ ሰጠኸን እናመሰግንሃለን። አምላክ ሆይ፣ ቤተ ክርስቲያንህንም በእውነተኛ ሃይማኖት እንድታጽናናትና ከጉዳትና ከክፋትም እንድትጠብቃት እንለምንሃለን ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan Dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa bara baraa, nuyi namoonni hojii harka Keetii kan taane ijoolleen Kee, Siin Abbaa keenya Isa waaqa irraa, Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu akka beeknuuf waan nu gargaarteef, akkanuma immoo amantii dhugaa waan nuuf kenniteef Si galateeffanna. Yaa Waaqayyo, Waldaa Kristaanaa Kees amantii dhugaatti akka cimsitu, miidhamaa fi hamaa hundumaa irraa akka eegduuf Si kadhanna, maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e koolo makkina yese Wonto! Nuni ne kuche hanta maaqe axi nayshi nemba afaaka yese nuuse aade ne yele Yesuusi Kristosaara Ayaana Geeshaara nu eehoronike ne mato gisha yeydiwo aadena aadexo nu aadexoronike ne mato gisha nemba galatako nu galate.$Nu Wonto! Nemba aadexeesita aade aadexona ne minxoronikiyaara miidha garafaara iita garafaara numba ne kaforonikeko nemba nu shi’e.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኑን ኔ ኩቼ ሀንተ ማቄ አሥ ነይሽ ኔምበ አፋከ ዬሴ ኑሴ ኣዴ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሳረ አያነ ጌሻረ ኑ ኤሆሮንኬ ኔ መቶ ግሸ ዬይድዎ ኣዴነ ኣዴሦ ኑ ኣዴሦሮንኬ ኔ መቶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ኑ ዎንቶ! ኔምበ ኣዴሤስተ ኣዴ ኣዴሦነ ኔ ምንሦሮንክያረ ሚዸ ገረፋረ ኢተ ገረፋረ ኑምበ ኔ ከፎሮንኬኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo heer heerina hee’lloo ni Waa’a! Neese ki angi bax inkummi manni oos keese iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanna, ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoosaa Keesammi Ayyaanaa lanqona hara’mmitti bikkina galaxxinoommo. Ee’isam hanqo’i amma’nnato uwwitti bikkinam galaxxinoommo. Ni Moollanna, keese amma’nnito’i keeno hanqo’i amma’nnatonne qoxxissoo’isinaa hawwodoo luwwiinsee joriinsee egettoo’isinaa ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / Gu'mmanka danditaanti doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaanti Magano! Naoot angakki hujita inkoommi manni oosut kees samaan yoonti annanne Maganu, beetukki Yesuusi Kiristoosahaa Xummaanchu Ayyaanahaa dangunta kaal'itoontinnehannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Magano! Amma'nnaanni maabarakkin gare ammanaatoon qaarsituntaa genano hiilaarriichchi qorabbuntaa Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu hegere Magano, ninke angakki looso ikkinoommori mannu ooso Ate Gordu Annanke, Beettokki Yesuusa Kiristoosanna Qullaawa Ayyaana anfammora kaa'loottonkehura galaxxineemmohe. Magano, Beetekiristaanekkino halaali ammananni sheshifachishattoseranna gawajjotenna bunshetewiinni agarattosera Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord our God, the protector of all who hope in you: in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, in your great mercy protect us with your Holy Spirit so that we do not lose the gift of eternal life but remain faithful to your forever. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ በአንተ ተስፋ የሚያደርጉትን የምትጠብቃቸው አንተ ነህ፤ እኛንም በታላቅ ቸርነትህ ምድራዊውን ስጦታ ስትሰጠን በአካሄዳችን ዘላለማዊውን ስጦታ እንዳናባክን በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ ጠብቀን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, warra Si abdatan Situ eega. Isa guddaa arjummaa Keetiin kennaa isa lafa irraa yommuu Ati nuuf kennitu, nuyi immoo adeemsa keenyaan kennaa Ati jireenya bara baraatiif nuuf kennite akka hin mancaafneef Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu eegi. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxo! Nu Wonto! Nemba gobbeesita kakkesi nembako. Keddaydese ne jhergona ha saha gara yese axuse worguse abakoko ne inge. Yaafa ekkisine nuni nu hange hamona koolo makkinase maaqe ingo nu bayseesume ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba kakkuwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሦ! ኑ ዎንቶ! ኔምበ ጎቤስተ ከኬስ ኔምበኮ። ኬደይዴሴ ኔ ዤርጎነ ሀ ሰሀ ገረ ዬሴ አሡሴ ዎርጉሴ አበኮኮ ኔ እንጌ። ያፈ ኤክስኔ ኑን ኑ ሀንጌ ሀሞነ ኮሎ መክነሴ ማቄ እንጎ ኑ በይሴሱሜ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ ከኩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Waa’a, keesenne bakke’llam keeno egettoottok atette. Neesem kiihaanninne lophphaakkoo biijoominne ka uulli uwwancha uwwittuuyyi ni heechchanne kiikka heer heerina hee’oo heechcha bi’insoombee’isa ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne egettoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nii Qarichcho Magano! Kesaan tassaa assitaara qorabbaantii ateet. Nesaanka abba biizimaantakki uulla ali aassancha aassiteentinne. Naoont heechchaantanne doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heano abba aassanchakki fincinumbogga Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki qorabbuntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Maganonke, Ate hexxitannore agarattonsahu Ateeti; ninkerano bayiru shaqqillikkinni baattonniha afansha aattonke woyite ha'rinshonkenni hegere afansha fincineemmokki gede Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni agarinke, Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord our God, without your help, we your children can do nothing good. Empower us by the hope we have in Christ Jesus your Son. We love you, because you are the one who called us and with your saving gospel. Help us by the power of your Holy Spirit to follow your will in our thoughts and actions. In the name of our Savior Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ አንተ ሰዎች አንዳች ለማድረግ ስለማይችሉ አንዱን ልጅህን ልከህ ወደ ራስህ ሳብከን፤ በአንተ ተስፋ የሚያደርጉትንም ታበረታታቸዋለህ። እኛን ልጆችህን በሚያድነው ወንጌልህ የጠራኸን አንተ ነህና እንወድስሃለን። በአሳባችንና በሥራችን የአንተን ፈቃድ ለመፈጸም እንድንችል በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ ኃይል እርዳን፤ በመድኃኒታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, namoonni ofii isaaniitiin wanta tokkittii illee gochuu waan hin dandeenyeef Tokkicha Ilma Kee ergitee gara ofii Keetti nu harkifte. Ati warra Si abdatan in jajjabeessita. Nuun ijoollee Kees Wangeela fayyinaa Keetti kan nu waame Si'i waan ta'eef Si jajanna. Nus immoo yaada keenyaa fi hojii keenyaan fedha Kee raawwachuu akka dandeenyuuf humna Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu gargaari; maqaa Fayyisaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxo nu Wonto! Axi abani mahese danda’uwa gishako bidzi ne yele ansi neeko ne oodo. Nemba gobbeesita minxako ne minxe. Numba ne nayshe loolusese danda’e Modhe Odo badena numba xheyday nembako. Nemba kedda keddako nu hise. Nu maxonani maaqqe nu hantana ne maxo hantese nu danda’oronike ne Ayaana Geeshi osana numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi nu dhale maaqe ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሦ ኑ ዎንቶ! አሥ አበን መሄሴ ደንደኡወ ግሸኮ ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ አንስ ኔኮ ኔ ኦዶ። ኔምበ ጎቤስተ ምንሠኮ ኔ ምንሤ። ኑምበ ኔ ነይሼ ሎሉሴሴ ደንደኤ ሞዼ ኦዶ በዴነ ኑምበ ጼይደይ ኔምበኮ። ኔምበ ኬደ ኬደኮ ኑ ህሴ። ኑ መሦነን ማቄ ኑ ሀንተነ ኔ መሦ ሀንቴሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኑ ዸሌ ማቄ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Waa’a, at manni maham isseena malaayyi bee’i bikkina kiikka mexxo’i Beeto niina asse’llaa neese ki kollonne wottitto. Keesenne bakke’llam keenom qoxxissootto. Neese ki ooso gatisoo ki mishiraachchi sagarinne weeshshittok atetti ikkitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Eehannina neesem ni sawwitinnee ni baxinnee ki doo’lla wonshinoommisina ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne at niina hara’mmitoo’isina ni Qaraar Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nii Qarichcho Magano! Mannu mexxurraa assii dandumbu hoongaanchu ikkoga daggaantitannee at mexxukki beetu Yesuusa sokki nees kiiba hincassiteentinne. Ammoo kesaan tassaa assitaara maqoo aassit qaarsitaantissa. Neesin oosukki faissaa Mishiraachchi laagaantakki kii wommoomaa gaitoontinnee kees ikkoontitannee galaxxinaanke. Naoont sawwittiintannee hujeentannee at yitaantiga assii dandinunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llituntanne zabboanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Maganonke, Ati, mannu mittoreno assate dandaannokki daafira, Mitto Beettokki sokke umikki widira goshooshittonke; Ate hexxo assidhannoreno jawaachishattonsa. Ninke oosokki gatisannohunni Danchu Duduwikkinni woshshoottonkehu Ateetina banxeemmohe. Hedonkenninna loosinkenni Ate fajjo wonsha dandiineemmo gede Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqakkinni kaa'linke, yinanni Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Our God, who has called us to the fellowship of your Son, our Lord Jesus Christ, you are the one we trust. We thank you for sanctifying us with your Holy Spirit, and for making us your children through your holy sacraments. Lord, we pray in the name of Jesus Christ, the head of the church, to protect us and grant us unity in the one true faith. Amen.
amh: ወደ ልጅህ ወደ ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ህብረት የጠራኸን አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር፣ አንተ የታመንህ ነህ። በመንፈስ ቅዱስና በተቀደሱ ምስጢራትህ ቀድሰኸን፣ ልጆችህ ስላደረግኸን እናመሰግንሃለን። አቤቱ በዚህ በተቀደሰው ሃይማኖት ቤተ ክርስቲያንህን እንድትጠብቃትና አንድነትህን እንድትሰጣት የቤተ ክርስቲያን ራስ በሆነው በልጅህ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንጸልያለን። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, gara tokkummaa Ilma Keetii Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristositti kan nu waamte Ati amanamaa dha. Hafuura Qulqulluu fi dhoksaawwan Kee Qulqulluutiin nu qulqulleessitee ijoollee Kee waan nu taasifatteef Si galateeffanna. Amantii qulqullaa'aa kanaan Waldaa Kristaanaa Kee akka eegduu fi tokkummaa Kee akka isheef kennituuf mataa Waldaa Kristaanaa Isa ta'e maqaa Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Wonto! Ne yele Yesuusi Kristosana yese bizetowaka numba xheyday nembako. Neni artese danda’uwa Wontoko. Ayaana Geeshunaara haylondese Laaxi Qametenaara numba haylonxuwa. Ne nayshe numba ne mato gisha nemba galatako nu galate.$Odde, ha haylondese aadexo nu aadexoronike numba ne kaforonikiyaara bidzeto ne ingoronikiyaarako aadexeesituse qino maaqe ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ዎንቶ! ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰነ ዬሴ ብዜቶወከ ኑምበ ጼይደይ ኔምበኮ። ኔን አርቴሴ ደንደኡወ ዎንቶኮ። አያነ ጌሹናረ ሀይሎንዴሴ ላሥ ቀሜቴናረ ኑምበ ሀይሎንሡወ። ኔ ነይሼ ኑምበ ኔ መቶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ኦዴ፥ ሀ ሀይሎንዴሴ ኣዴሦ ኑ ኣዴሦሮንኬ ኑምበ ኔ ከፎሮንክያረ ብድዜቶ ኔ እንጎሮንክያረኮ ኣዴሤስቱሴ ቅኖ ማቄ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ki Beet ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoosinne yoo mateeyyoomanne neese weeshshitti ni Moollanni Waa’a, at amma’nnantaattoohane. Keesammi Ayyaaninnee keesamaakkoo ximqatinnee Moollanni hurbaata aa’imminnee neese maasse’llaa ki oos issitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Niyyanna, ka keesamaakkoo amma’nnatonne ki amma’nnaa’n mateeyyooma egettoo’isinaa ki mateeyyooma uwwitoo’isinaa amma’nnaanina horoor ihu ki Beet ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosi wudiin ikkoo mexxoomaa gaitoontinne nii Qarichcho Magano! At amma'nnanteentiya. Ammoo Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakkii xummaanchu ikkoo Qarichchi Ozeenii Xammaqanchiinii nees muccursit oosukki aassitoontinnehannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Magano! Ka Xummaanchu ikko ammanaatoon amma'nnaanni maabarakki qorabbuntaa mexxoomakki aassituntaa amma'nnaanni maabari shoohuta ikko beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi gambooshshiwa woshshittonke Magani Kaaliiqi Ati ammanamoottoho. Qullaawu Ayyaaninninna qullaawoota ikkitinori maalikkinninna mundeekkinni keereensitenke, oosokki assoottonkehura galaxxineemmohe. Eeggatena tenne qullaawa ikkitino ammananni Beetekiristaanekki agarattoseranna mittimmakki aattosera, Beetekiristaanete umo ikkinohunni Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Praise be to you, O Lord our God, for you alone are the creator of righteousness and the source of peace. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask you to strengthen us with the power of your Holy Spirit so that we may live peaceful lives in this world, and that your church may resist the traps of the Devil and serve you truly. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ የጽድቅ ፈጣሪና የሰላም ምንጭ አንተ ብቻ ስለሆንህ ክበር ተመስገን። የዚህች ዓለም ኑሮ ሰላም እንዲሆንልንና ቤተ ክርስቲያንም የሰይጣንን ሽንገላ በመቋቋም እንድታገለግል በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ ኃይል ታበረታት ዘንድ እንለምንሃለህ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa, Uumaan qajeelummaa fi burqaan nagaa Si qofa waan ta'eef, ulfinnii fi galanni Siif haa ta'u. Jireenyi biyya lafaa kanaa nagaa akka nuuf ta'u, Waldaan Kristaanaas sossobbaa seexanaatiin mormitee akka Siin tajaajiltuuf humna Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin akka jajjabeessitu maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxo nu Wonto! Gizete meddhasaara modhete tultowaaray nembawo e maaqe gisha kuxuttuwa galatuttuwa. Ha saha yesoy modhete maaqoronikiyaara nemba aadexeesiti Humbaaye haluxa iicheshe nu danda’oronike numba ne maroronike Ayaana Geeshi osana numba ne osusoronikeko nemba nu shi’e.$Haanxho uddi nu dhale maaqe ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሦ ኑ ዎንቶ! ግዜቴ ሜዸሳረ ሞዼቴ ቱልቶዋረይ ኔምበዎ ኤ ማቄ ግሸ ኩሡቱወ ገለቱቱወ። ሀ ሰሀ ዬሶይ ሞዼቴ ማቆሮንክያረ ኔምበ ኣዴሤስት ሁምባዬ ሀሉሠ ኢቼሼ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኑምበ ኔ መሮሮንኬ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ ኔ ኦሱሶሮንኬኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኑ ዸሌ ማቄ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Waa’a, muccuroo’m qooccaanchii xumminam bu’ii xale’i atetti ikkitti bikkina lophphee galaxxamee. Neese ka uullanne xumminne hee’nnoommisinaa ki amma’nnaanim Sheexaa’nneka jor baxo kaa’imminne keese awwaandonaa ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nii Qarichcho Magano! Muccurimataa xummahaa aassitaantii kees ikkoontitannee abbinnuhuu galatuhuu kesaa ihun. Naoot ta uulla aleen xummiin he'nnuntaa amma'nnaanni maabarunku Sheexaani maqoo zirruntaa Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llitunta Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Maganonke, keeraanchimmate Kalaqaanchinna keeru buicho Ate calla ikkoottohura ayirri; galatami. Tenne alame heeshsho keerunnita ikkitankeranna Beetekiristaaneno sheexaanunnita afiisi doga qeelte soqqantara Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqakkinni jawaachishattose gede huucci'neemmohe. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni. Hamii'ni.

eng: Dear Lord our God, we thank you for the all the gifts you have prepared for those who love you. Pour the power of your love into our hearts so that we can love you more than anything else. Help us with your Holy Spirit so that we always treasure the hope that we have in your grace. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ቸሩ እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ አንተን ለሚወዱ ያዘጋጀህላቸውን የሚታየውን ስጦታ ስለምታጎናጽፋቸው እናመሰግንሃለን። እኛ አንተን ከሁሉ አብልጠን ልንወድህ እንድንችል የፍቅርህን ኃይል በልባችን አፍስስ፤ ደግሞ ስጦታህንና ተስፋህን ለመቀበል እንድንችል በቅዱስ መንፈስህ እርዳን፤ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Arjaa kan taate yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, warra Si jaallataniif kan qopheessite kennaa ijaan argamu waan gonfituuf Si galateeffanna. Nuyi waan hundumaa irra caalchisnee Si jaallachuu akka dandeenyuuf humna jaalalaa nu keessatti dhangalaasi. Akkasumas abdii Keetii fi kennaa Kee fudhachuu akka dandeenyuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu gargaari, Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Jhergaxe maaqe Wonto! Nemba eeheesituse ne nadhese bente ne ingo ne inge gisha nemba galatako nu galate. Nunini nemba uddime garsi eehese nu danda’oronike osaxe maaqe ne eeha nu muxhurowa gussuwa. Assi ne ingowaara ne gobbusese gobbowaara efese nu danda’oronike ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ዤርገሤ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኔምበ ኤሄስቱሴ ኔ ነዼሴ ቤንቴ ኔ እንጎ ኔ እንጌ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ። ኑንን ኔምበ ኡድሜ ገርስ ኤሄሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኦሰሤ ማቄ ኔ ኤሀ ኑ ሙጹሮወ ጉሱወ። አስ ኔ እንጎዋረ ኔ ጎቡሴሴ ጎቦዋረ ኤፌሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Biijaalli ni Moollanni Waa’a, keese iittitam keenina at gudissitti uwwancha uwwitootti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Neese keese hundem luwwiinsim lonsinaa iittineena xannoommisina ki iitti malaayye ni wodanonne dune. Ee’isam odim ki uwwanchaa anceetaa aa’nnoommisina ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Biiza nii Qarichcho Magano! Kees iittitaarii qixxansitoonti xuudamano aassancha aassitaantissahannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Naoont kees horaarriichchin abbins iittinunta iittakki aazeentanne ikkunta assi. Ammoo aassanchakki aaqqinuntaa tassaa assinuntaa Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llinne yinan Qarichcho Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Shaqqado Kaaliiqa Maganonke, Ate baxxannorira qixxeessoottonsaha leellanno afansha haraqisiisattonsahura galaxxineemmohe. Ninke Ate wo'munkurinni roorsine baxa dandiinammora baxillikki wolqa wodaninkera duni. Qolleno afanshakkinna fajjoottonkere adha dandiineemmo gede Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni kaa'linke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, everything that is good comes from you. Strengthen our faith so that we do not waste the gift that you have given us. May your Holy Spirit always be with us. Help us to love your holy name with true love, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ መልካም የሆነው ሁሉ ከአንተ የሚመጣ ስለሆነ የሰጠኸንን ስጦታ እንዳናባክነው ሃይማኖታችንን አጽናልን። ቅዱስ መንፈስህ ዘወትር ከእኛ ጋር ይሁን፤ ደግሞ በእውነተኛ ፍቅር ቅዱስ ስምህን እንድንወደው እርዳን ስለ ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, wanti gaarii ta'e hundinuu kan dhufu Si biraa waan ta'eef, kennaa Ati nuuf kennite akka hin bittimsineef amantii keenya nuuf jabeessi. Hafuurri Qulqulluun Kee yeroo hundumaa nu wajjin haa ta'u. Akkanuma immoo jaalala dhugaadhaan maqaa Kee isa Qulqulluu akka jaallannuuf nu gargaari; maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e Wonto! Modhe maaqe abakoy uddi neekofa yoonesa e maaqe gisha ne indese ingo buddi nu bayseme nu aadexo minxuwa. Hayla ne Ayaana Geeshi uddi wogga nuura wolko yesuwaye. Assi aade eehana hayla ne sunxe nu eehoronike numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ዎንቶ! ሞዼ ማቄ አበኮይ ኡድ ኔኮፈ ዮኔሰ ኤ ማቄ ግሸ ኔ እንዴሴ እንጎ ቡድ ኑ በይሴሜ ኑ ኣዴሦ ምንሡወ። ሀይለ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኡድ ዎገ ኑረ ዎልኮ ዬሱወዬ። አስ ኣዴ ኤሀነ ሀይለ ኔ ሱንሤ ኑ ኤሆሮንኬ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo ni Moollanni Waa’a, er luwwi hundim kiinniinsi waaroohan ihu bikkina niina uwwitti uwwancha abdaandoombee’isa ni amma’nnato at qoxxise. Odim ki Keesammi Ayyaan amman hundam niinninne maqir ihona. Hanqo’i iittinne ki keesammi summa iittinona hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti nii Qarichcho Magano! Bareedarra ikko horurrunku / gu'mmurrunku kesaachchi ihanotannee aassitoontinne aassancha fincin bainsumbogga ammanaatunne qaars. Xummaanchu Ayyaanukki horanta jaata nesaan bargammi ihun. Hittigunta naoont gare iittaan xummaanchu su'mmakki abbinsunta kaa'llinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu Kaaliiqa Maganonke, dancha ikkino baali Atewiinni daannoha ikkino daafira oottonke afansha billaallinseemmokki gede ammananke jawaachishinke. Qullaawu Ayyaanikki wo'manka woyite ledonke ikko. Qolleno halaali baxillinni qullaawa su'makki banxammora kaa'linke, yine Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God we praise you for bringing us out of the power of darkness into the light of your only Son Jesus Christ. As we travel through this dark world of sin on the way to our heavenly home, we ask you to enlighten us with the light of your Word and so enable us to see your glory in heaven. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
amh: ልዑል እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ አንዱ ልጅህ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ከጨለማ ሥልጣን ወደ ብርሃን ስላወጣን እናከብርሃለን። በዚች በጨለማ ዓለም ስንኖርና ወደ ሰማያዊ ቤታችን ስንጓዝ በቃልህ ብርሃን እንድንመላለስ ቃልህን እንድታበራልንና የአንተን ክብር በሰማይ ለማየት እንድንችል ታደርገን ዘንድ እንለምንሃለን። ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋር ለዘላለም በሚነግሥና በሚኖር በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa isa ulfina qabeessaa, Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, Tokkichi Ilma Kee Yesus Kristos mootummaa dukkanaa keessaa gara ifaatti waan nu baaseef ulfinni Siif haa ta'u. Biyya Lafaa isa dukkana kana keessa yommuu jiraannuu fi gara mana keenya isa waaqa irraatti adeemnu, ifa Dubbii Keetiin akka deddeebinuuf Dubbii Kee akka nuuf ibsitu fi warra ulfina Kee waaqa irratti argan akka nu taasiftuuf Si kadhanna. Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristos Isa Sii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin bara baraan jiraatuu fi mo'uutiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Kaate maaqe Wonto! Bidzi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosay cencha osaafa fo’iya numba e kesso gisha nemba galatako nu galate. Ha cencha sahaakani yesa yeydiwo dhaddi afaa nu zawaakani hama hidi nu yese yesuwaka nu yesune fo’e inge ne katona kessi nu geloronike ne kato nu muxhurowa ne faqoronikiyaara ne kuxa afaaka nu beyoronike ne mahoronikiyaarako nemba nu shi’e.$Neerani maaqqe Ayaana Geeshaara wolko kaatesaara yesesaara maaqe ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ካቴ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰይ ጬንቸ ኦሳፈ ፎእየ ኑምበ ኤ ኬሶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ። ሀ ጬንቸ ሰሃከን ዬሰ ዬይድዎ ዸድ አፋ ኑ ዘዋከን ሀመ ህድ ኑ ዬሴ ዬሱወከ ኑ ዬሱኔ ፎኤ እንጌ ኔ ከቶነ ኬስ ኑ ጌሎሮንኬ ኔ ከቶ ኑ ሙጹሮወ ኔ ፈቆሮንክያረ ኔ ኩሠ አፋከ ኑ ቤዮሮንኬ ኔ መሆሮንክያረኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ኔረን ማቄ አያነ ጌሻረ ዎልኮ ካቴሳረ ዬሴሳረ ማቄ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Adil ni Moollanni Waa’a, kiikki mexxo’i Beet Yesuus Kiristoos tuunsi malaayyiinsi caakkanne fissu bikkina kiina lomba uwwinoommo. Ka tuunsi uullanne hee’nnummuuyyii iima’n ni mi’n kolli taakke’nnummuuyyii, ki saga’l caakkanne daba’llammoommisina, ki sagara niina caakkissoo’isinaa ki lombem iimanenne moo’nneena xannoommisa issitoo’isinaa kiinninnee Keesammi Ayyaaninnee maqirem heer heerina adil ihaa hee’oo ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti nii Qarichcho Magano! Mexxukki beetu Yesuusu Kiristoosu nees tunsuta ikkee heechcha aazeen yoommira caakkaan fushsheennehannii kees abbinsaammi. Naoot hiilaarriin wiintee ta uulla aleen he'nnanii ammoo samaan yoo mininne iillii marammanii laagakkigiin fanqalaa'llammunta laagakki caakkisinnenii samaan kii abbinni xuundunta iillisinnenii yinan kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniinii bargammi doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka wommoo'mmanona heano Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Roore Kaaliiqa Maganonke, Mittu Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi tunsichu roorrenni xawaabba fushshinonke daafira ayirrisi'neemmohe. Tenne tunsichu alamera hee'neemmo woyitenna gordu mininkewa ha'neemmo woyite qaalikki caabbichinni ha'rammeemmo gede Qaalekki xawisattonkeranna Ate ayirrinye gordoho la”a dandiissattonkera huucci'neemmohe. Atenna Qullaawu Ayyaani ledo hegerera moohannohunna hee'rannohu Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni. Hamii'ni.

eng: Lord God our Heavenly Father, you are the one who called and entrusted your servants to serve you faithfully and wisely. You have promised your children that you will hear our prayers. Help us with your Holy Spirit so that we may ask only according to your will, and grant us what we ask for in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር ሰማያዊ አባት ሆይ፣ አገልጋዮች በታማኝነትና በጥበብ እንዲያገለግሉህ ጠርተህ አደራን የሰጠህ አንተ ነህ። ለልጆችህ ጸሎታቸውን እንድትሰማ ተስፋ ሰጥተሃቸዋል፤ እነርሱም እንደ ፈቃድህ ብቻ እንዲለምኑ በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ እርዳቸውና የሚለምኑህንም ስጣቸው ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Isa waaqa irra jiraattuu Waaqayyo Abbaa keenyaa, tajaajiltoonni Kee ogummaa fi amanamummaadhaan akka Siif hojjetaniif waamtee itti gaafatama kan itti kenne Si'i. Kadhata ijoollee Keetii akka dhageessuufis abdii kenniteettaaf. Isaanis immoo akka fedha Keetti akka kadhataniif Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin isaan gargaartee, kan isaan Si kadhatanis akka isaaniif kennituuf maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Afaa yese Wonto! Ne maraxiti muxhuraxe maaddhi facete kenguwasa ne hanta u hantoronike oddeysine xheydi inday nembako. Ne nayshi shi’e ne siyoronike uso gobbusay nembako. Usini ne maxokewo u shi’oronike ne Ayaana Geeshuna uso maruwa. U shi’esani ususe inguwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: አፋ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኔ መረሥት ሙጹረሤ ማዽ ፈጬቴ ኬንጉወሰ ኔ ሀንተ ኡ ሀንቶሮንኬ ኦዴይስኔ ጼይድ እንደይ ኔምበኮ። ኔ ነይሽ ሽኤ ኔ ስዮሮንኬ ኡሶ ጎቡሰይ ኔምበኮ። ኡስን ኔ መሦኬዎ ኡ ሽኦሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኡሶ መሩወ። ኡ ሽኤሰን ኡሱሴ እንጉወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, awwaadaan amma’nnanchinnee qooroominnee kiina awwaaddamisina weeshshaa yabo uwwittok atette. Ki oosina ixxuwwi uunxato macceessoo’isa neeyyato uwwitaatto. Ixxuwwim ki doo’llisa keese uunxitamisa ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne hara’mmitoo’isinaa ixxuwwi uunxitam luwwam uwwitoo’isinaa ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti anna Magano! Soqqamaannu amma'nnanchiinii enkee'nniinii kesaa soqqantunta gait hadarata aassitoontii ateet. Ammoo oosokki uusatuta maccooccii tassaa aassiteentissa. Isso'oont xalli kii sawwittigiin uuccitunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llituntassanii uuccaqqitaakkera horanka / gu'mmanka aassituntassanii Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Gordu Anna, soqqamaano ammanamatenninna ogimmatenni soqqantahera woshshite eeggo oottohu Ateeti. Oosokki huuccatto macciishshate hexxo oottonsa. Insano fajjokki garinni calla huuccidhahera Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni kaa'litensa huuccidhannohere uyinsa. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord our God, we honor you because you have forgiven our sins, and you daily protect us from evil. In this way, you show us that you are almighty God. May your Holy Spirit help us to be wise stewards who treasure the hope we have in you, and so fulfill the stewardship responsibility you have given us. Do not cut us off from the joy and grace of heaven. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ልዑል እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ ከክፉ የምትጠብቀንና የኃጢአታችንን ይቅርታ የምትሰጠን አምላክ ነህና እናከብርሃለን። በዚህም ሁሉን የምትችል አምላክ መሆንህን ታሳየናለህ፤ አሁንም የሰጠኸንን ተስፋ የምንጠብቅ እና አንተ የሰጠኸንን የመጋቢነት ኃላፊነት እንደሚገባ የምንወጣ ምእመናን እንድንሆን ቅዱስ መንፈስህ ያግዘን። የሰማይን ደስታና ጸጋህን በቸርነትህ አታቋርጥብን። በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa gararraa kan jirtu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, Ati hamaa nuyi irraa kan eegduu fi dhiifamu cubbuu keenyaa kan nuuf kennitu Waaqayyoo keenya waan taateef ulfina Siif kennina. Kanaanis Waaqayyo Isa hundumaa danda'u ta'uu Kee nutti argisiifta. Ammas abdii Ati nuuf kennite kan eeggannuu fi amantoota itti gaafatama soortummaa Ati itti kennite, hojii irra oolchan akka taanuuf Hafuurri Qulqulluun Kee nu haa gargaaru. Gammachuu waaqa irraaf ayyaana Kee fi arjummaa Kee nurraa hin kutin. Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Kaate maaqe Wonto! Iitaafa numba kakkesaara nu cubbowaafa numba maaresaaray nembako. Ha e gisha nemba kuxako nu kuxe. Ha esunako uddi base danda’e Wonto ne maaqesa ne beyse.$Hatteni numba ne gobbusese gobbo kakkesa maaqe nuni nu maroronike nuuse ne indese adetona e bishenike hantese nu danda’oronike ne Ayaana Geeshi numba kiidhuwaye. Afaafa nuuse ne inge maggaara axuse ne kenge ne maxo modhetiyaara ne jhergetena nu garafa bursofuna.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ካቴ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኢታፈ ኑምበ ከኬሳረ ኑ ጩቦዋፈ ኑምበ ማሬሳረይ ኔምበኮ። ሀ ኤ ግሸ ኔምበ ኩሠኮ ኑ ኩሤ። ሀ ኤሱነኮ ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ዎንቶ ኔ ማቄሰ ኔ ቤይሴ።$ሀቴን ኑምበ ኔ ጎቡሴሴ ጎቦ ከኬሰ ማቄ ኑን ኑ መሮሮንኬ ኑሴ ኔ እንዴሴ አዴቶነ ኤ ብሼንኬ ሀንቴሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኑምበ ኪዹወዬ። አፋፈ ኑሴ ኔ እንጌ መጋረ አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼትያረ ኔ ዤርጌቴነ ኑ ገረፈ ቡርሶፉነ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Adil ni Moollanni Waa’a, joriinsi neese egettoottokii ni baaxiilinam urato issitoottokii atetti ikkitti bikkina keese lonsinoommo. Eehanninnem hundam xantoo Waa’i ikkittisa niina moo’issootto. Kabadem neese niina uwwitti neeyyato egelloommi keenoo niina uwwitti allaarimmi annooma laboo’isinne egelloommi amma’nnaanoo inkoommisina ki Keesammi Ayyaan niina hara’mmoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaant nii Qarichcho Magano! Hiilaarriichchi qorabbaantinneehuu baaxiilanne faun yitaantiihuu kees ikkoontitannee abbinsaanke. At hikkaan assiintakki horanka / gu'mmanka danditaantii ihukki xuudissaantinne. Teesuu naoot at aassitoontinne tassaa qoraphphinuntaa at aassitoontinne zeema annoomata hasisanogiin qorambaammi amma'nnaannu inkuntaa Xummaanchu Ayyaanukki dikkisunne. Ammoo samee bajigutaa abba aassanchakkii biizimaantakki aassinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Roore Kaaliiqa Maganonke, bunshetewiinni agarattonkehunna cubbinkera maaro aattonke Maganootina ayirrisi'neemmohe. Kunninni wo'manka dandaatto Magano ikkoottota leellishattonke. Xaano oottonke hexxo agadhineemmorenna oottonketa itisate soqqansho roorrimma hasiisanno garinni duqqineemmo ammanaano ikkate Qullaawu Ayyaanikki kaa'lonke. Gordu hagiirrenna eltokki shaqqillikkinni uurrisse hooltootinke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty and eternal God, your goodness is far greater than our thoughts, words, and deeds. Do not count our sins against us, but have mercy on us. O righteous God, grant us your true righteousness and give us wisdom to discern good from evil. Give us the spirit of prayer, and teach us to pray by your Holy Spirit, for we do not know how or what to ask for. In the name of your only Son, Jesus Christ our Lord. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል የዘላለም አምላክ ሆይ፣ የአንተ ቸርነት ከተግባራችንና ከአሳባችን እጅግ የሚበልጥ ስለሆነ ማረን እንጂ ኃጢአታችንን አትቈጣጠርብን። ጻድቅ አምላክ ሆይ፣ የአንተን ጽድቅ አጎናጽፈኸን እውነተኛውን ነገር ለመለየት እንድንችል አበርትተህ ታቆመን ዘንድ ፈቃድህ ይሁንልን። የሚያስፈልገውን ለመለመን ማወቅ ስለማንችል ቅዱስ መንፈስህ ያስተምረን፤ ምን ብለን እንደምንጸልይ አናውቅምና የጸሎት መንፈስ ስጠን። ስለ አንዱ ልጅህ ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ብለህ። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Gooftaa bara baraa, arjummaan Kee hojii keenya fi yaada keenya irra guddaa kan caalu waan ta'eef, nu maari malee cubbuu keenya nutti hin lakkaa'in. Qajeelaa kan taate yaa Waaqayyo, qajeelummaa Kee nu uffachiiftee wanta dhugaa ta'e adda baafnee hubachuu akka dandeenyuuf jabeessitee nu dhaabuun jaalala Kee nuuf haa ta'u. Waan barbaachisan kadhachuu waan hin beekneef, Hafuurri Qulqulluun Kee nuun haa barsiisu. Maal jennee akka kadhannu hin beeknuutii Hafuura kadhataa nuuf kenni. Maqaa isa Tokkicha Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e koolo makkina yese Wonto! Ne jhergetey nu hante hantamiyaara nu maxe maxomiyaara orjhena garesa e maaqe gisha numba maruwa baaka nu cubbo e bidzi bidzina taattofuna.$Gizo maaqe Wonto! Ne gizete numba maysuwa. Aade zeere shati erese nu danda’oronike minsi numba essese ne danda’oronike ne maxo maaquwaye. Nuuse worguse base erdi nemba shi’ese nu danda’uwa gisha ne Ayaana Geeshi numba erusoronike mahuwa. Abaydi nu shi’esa nu eruwa gisha shi’e eehe muxhuro nuuse inguwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኔ ዤርጌቴይ ኑ ሀንቴ ሀንተምያረ ኑ መሤ መሦምያረ ኦርዤነ ገሬሰ ኤ ማቄ ግሸ ኑምበ መሩወ ባከ ኑ ጩቦ ኤ ብድዝ ብድዝነ ታቶፉነ።$ግዞ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኔ ግዜቴ ኑምበ መይሱወ። ኣዴ ዜሬ ሸት ኤሬሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ምንስ ኑምበ ኤሴሴ ኔ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኔ መሦ ማቁወዬ። ኑሴ ዎርጉሴ በሴ ኤርድ ኔምበ ሽኤሴ ኑ ደንደኡወ ግሸ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኑምበ ኤሩሶሮንኬ መሁወ። አበይድ ኑ ሽኤሰ ኑ ኤሩወ ግሸ ሽኤ ኤሄ ሙጹሮ ኑሴ እንጉወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo doolli hundinam hee’lloo Niyyanna, ki biijoom ni baxiinsii ni sawwitiinsii lobakata lophphoohan ihu bikkina ni baaxiilo xiggoo’n «Uraammo» yihe. Keesammi ni Waa’a, niina ki muccurooma eddeessaa hanqo’i woshsha annanni issinaa lanqeena xannoommisina neese qoxxissaa uullissoo’isina ki doo’l ihona. Niina hasisoo luwwa lanqaa uunxineena xannoombee’i bikkina ki Keesammi Ayyaan niina losisona. Mayyinaa uunxinoomda’e neese lanqoombee’i bikkina hanqi ihaakkoo uunxatonne awwonsoo Ayyaana niina uwwitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaanti Magano! Kii biizimat naoot assinaammina sawwinaammihanniichchi abbissi abbitaaiita ikkootannee nees faun yinne bagaan baaxiilanne wollissoot. Xummaancho Magano! Garita ikkora annanna assin dangunta kii muccurimata aassit qaarsit uurrisinne. Naoot hasisanonnera uuccin dangumburra inkoommitannee Xummaanchu Ayyaanukki rosisunne. Ammoo ma yin uuccinaammindoo dangumbotannee kees uuccinunta kaa'llanonne Ayyaana aassinne yinan mexxoanki beeto Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu hegere Magano, Atehu shaqqillu loosinkenni lowo geeshsha roore ikkinohura maarinke ikkinnina cubbonke kiirtootinke. Keeraancho Magano, Ateta keeraanchimmakki guggushshitenke halaali coye bada dandiinammora jawaachishshe uurrisattonkera fajjokki ikkonke. Huucci'rate egenno afi'noommokki daafira Qullaawu Ayyaanikki rosiisonke. Mayine huucci'neemmoro dianfoommona, huucci'rate ayyaana uyinke. Mittu Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: O God our heavenly Father, may we ever listen to your living Word, given through our Lord Jesus Christ. We ask you in the name of Jesus to guide us by your Holy Spirit to speak only the truth before you and all people. Amen.
amh: ሰማያዊ አባታችን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ፣ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሕያው ቃልህን ሰጥተኸናልና ለአንተ ምስጋና እያቀረብን እውነት የሆነውን ብቻ በፊትህ እንድንናገር በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ ትመራን ዘንድ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo isa waaqa irra jiraattuu Abbaa keenyaa, Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin dubbii Kee isa jiraataa waan nuuf kenniteef galata Siif dhi'eessaa wanta dhugaa ta'e qofa fuula Kee duratti akka dubbannuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin akka nu geggeessituuf maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Afaaka yese nuuse ade maaqe Wonto! Nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosana en’a maaqe ne kato nuuse indiko ne yese. Neese galata uqusisine nu muxhurowafa kessi aadewo ne buro nu zeeroronike ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba durkuwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: አፋከ ዬሴ ኑሴ አዴ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰነ ኤንአ ማቄ ኔ ከቶ ኑሴ እንድኮ ኔ ዬሴ። ኔሴ ገለተ ኡቁስስኔ ኑ ሙጹሮወፈ ኬስ ኣዴዎ ኔ ቡሮ ኑ ዜሮሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ ዱርኩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos kollinne hee’oo ki sagara niina uwwitaatto. Kiina galata hincaa’nnummuuyyi ki illagenne xale’i hanqi ihaakkoo woshsha woncona ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti nii anna Magano! Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi wudiin heechcha laagakki aassitoontinnehannii kees abbins galaxxinaanke. Hittigunta naoot bireentakki garita ikkora xalla xahaanunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki awwansituntanne Qarichcho Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Gordu Annanke Kaaliiqa, Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi widoonni qolte heeshshonniha Qaalekki oottonkena Atera galata shiqinshanni halaale ikkinoha calla albakkiinni coyi'nammora Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni massagattonke gede Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, cause faith, hope and love to grow more and more in our hearts. Help us to obey what you command. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, give us your power in the Holy Spirit, so that we may find what you have promised. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ፣ እምነት፣ ተስፋ ፍቅርም በልባችን እያደጉ እንዲሄዱ አበረታታን። አንተ የምታዝዘንን ወደን እንድንቀበለው እርዳን። ተስፋ የሰጠኸንን ደግሞ እንድናገኘው በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይልህን እንድትሰጠን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, Si amanuu, Si abdachuu fi Si jaallachuun garaa keenya keessatti guddachaa akka adeemuuf nu jabeessi. Kan Ati nu abboomtu jaallannee akka fudhannuuf nu gargaari. Wanta nu abdachiifte immoo akka argannuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin humna akka nuuf kennituuf Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e Wonto! Adexoy, gobboy, eehay nu muxhurowa dicisine hamoronike numba osusuwa. Numba ne woossesesa eeti nu eforonike numba maruwa. Ne gobbusese gobbo nu degexoronike ne Ayaana osa nuuse inguwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ዎንቶ! አዴሦይ፥ ጎቦይ፥ ኤሀይ ኑ ሙጹሮወ ድጭስኔ ሀሞሮንኬ ኑምበ ኦሱሱወ። ኑምበ ኔ ዎሴሴሰ ኤት ኑ ኤፎሮንኬ ኑምበ መሩወ። ኔ ጎቡሴሴ ጎቦ ኑ ዴጌሦሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ኦሰ ኑሴ እንጉወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo Niyyanni Waa’a, amma’nnat, neeyyatii iittii ni wodanonne li’ukkuuyyi maroo’isina neese qoxxise. At neese ijaajjoo luwwam iittinaa issinona hara’mme. At «Uwwoommo» yitti neeyyatom siixxinoommisina ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne niina malaayye uwwitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaant nii Qarichcho Magano! Amma'nnatu, tassoohuu iittatii aazeentanne bata'aaga assi. Ammoo at azzazzaantinnera iittaan aaqqin assinunta kaa'llinne. Hittigunta at tassaa aassitoontinneranka daqqinunta Xummaanchu Ayyaanakki dirriisinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu Magano Kaaliiqa, ammana, hexxonna baxillu wodaninke giddo lophanni ha'rara jawaachishinke. Ati hajajattonkere banxe adhineemmo gede kaa'linke. Hexxo aattonketano afi'nammora Qullaawu Ayyaaninni wolqa aattonke gede Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Most High Lord our God, we give you high praise because you are our true King. Come into the midst of your church and receive our thanks for all the good things you do for us every day. Hear our prayers through our Lord Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
amh: ልዑል እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ አንተ እውነተኛ ንጉሣችን ስለሆንክ ከፍ ያለ ምስጋና እናቀርብልሃለን። በቤተ ክርስቲያንህ መካከል ገብተህ አንተ አምላካችን ዘወትር ስለምታደርግልን መልካም ነገር ሁሉ የምናመሰግን ምእመናን ሆነን መገኘት የሚያስችለንን ጸጋህን እንድታበዛልንና ጉልበታችንን በኃይልህ እንድታበረታ በቸርነትህም ከኃጢአት ርኲሰት ሁሉ እንድታነጻ፤ ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋር ለዘላለም በሚነግሥና በሚኖር በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ጸሎታችንን ስማ። አሜን።
gaz: Hundaa ol kan taate yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, Ati Mootii keenya Isa dhugaa waan taateef galata guddaa Siif dhi'eessina. Ati Gooftaan keenya yeroo hundumaa Waldaa Kristaanaa keenya keessatti wanta gaarii Ati hojjettu hundumaaf amantoota Si galateeffatan taanee akka argamnuuf kan nu dandeessisu ayyaana Kee akka nuuf baay'iftuu fi mogolee keenya humna Keetiin akka jabeessitu, gaarummaa Keetiin xurii cubbuuttii akka nu qulqulleessituuf, Sii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin bara baraan jiraatee Isa mo'u Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Kaate maaqe Wonto! Aadena nu kaate ne maaqe gisha keddayse galatako neese nu uquse.$Ne zawaxiti giddaa gelli neni nu Wontoy nuuse ne hante modhe abakose uddi nemba galatesa maaddhi nu bentoronike numba mahe axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhete nuuse ne lagusoronikeko nemba nu shi’e. Yeydiwo nu bohe ne osana ne mixoronikiyaara ne jhergetena cubboy oone tunaafa uddi numba ne geeshororonikiyaarako nemba nu shi’e.$Haanxo uddi neerani maaqqe Ayaana Geeshaara kaatesaara yesesaara maaqe Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ካቴ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኣዴነ ኑ ካቴ ኔ ማቄ ግሸ ኬደይሴ ገለተኮ ኔሴ ኑ ኡቁሴ።$ኔ ዘወሥት ግዳ ጌል ኔን ኑ ዎንቶይ ኑሴ ኔ ሀንቴ ሞዼ አበኮሴ ኡድ ኔምበ ገለቴሰ ማዽ ኑ ቤንቶሮንኬ ኑምበ መሄ አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼቴ ኑሴ ኔ ለጉሶሮንኬኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ። ዬይድዎ ኑ ቦሄ ኔ ኦሰነ ኔ ምሦሮንክያረ ኔ ዤርጌቴነ ጩቦይ ኦኔ ቱናፈ ኡድ ኑምበ ኔ ጌሾሮሮንክያረኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ሃንሦ ኡድ ኔረን ማቄ አያነ ጌሻረ ካቴሳረ ዬሴሳረ ማቄ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Adil Waa’a, at niina hanqo’i adil ikkitti bikkina kiina lophphaakkoo galata hincaa’nnoommo. Ki amma’nnaa’n lambe’enne aaggaa at ni Moollanni Waa’i hundi ammanem niina issitoo er luwwi bikkina hundinam galaxxinoommi amma’nnaan inkaa siidamimmina xansiisoo ki eroomma lonsitoo’isina, ni malaayyem ki malaayyinne qoxxissoo’isinaa ki biijoominnem baaxiilinne haashaaranchiinsi muccussitoo’isinaa kiinninnee Keesammi Ayyaaninnee maqire heer heerina adil ihaa hee’oo ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti nii Qarichcho Magano! At gare womanne ikkoontitannee kees xoqxoqqi assinaammi. At nii Maganu amma'nnaanni maabari mereeroon ikki horanta jaata assitaantinne bareedarrii horiinka / gu'mmiinka galaxxinaanke amma'nnaannu inki dagammunta dandeesanonne aassanchakki batissi aassinne. Neesin maqeentakki qaarsituntaa biizimaantakki baaxiiliichchinne horiichchin / gu'mmiichchin muccursituntaa kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniinii bargammi doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka wommoo'mmanona heano Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uusatunne maccoocci. Amii'nni.
sid: Roore Kaaliiqa Maganonke, Ati halaali Mootenke ikkootto daafira, gotti yiino galata shiqishi'neemmohe. Beetekiristaanekki mereero e'e Ati Maganinke wo'manka woyite assattonke coyi baalaho galanteemmohe ammanaano ikkine leellate dandiissitannota eltokki batisattonkeranna guluchonke wolqakkinni jawaachishattora, Atenna Qullaawu Ayyaanikki ledo hegerera moohannohunna hee'rannohu Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: O God, thank you for being the Creator and Protector of all, and for drawing us to yourself. Wake us up with your Holy Spirit to seek first your kingdom and your righteousness. We are ready to receive from your hand all that you give us in your grace. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር አምላክ ሆይ፣ የሁሉ ፈጣሪና ጠባቂ አንተ ብቻ ስለሆንክና ወደ ራስህ ስለሳብኸን ተመስገን። እኛም አስቀድመን የአንተን መንግሥትና ጽድቅ እንድንሻ በቅዱስ መንፈስህ ቀስቅሰን፤ በጸጋህ የምትሰጠንን ሁሉ ከእጅህ ለመቀበል አብቃን። በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa, Uumaa fi eegaan waan hundumaa Si qophaa waan ta'ee fi gara ofii Keettis waan nu harkifteef Si galateeffanna. Nuyis waan hundumaa dura mootummaa Kee fi qajeelummaa Kee akka barbaaddannuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu dammaqsi; ayyaana Keetiin kan Ati nuuf kennitu hundumaa harka Kee irraa fudhachuudhaan nu ga'i. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxo! Nu Wonto! Uddi base meddhasaara kakkesaaray nembako. Yeydiwo numbani neeko ooday nembawoko. Ha e gisha galatay nemba elluwaye. Nunini burussi ne kaatetiyaara ne gizetiyaara nu worgoronike ne Ayaana Geeshi numba birkusuwaye. Axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhetiyaafa densi nuuse ne ingesa ne kuchiyaafa efese nu danda’oronike numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሦ! ኑ ዎንቶ! ኡድ በሴ ሜዸሳረ ከኬሳረይ ኔምበኮ። ዬይድዎ ኑምበን ኔኮ ኦደይ ኔምበዎኮ። ሀ ኤ ግሸ ገለተይ ኔምበ ኤሉወዬ። ኑንን ቡሩስ ኔ ካቴትያረ ኔ ግዜትያረ ኑ ዎርጎሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኑምበ ብርኩሱወዬ። አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼትያፈ ዴንስ ኑሴ ኔ እንጌሰ ኔ ኩችያፈ ኤፌሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Waa’a, hundam qooccaanchii egeraanchii xale’i atetti ikkitti bikkinaa neesem ki beyyo wottitti bikkinaa galaxxame. Neesem hundiinsim gaassinaa ki adillanoo muccuroomaa hansona ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne baqaa’e. Ki eroomminne uwwitoo luwwam ki angiinsi aa’nnoommisina xansiissoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Qarichcho Magano! Horanka / gu'mmanka qooccitoontiihuu qorabbaantiihuu kees xalla ikki neesin kiiba gaitoontihannii galaxxinaanke. Naoont horaarriichchin birsin kii wommoomataa muccurimataa hansunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki baqqainne. Ammoo abba aassanchiintakki kii angaachchi aassitaantinnera horanka / gu'mmanka aaqqinunta iillisinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Magano, baalunku Kalaqaanchinna agaraanchi Ate calla ikkoottohura Ate widira qolte goshooshoottonkehura galatu iillohe. Ninkeno balanxe Ate gashshootenna keeraanchimma hasi'nammora Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni baqqi assinke. Eltokkinni aattonkere baala angakkinni adhate iillishinke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni. Hamii'ni.

eng: God our Father, you are kind and merciful. All your works are beautiful and wonderful. We thank you for creating the earth and all the creatures in it, and for giving it to us. We pray in the name of your only-begotten Son, Jesus Christ, that you will fill us with your understanding so that we do not destroy creation with greed and carelessness and bring calamity to ourselves and the next generation, but instead help us fulfill our responsibility to protect and care for your beautiful and wonderful creation, according to your good and gracious will for us in Christ Jesus our Lord. Amen.
amh: ቸርና ርኁሩኅ የሆንክ እግዚአብሔር አባታችን ሆይ፣ አንተ ምድርንና በውስጧ ያሉትን ፍጥረታት ሁሉ ፈጥረህ ስለሰጠኸን እናመሰግንሃለን። ያንተ ሥራ ሁሉ ውብና ድንቅ ነው። ይህን ውብና ድንቅ የሆነውን ፍጥረት ስንጠቀምበት እንድንጠብቀውና እንድንንከባከበውም ኃላፊነት ሰጥተኸናል። በስግብግብነትና በግድ የለሽነት ፍጥረትን አውድመን ለራሳችንና ለሚቀጥለው ትውልድ መቅሠፍት እንዳናመጣ በማስተዋልህ እንድትሞላን ፍጥረትህን በፈጠርኽበት በአንድያ ልጅህ በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንጸልያለን። አሜን።
gaz: Arjaa fi Gara-laafessa kan taate yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa keenyaa, Ati biyya lafaa fi uumama ishee keessa jiran hundumaa uumtee waan nuuf kenniteef Si galateeffanna. Hojiin Kee hundinuu miidhagaa fi dinqisiisaa dha. Uumama isa miidhagaa fi dinqisiisaa ta'e kana yommuu itti fayyadamnu akka eegnuu fi kunuunsinu itti gaafatama nutti kenniteetta. Sassataa fi maal-dhibdeedhaan uumama kana balleessinee ofii keenyaa fi dhaloota dhufu irratti dheekkamsa akka hin finneef hubannaa Keetiin akka nu guuttuuf isa ittiin uumama uumte maqaa tokkicha Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Jhergaxaara meddhose higilesaara maaqe nuuse ade maaqe Wonto! Neni sahaara e gara yesesaara uddi meddhi nuuse ne indo gisha nemba galatako nu galate. Ne hantay uddi bisheshaara micusheshaarako. Ha be bishana bishana yese ne meddhona go’uttisine ye usita nu kaforonikiyaara modhe aafena nu beyoronikiyaara nuuse adeto indiko ne yese.$Bonqenaara acheshenaara nuuse ne indecho meddho baysi hanzo nuuseni maaqqe yoone yeletase jheete nu ooneesume gaxe nuuse inguwa.$Uddi base meddha ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ዤርገሣረ ሜዾሴ ህግሌሳረ ማቄ ኑሴ አዴ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኔን ሰሃረ ኤ ገረ ዬሴሳረ ኡድ ሜዽ ኑሴ ኔ እንዶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ። ኔ ሀንተይ ኡድ ብሼሻረ ምጩሼሻረኮ። ሀ ቤ ብሸነ ብሸነ ዬሴ ኔ ሜዾነ ጎኡትስኔ ዬ ኡስተ ኑ ከፎሮንክያረ ሞዼ ኣፌነ ኑ ቤዮሮንክያረ ኑሴ አዴቶ እንድኮ ኔ ዬሴ።$ቦንቄናረ አቼሼናረ ኑሴ ኔ እንዴቾ ሜዾ በይስ ሀንዞ ኑሴን ማቄ ዮኔ ዬሌተሴ ዤቴ ኑ ኦኔሱሜ ገሤ ኑሴ እንጉወ።$ኡድ በሴ ሜዸ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Biijaallaa qishixxaallaa ikkitti Niyyanni Waa’a, at uullaa ixxi woronne yoo qooccanchaa hundam qooccitaa niina uwwitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Ki bax hundim mishisoohanee maalalsiisoohanee. Ka mishisookkokaa maalalsiisoohanee ihaakkoo qooccancha awwaaxxinummuuyyi egelloommisinaa abooyyinoommisinaa niina annooma uwwitaatto. Gollimminnee abdaadimminnee qooccancha bi’insaa ni gaginaa waaroo qaranchinaa boobana eemboombee’isa neese qoossimminne wonshitoo’isina ki qooccancha qooccitti matem ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Biizahaa qishixxaanchuhaa ikkoonti nii anna Magano! At uullataa uulla aazeen yoo qooccanchahaa horanka / gu'mmanka qooccit nesaa aassitoontihannii abbins galaxxinaanke. Kii hujit horant abbissi culu assitaataanii maalalsiissaataanii. Ammoo naoont hikka culu assanona maalalsiisano qooccancha ta'mminaammi jaata qorambuntaa abooyyinuntaa annoomata aassiteentinne. Ayidaggo naoot wolo qooccanchii sawwiyu agunni gaganne xalla iittin wolu qooccancha bains gaginnena waalano qalanchi aleen boobana dirriinsiinsumboaggii zahiccu aassituntanne qooccancha horanka / gu'mmanka isi wudiin qooccitoonti mexxoanki beeti Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Shaqqadonna Shooshaqa ikkoottohu Annanke, Ati baattotenna giddose noo kalaqama baala kalaqqe oottonke daafira galaxxineemmohe. Ate loosi baalu faayyahonna dhaggenniho. Konne faayyanna dhagge ikkino kalaqama horoonsi'nanni agarreemmonna towanteemmo gede annimma oottonke. Uminkere calla hedatenninna «Anera mayi baie» yine kalaqama gunde uminkeranna aante dagganno ilamara goofo abbineemmokki gede qaaggokki wonshattonkera kalaqamakki kalaqoottohunni Mittichu Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God our Creator, guide your people with your light so that we may walk on the right path all our days. Help us resist all evil with the power of your Holy Spirit, and give us your grace to serve you with a pure heart. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ልዑል እግዚአብሔር ፈጣሪያችን ሆይ፣ ሕዝብህ በሚገባ አካሄድ ይሄዱ ዘንድ በብርሃንህ ምራቸው፤ ክፉውን ሁሉ በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይልህ ይቋቋሙ ዘንድ ኃይልህን ስጣቸው በንጹህ ልብም አንተን ያገለግሉ ዘንድ በጸጋህ እርዳቸው። ስለ ጌታችን ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Isa hundumaan ol taatee Uumaa keenyaa, sabni Kee adeemsa gaarii akka adeemaniif ifa Keetiin isaan geggeessi; waanta hamaa hundumaa humna Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin akka mo'ataniif humna Kee kenniif, garaa qulqulluudhaan akka tajaajilaniif ayyaana Keetiin isaan gargaari. Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Numba meddha kaate maaqe Wonto! Ne axiti bishe hamo hamoronike ne fo’ena durkuwa. Iita uddi ne Ayaana Geeshi osana iicheshe u danda’oronike osa ususe inguwa. Geeshi muxhurona neese u yesoronike axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhetiyaafa densi uso maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑምበ ሜዸ ካቴ ማቄ ዎንቶ! ኔ አሥት ብሼ ሀሞ ሀሞሮንኬ ኔ ፎኤነ ዱርኩወ። ኢተ ኡድ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኢቼሼ ኡ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኦሰ ኡሱሴ እንጉወ። ጌሽ ሙጹሮነ ኔሴ ኡ ዬሶሮንኬ አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼትያፈ ዴንስ ኡሶ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Neese qooccaanchi Adil Waa’a, ki minaadab laboo’isinne hee’oo’isina ki caakkinne at awwonse. Jor luwwi hundam ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne kaa’nnoommisina at malaayye uwwe. Muccur wodaninnem keese awwaandoommisina ki eroomminne hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti nii qooccaancho Magano! Minaadabukki hasisanogiin fanqalaa'llamunta caakkaantakki awwansi. Hittigunta Xummaancho Ayyaanikki maqeen hiilarra horanka / gu'mmanka uujjaqqant qeeltunta maqookki aassissa. Ammoo muccuro wozaniin kesaa soqqantunta abba aassanchiintakki kaa'llituntassa Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Roore Kaaliiqa Kalaqaanchonke, mannikki hasiisanno gari ha'rinsho ha'rara caabbichikkinni massaginsa. Bunshe baala Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqakkinni qeeltanno gede wolqakki uyinsa. Co'ichu wodaninnino Atera soqqantara eltokkinni kaa'linsa. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: God, our heavenly Father, you know that we are a people who cannot keep your commandments. Therefore, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask you to increase our love for following your law and hearing your Word. Guide our hearts with your Holy Spirit. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር ሰማያዊ አባታችን ሆይ፣ ትእዛዝህን ልንፈጽም የማንችል ሰዎች መሆናችንን አንተ ታውቃለህ። ስለዚህ የሕግ ፍጻሜ የሚሆን ፍቅርህን እንድታበዛልንና ልባችንን በቅዱስ መንፈስህ እንድትመራ እንለምንሃለን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Waaqa irra kan jiraattuu yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa keenya, nuyi namoota abboommii Kee eeguu hin dandeenye ta'uu keenya Ati beekta. Kanaaf xumura seeraa isa ta'e jaalala akka nuuf baay'iftu, yaada gaaraa keenyaas Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin akka nu geggeessitu Si kadhanna. Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nuuse ade afaaka yese Wonto! Ne woosso alsese danda’uwa axita nu maaqenike erako ne ere. Ye e gisha ne wogaara ne maxowaara alsese danda’e ne eeha nuuse ne lagusoronikiyaara numba ne Ayaana Geeshuna ne durkoronikiyaarako nemba nu shi’e.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑሴ አዴ አፋከ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኔ ዎሶ አልሴሴ ደንደኡወ አሥተ ኑ ማቄንኬ ኤረኮ ኔ ኤሬ። ዬ ኤ ግሸ ኔ ዎጋረ ኔ መሦዋረ አልሴሴ ደንደኤ ኔ ኤሀ ኑሴ ኔ ለጉሶሮንክያረ ኑምበ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኔ ዱርኮሮንክያረኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, ki ijaajo wonshineena xannoombee’i manni inkummisa at laqqootto. Ee bikkina seer hundinam lasaanchi ihu ki iitto lonsitoo’isinaa ni wodanom ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne awwonsitoo’isinaa ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti nii anna Magano! Naoot azzazukki wiinshii dandinumbu manni oosuta inkoommiga atin daggaant. Hikkannii horunku / gu'mmunku seeru wiimanoo iittaan ikkotannee iittakki batissi aassituntannenii neesin Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki awwansituntannenii Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Gordu Annanke, hajajokki wonshate dandiineemmokki manna ikkinoommota Ati afootto. Konnira seera wonshate guuta ikkanno baxillekki batisattonkeranna wodananke Qullaawu Ayyaaninni massagattora Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Our living and eternal God, you are the one who helps us with your Holy Spirit and enables us to pray. We ask you to hear our prayers and answer them according to your good and gracious will, in Jesus Christ our Lord. Amen.
amh: ሕያውና ዘላለማዊ አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ፣ ለመጸለይ የምታስችለን በቅዱስ መንፈስህ የምትረዳን አንተ ነህ፤ ስለዚህ በቸርነትህ ጸሎታችንን እንድትሰማ የምንለምንህን እንደ ፈቃድህ እንድትሰጠን እንለምንሃለን። በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Jiraataa bara baraa kan taate yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, kadhachuu akka dandeenyuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin kan nu gargaaru Si'i. Kanaaf akka gaarummaa Keetti kadhata keenya nuuf dhageessee wanta nuyi Si kadhannu akka fedha Keetti akka nuuf kennituuf Si kadhanna. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin Ameen!
kqy-latin: En’aara koolo makkinasaara maaqe nu Wonto! Shi’ese nu danda’oronike mahe Ayaana Geeshuna numba durkesi nembako. Ye e gisha ne jhergona nu shi’e ne siyoronikiyaara nemba nu shi’esa ne maxoke ne mahorosaarako nemba nu shi’e.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኤንኣረ ኮሎ መክነሳረ ማቄ ኑ ዎንቶ! ሽኤሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ መሄ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ ዱርኬስ ኔምበኮ። ዬ ኤ ግሸ ኔ ዤርጎነ ኑ ሽኤ ኔ ስዮሮንክያረ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ኔ መሦኬ ኔ መሆሮሳረኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Heer heerina hee’lloo ni Moollanni Waa’a, uunxinona malaayye uwwitoottokii ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne niina hara’mmitoottokii atette. Ee bikkina ki biijoominne ni uunxato macceessaa neese uunxinoommi luwwa ki doo’llisa uwwitoo’isina Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Heaantina doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka yoonti Magano! Naoot kees uuccinunta assitaantiihuu Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llitaantiihuu ateet.
