Hikkannii biizimaantakki uusatunne maccootunta ammoo uuccinaankeranka kii qaadigiin aassituntanne Qarichcho Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Heeshshonnihunna hegere Magano Kaaliiqa, huucci'ra dandiineemmo gede Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni kaa'lattonkehu Ateeti. Konnira shaqqillikkinni huuccattonke macciishshattora huucci'neemmohereno fajjokki gede aattonkera huucci'neemmohe, Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord our God, who created us in your image and likeness, we thank you for the land you have given and for all your blessings that come from it. We ask you in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to help us work dilligently to use the gifts you have given us according to your will. Give your blessing to us, our family, our church, and our land, through Christ our Lord. Amen.
amh: በመልክህ እንደ ምሳሌህም የፈጠርኸን አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ፣ ስለሰጠኸን ምድርና በምድሪቱ ላይ ስላሉ በረከቶችህ ሁሉ እናመሰግንሃለን። አቤቱ የሰጠኸንን ስጦታ እንደ ፈቃድህ በመጠቀም በትጋት ሠርተን ለራሳችን፣ ለቤትህና ለምድራችን በረከት የምናተርፍ እንድንሆን እንድትረዳን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Akka bifa Kee fi fakkeenya Keetti kan nu uumte yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, lafa kanaa fi eebba isa irra jiru hundumaa waan nuuf kenniteef Si galateeffanna. Hadaraa kanneen Ati nuuf kennite kana akka fedha Keetti akka itti fayyadamnu, dammaqinaanis hojjennee ofii keenyaaf, mana Keetii fi biyya keenyaaf bu'aa kan buufnu akka taanuuf akka nu gargaartuuf maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Ne bishake numba meddha nu Wonto! Nuuse ne indo saha gishaara saha gara yese suusi gishaara nemba uddi galatako nu galate. Odde, nuuse ne indo ingo ne maxoke go’uttisine oseydi hanti nuuseni maaqqe axuse uddi ne inge ingo shahesa nu maaqoronike numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኔ ብሸኬ ኑምበ ሜዸ ኑ ዎንቶ! ኑሴ ኔ እንዶ ሰሀ ግሻረ ሰሀ ገረ ዬሴ ሱስ ግሻረ ኔምበ ኡድ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ። ኦዴ፥ ኑሴ ኔ እንዶ እንጎ ኔ መሦኬ ጎኡትስኔ ኦሴይድ ሀንት ኑሴን ማቄ አሡሴ ኡድ ኔ እንጌ እንጎ ሸሄሰ ኑ ማቆሮንኬ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ki hagarannee ki kobi’llannee neese qooccitti ni Moollanni Waa’a, niina uwwitti ka uulli bikkinaa ka uullanne yoo ki maassi hundi bikkinaa keese galaxxinoommo. Niyyanna, niina uwwitti uwwancha ki doo’llisa awwaaxximminne qoxxinaa banxaa ni gagina, ki mininaa ni uullinaa maasso eembeena xannoommi keen inkoommisina niina hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nees kii agudiishshaan qooccitoontinne nii Qarichcho Magano! Nesaa aassitoonti uullaahaa uulla aleen yooriitanneehaa horaarriinka abbins galaxxinaanke. Magano! Hikka at aassitoontinne aassancha horanka / gu'mmanka kii sawwittigiin ta'mminan qaanni hujatiin gagiihanne, kii minihaa baadiihannee horiinka / gu'mmiinka maassata inkunta kaa'llituntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Suudikkinninna lawishshikkinni kalaqoottonke Magano Kaaliiqa, oottonke baattoranna baattote aana noo atooti baalira galaxxineemmohe. Eeggatena oottonke afansha fajjokki garinni horoonsi'ne jawaante loosi'ne uminkera, minikkiranna baattonkera atoote sayinseemmore ikkate kaa'lattonkera Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Dear God, heavenly Father, we thank you for giving forgiveness of sins to all who believe in your Son Jesus Christ. Give us the power to truly forgive all those who wrong us. Pour your love into our hearts so that we may walk in the way that is right for your children. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር ቸር ሰማያዊ አባት ሆይ፣ ለሚያምኑህ ሁሉ በልጅህ በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ የኃጢአትን ስርየት ስለምትሰጣቸው እናመሰግንሃለን። እኛ ደግሞ ከነሙሉ ልባችን ለሚበድሉን ሁሉ ይቅር እንድንላቸው ኃይልህን ስጠን። ለልጆችህ በሚገባ አካሄድ እንድንሄድ ፍቅርህን በልባችን እንድታፈስልን ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋር ለዘላለም በሚኖርና በሚነግሥ በተወደደው ልጅህ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም እንለምንሃለን። አሜን።
gaz: Arjaa kan taate, waaqa irra kan jiraattu yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa keenyaa, warra Sitti amanan hundaaf Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiin cubbuu isaanii waan isaaniif dhiiftuuf Si galateeffanna. Nuyi immoo warra nu yakkan hundaaf garaa keenya guutuu akka isaaniif dhiifnuuf humna Kee nuuf kenni. Adeemsa ijoollee Keetiif ta'u akka adeemnuuf jaalala Kee garaa keenya keessatti akka nuuf dhangalaaftuuf Sii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin bara baraan Isa jiraatuu fi mo'u, maqaa Ilma Kee Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin Si kadhanna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Afaaka yese nuuse ade! Jhergaxe maaqe nu Wonto! Nemba aadexesita uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosana cubbowafa ne maare gisha nemba galatako nu galate.$Numba miidhase nu muxhurowaafa kessi attuwaye hidi nu hiyoronike danda’o nuuse inguwa. Nuni ne nayshi e worgusenike nu yesoronike ne eeha nu muxhurowa ne gussoronikeko nemba nu shi’e.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: አፋከ ዬሴ ኑሴ አዴ! ዤርገሤ ማቄ ኑ ዎንቶ! ኔምበ ኣዴሤስተ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰነ ጩቦወፈ ኔ ማሬ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ኑምበ ሚዸሴ ኑ ሙጹሮዋፈ ኬስ አቱወዬ ህድ ኑ ህዮሮንኬ ደንደኦ ኑሴ እንጉወ። ኑን ኔ ነይሽ ኤ ዎርጉሴንኬ ኑ ዬሶሮንኬ ኔ ኤሀ ኑ ሙጹሮወ ኔ ጉሶሮንኬኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Biijaalli iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, keese amma’nnitam keenina hundinam ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoos kollinne ixxuwwika baaxiilo haafitootti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Neesem odim neese hawwodu keenina guullinaa wodaniinsi ki’insaa «Ullaammo» yinoommisinam malaayye uwwe. Neese ki oosim laboo heechcha hee’nnoommisina ni wodanonne ki iitto duntoo’isina kiinninnee Keesammi Ayyaaninnee maqire heer heerina hee’oo adil ihoo iittamaakkoo ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti biiza anna Magano! Amma'nnitaakkerii horiinka / gu'mmiinka beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosi wudiin baaxiilassa faun yitaantihannii galaxxinaanke. Ammoo naoont wiimaanne wozaniichchi keins nesaa baissoorii horiinka / gu'mmiinka faun yinuntassa maqoo aassinne. Hittigunta kii oosoga inki fanqalaa'llamu hasisanogiin he'nnunta abbata iittakki aassinne yinan kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniinii bargammi doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heanona wommoo'mmano Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Shaqqado Gordu Anna, ammantannohe baalira Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosinni cubbu maaro aattonsa daafira galaxxineemmohe. Ninkeno qolle wo'mu wodaninkenni sao assitannonke baalira agura dandiinammora wolqakki uyinke. Oosokkira hasiissanno gari ha'rinsho ha'rate baxillekki wodaninke giddo dunattonkera Atenna Qullaawu Ayyaani ledo hegerera hee'rannohunna moohannohunni baxamino Beettikkinni Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, you are the Changeless One who rules this world forever. While we live on this earth, help us by the power of the Holy Spirit to keep your law and walk in the path of the children of light, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል እግዚአብሔር አምላክ ሆይ፣ ለዘላለም ሳትለወጥ ዓለምን የምትገዛ አንተ ነህ፣ በዚች ምድር ስንኖር ሳለን በክርስቶስ ኃይል ሕግህን እንድንጠብቅና በብርሃን ልጆች አካሄድ እንድንሄድ በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይል እርዳን፣ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, bara baraan utuu hin jijjiiramin biyya lafaa kan geggeessitu Si'i, biyya lafaa kana irra yommuu jiraannu, humna Kristosiin seera Kee akka eegnuu fi akka ijoollee ifaatti akka deddeebinuuf humna Hafuura Qulqulluutiin nu gargaari. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin; Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e Wonto! Koolo makkina arte baaka ha saha ahesi nembako. Ha saha gara yesine Krisyosa osa na ne woga nu kaforonikiyaara fo’e nayshi yese yesoke nu yesoronikiyaara Ayaana Geeshi osana numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ዎንቶ! ኮሎ መክነ አርቴ ባከ ሀ ሰሀ አሄስ ኔምበኮ። ሀ ሰሀ ገረ ዬስኔ ክርስዮሰ ኦሰ ነ ኔ ዎገ ኑ ከፎሮንክያረ ፎኤ ነይሽ ዬሴ ዬሶኬ ኑ ዬሶሮንክያረ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo ni Moollanni Waa’a, heer heerina dabassantoo’n uulli hundam gassitoottok atette. Ka uullanne hee’nnummuuyyi Kiristoos malaayyinne ki ijaajo egelloommisinaa caakki oos hee’oo heechchanne hee’nnoommisinaa ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne at niina hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti Qarichcho Magano! Doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka doorantu'nnaachchi samaahaa uullataa horanka / gu'mmanka xaqqitaantii ateet. Hikkannii naoot ta uulla aleen he'nnan Yesuusi Kiristoosi wudiin seerakki qorabbuntaa caakki oosuta inki fanqalaa'llammuntaa Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llituntannee Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu Kaaliiqa Magano, hegerera soorramittokkinni kalqe gashshoottohu Ateeti. Tenne baattora hee'nanni Kiristoosi wolqanni seerakki agadhinammoranna xawaabbu ooso ha'rinsho ha'nammora Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqanni kaa'linke. Mootichu Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: O God our Father, your only Son, our Lord Jesus Christ, died and rose again and now reigns forever at your right hand. By your Holy Spirit, help us to cling to him as our only Savior, and so to receive eternal life with him forever in heaven. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር አምላክ ሆይ፣ ለዘላለም እንዲነግሥ አንዱ ልጅህ ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሞቶ ተነሥቷል። እኛ እርሱን መድኃኒታችን አድርገን በእምነት እንድንቀበለው ከእርሱ ጋር የዘላለም ሕይወት እንድናገኝ በቅዱስ መንፈስህ እርዳን፤ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa, tokkichi Ilma Kee Gooftaan keenyaa Yesus Kristos bara baraan mo'uudhaaf du'ee du'aa ka'eera. Nuyi immoo Fayyisaa keenya Isa taasifannee, amantiidhaan akka Isa fudhannu Isaa wajjin jireenya bara baraa akka argannuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu gargaari. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin, Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxo nu Wonto! Koolo makkina kaatese bidzi neyele Yesuusi Kristosay haydhi dendiko e yese. Nuni esa nu dhale mati aadexona nu ettesenike esaara wolko koolo makkina yeso nu degexoronike ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሦ ኑ ዎንቶ! ኮሎ መክነ ካቴሴ ብድዝ ኔዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰይ ሀይዽ ዴንድኮ ኤ ዬሴ። ኑን ኤሰ ኑ ዸሌ መት ኣዴሦነ ኑ ኤቴሴንኬ ኤሳረ ዎልኮ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሶ ኑ ዴጌሦሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Waa’a, heer heerina adil iheena ki Beet ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos lehaa ki’aakko. Neesem ixxo ni Qaraar issinaa amma’nnatinne aa’nnaa ixxenne maqirem heer heerina hee’oo heechcha siixxinona ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne at niina hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Qarichcho Magano! Doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka wommoo'mmota beetukki Qarichchunne Yesuusi Kiristoosu rehuta qeelli ke'eei. Naoont amma'nnatiin isu zabbunne assin aaqqinuntaa isiinin bargammi doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaa heechchata daqqinuntaa Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llituntannee Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Magano, hegerera Moohara Mittu Beettikki Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi ree kaino. Ninke Iso Xagichonke assine ammanatenni adhinammora Isi ledo hegere heeshsho afi'nammora Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni kaa'linke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, Heavenly Father, we are sinners who deserve only wrath and judgment. But you saved us from eternal punishment by your only Son Jesus. Show us your kindness and increase your grace. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, your beloved Son, who lives and reigns forever with you and the Holy Spirit. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል እግዚአብሔር ሰማያዊ አባት ሆይ፣ እኛ ኃጢአተኞች ፍርድ የሚገባን ስለሆንን በአንዱ ልጅህ ከዚህ አዳንኸን፤ አሁንም ቸርነትህን አሳየንና ጸጋህን አብዛልን። ከአንተና ከመንፈስ ቅዱስ ጋር ለዘላለም በሚነግሥና በሚኖር በተወደደው ልጅህ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hunduma kan dandeessu, Waaqayyo Abbaa waaqa irra jiraattuu, nuyi cubbamoonni firdiin kan nuuf malu taanee utuma jirruu, tokkicha Ilma Keetiin kanattii nu fayyifte. Ammas arjummaa Kee nu argisiisii, ayyaana Kees nuuf baay'isi. Sii fi Hafuura Qulqulluu wajjin bara baraan Isa jiraatuu fi mo'u, maqaa Isa jaallatamaa Ilma Kee Gooftaa Keenya Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Afaaka yese Wonto! Uddi base danda’e nuuse ade! Nuni cubbaxiti yaa’ay nuuse bishesha nu maaqichoyne bidzi ne yelena yaa’aafa numba ne maardo. Hatteni ne jhergete nuuse beysuwa. Axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhete nuuse lagusuwa.$Neerani maaqqe Ayaana Geeshaara wolko koolo makki aallo kaatesaara yesesaara maaqe eehutte ne yele nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: አፋከ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኑሴ አዴ! ኑን ጩበሥት ያአይ ኑሴ ብሼሸ ኑ ማቅቾይኔ ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌነ ያኣፈ ኑምበ ኔ ማርዶ። ሀቴን ኔ ዤርጌቴ ኑሴ ቤይሱወ። አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼቴ ኑሴ ለጉሱወ።$ኔረን ማቄ አያነ ጌሻረ ዎልኮ ኮሎ መክ ኣሎ ካቴሳረ ዬሴሳረ ማቄ ኤሁቴ ኔ ዬሌ ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, neese baaxiilaan keen niina oogat hasisoo keen inkummi bikkina ki matem Beetinne ee oogatiinsi gatissitto. Kabadem ki biijooma niina moo’issaa ki eroomma niina issitoo’isina kiinninnee ki Keesammi Ayyaaninnee maqirem heer heerina adil ihoohaanninnee hee’oohaanninnee iittamaakkoo ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaantina samaan yoonti anna Magano! Baaxiiliichchinne keoo reho firdu hasisanonne nees mexxoanki beeti wudiin rehoochchi faisseentinne. Teesuu biizimakki xuudisinnenii abba aassanchakki aassinnenii yinan kesaanii Xummaancho Ayyaaniinii bargammi doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka wommoo'mmanona heano iittitaanti beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu Kaaliiqa Gordu Anna, ninke cubbaataamma, reyo maltinonkere ikkinoommohura, Mittu Beettikkinni reyotewiinni gatisittonke. Xaano shaqqillekki leellishshenke eltokki batisinke. Atenna Qullaawu Ayyaani ledo hegerera Moohannohunna hee'rannohu baxamino Beettikki Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: God, our heavenly Father, in your mercy protect us so that we do not fall asleep in sin like the foolish young women. Keep us watchful and alert by the power of the Holy Spirit. Help us to pray without ceasing, and at last enter your eternal kingdom. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር ሰማያዊ አባታችን ሆይ፣ እንደ ሰነፎች ቈነጃጅት በኃጢአት አንቀላፍተን እንዳንገኝ በቸርነትህ ጠብቀን በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኃይል ቀስቅሰን፤ ሳናቋርጥ እንድንጸልይና ወደ ዘላለም መንግሥትህ መግባት እንድንችል እርዳን። በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Waaqa irra kan jiraattu yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa keenyaa, akka durboota dhibaa'ota sanaa hirriba cubbuu rafnee akka hin argamneef ayyaana Keetiin nu eegi; Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu dammaqsi; utuu gargar hin kutin akka kadhannu fi mootummaa Kee isa bara baraatti galuu akka dandeenyuuf nu gargaari. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin; Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nuuse ade! Afaaka yese nu Wonto! Hade muya maaqicha woduraxheke geti nu bentuwanike birti nu kaforonike numba mahuwa. Ayaana Geeshi osana numba birkusuwa. Burse baaka nemba nu shi’oronikiyaara koolo makkina yese ne kaatetowa gelese nu danda’oronikiyaara numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑሴ አዴ! አፋከ ዬሴ ኑ ዎንቶ! ሀዴ ሙየ ማቅቸ ዎዱረጼኬ ጌት ኑ ቤንቱወንኬ ብርት ኑ ከፎሮንኬ ኑምበ መሁወ። አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ ብርኩሱወ። ቡርሴ ባከ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኦሮንክያረ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ኔ ካቴቶወ ጌሌሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንክያረ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, ceemmaalli baajaammuwwisa baaxiilinne diriillaa siidammoombee’isa ki biijoominne neese egere. Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinnem neese mikmikaa’e. Odim neese ulloo’n keese uunxinoommisaa heer heerina hee’oo ki adillanonne aangeena xannoommisaa issitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti nii anna Magano! Hikka qallo baajaammaga baaxiiliichchinne keoo amma'nnati heechchaantanne hoongumbogga biizimaantakki qorabinne. Ammoo Xummaancho Ayyaani maqeen baq-baqqi assinne. Hittigunta agunnu'nnaachchi horanta jaata Maganu uuccinan qaannuntaa doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaa samee wommoomakki aanguntaa nees kaa'llituntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Gordu Annanke, cee'maleeyyu seenni gede cuubbunni munge leellineemmokki gede shaqqillikkinni agarinke. Qullaawu Ayyaani wolqanni baqqi assinke uurrinsummokkinni huucci'nammoranna hegere gashshootikkiwa ea dandiineemmo gede kaa'linke yine Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Lord our God, while we live in this world, keep us ever mindful of the final judgment so that we live according to your will. Prepare our hearts by your Holy Spirit so that we may receive eternal life from you. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ የመጨረሻውን ፍርድ እያሳሰብን በዚች ዓለም ሳለን እንደ ፈቃድህ እንድንኖር ጠብቀን። ከአንተ ዘንድ የዘላለም ሕይወት እንድናገኝ ልባችንን በቅዱስ መንፈስህ አዘጋጅ፤ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, biyya lafaa kana keessa yommuu jiraannu, waa'ee Firdii isa dhumaa yaadaa, akka jaalala Keetti akka jiraannuuf nu eegi. Si biraa jireenya bara baraa akka argannuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin garaa keenya qopheessi; maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxo! Nu Wonto! Ha saha gara yesine aallicira wonte yaa’a maxisine ne maxoke nu yesoronike numba kakkuwa. Koolo makkina neera yesese nu danda’oronike nu muxhuro ne Ayaana Geeshuna naquwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሦ! ኑ ዎንቶ! ሀ ሰሀ ገረ ዬስኔ ኣልጭረ ዎንቴ ያአ መሥስኔ ኔ መሦኬ ኑ ዬሶሮንኬ ኑምበ ከኩወ። ኮሎ መክነ ኔረ ዬሴሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኑ ሙጹሮ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ነቁወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Waa’a, ka uullanne hee’nnummuuyyi kiikka lasaanchi oogato tiillummuuyyi ki doo’llisanne hee’nnona egere. At uwwitoo heer heerina hee’oo heechcha siixxinoommisina ni wodano ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne gudissoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nii Qarichcho Magano! Naoot zakkaancho doolli firda sawwinan ta uulla aleen yoommi jeechchoon kii sawwittiga he'nnunta qorabinne. Ammoo kesaachchi doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaa heechchata daqqinunta nees Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki qixxansituntanne Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Maganonke, goofimarchu yoo qaagiissitanninke tenne alamera fajjokki gede hee'nammora agarinke. Atewiinni hegere heeshsho afi'nammora wodananke Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni qixxeessi yinanni Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord God, who never changes, we thank you for giving your only Son to be our Savior. Help us by your Holy Spirit, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ, so that we who are strangers and aliens in this world may follow him, and reach our home in the kingdom of heaven. Amen.
amh: ለዘላለም የማትለወጥ እግዚአብሔር አምላክ ሆይ፣ አንዱን ልጅህን መድኃኒታችን እንዲሆን ስለ ሰጠኸን እናመሰግንሃለን። እኛም በዚች ዓለም እንግዶችና መጻተኞች የሆንን እርሱን እየተከተልን ወደ መንግሥተ ሰማያት እንድንደርስ በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ እርዳን፣ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Bara baraan kan hin jijjiiramne yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa. Tokkichi Ilmi Kee Fayyisaa keenya akka nuuf ta'uuf waan nuuf kenniteef Si galateeffanna. Nuyis biyya lafaa kana keessatti keessummootaa fi kara adeemtota kan taane, Isa faana buunee, Mootummaa Waaqaa akka geenyuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu gargaari; Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Koolo makkina artese danda’uwa Wonto! Bidzi ne yele numba maaresa nuuse ne indo gisha nemba galatako nu galate. Nuni ha saha gara borsaara bayaxaara maaqesiti Kristosa aadexisine afa kaatetese nu elloronike Ayaana Geeshuna numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኮሎ መክነ አርቴሴ ደንደኡወ ዎንቶ! ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ ኑምበ ማሬሰ ኑሴ ኔ እንዶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ። ኑን ሀ ሰሀ ገረ ቦርሳረ በየሣረ ማቄስት ክርስቶሰ ኣዴሥስኔ አፈ ካቴቴሴ ኑ ኤሎሮንኬ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Heer heerinam dabassantoobee’i ni Moollanni Waa’a, kiikka mexxo’i Beeto niina Qaraar ihona higissaa uwwitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommuulla. Neesem «Ka uullanne koyyaa waaraanoo inkummi keen ixxo awwonnummuuyyi iima’n adillano amfoommisina ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka doorantumbo Qarichcho Magano! Mexxukki beetu Yesuusi Kiristoosa nesaa zabbunne ihunta aassitoontinnehannii galaxxinaanke. Naoot tanni uulla aleen kohigaa aaggichchaakkagaa inki he'nnaammiru Yesuusi Kiristoosa awwannan samee wommoomata iillinunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Hegereranni soorramattokkihu Kaaliiqa Magano, mitto Beettokki Xagichonke ikkara oottonke daafira galaxxineemmohe. Ninkeno tenne alamera wosinahonna manni gobbare ikkinoommori Iso ha'runsinanni gordu gashshootiwa iillinammora Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni kaa'linke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty and eternal God, on this day we remember that Mary, the mother of our Lord Jesus Christ, brought Jesus to the temple in obedience to the law. Prepare and help us with your Holy Spirit so that we too may come to your temple with a pure heart and stand before you without fear. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን የምትችል የዘላለም አምላክ ሆይ፣ በዚህች ቀን የጌታችን የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ እናት ማርያም ኢየሱስን ወደ ቤተ መቅደስ ተሸክማ ማምጣቷን እናስታውሳለን። እኛ ደግሞ በንጹሕ ልብ ወደ ቤተ መቅደስህ እንድንመጣና በፊትህ ያለፍርሃት ለመቆም እንድንችል በቅዱስ መንፈስህ አዘጋጀንና እርዳን፣ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Gooftaa bara baraa, guyyaan kun guyyaa Maariyaam haati Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristos, Gooftaa keenya baattee gara mana qulqullummaatti fiduu ishee itti yaadannuu dha. Nus immoo yaada garaa qullaa'aadhaan gara mana qulqullummaa Keetii akka dhufnu, sodaa malees fuula Kee dura dhaabachuu akka dandeenyuuf Hafuura Qulqulluudhaan nu qopheessiitii nu gargaari. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin, Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e koolo makkina yese Wonto! Hanzo nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosayndo Maaramey Yesuusa iddi hayla zawaaka i yoodosa maxako nu maxe. Nuni assi geeshi muxhurona ne hayla zawaaka nu geloronikiyaara ne buro jhashe baaka nu ee’oronikiyaara Ayaana Geeshuna odde numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ሀንዞ ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰይንዶ ማረሜይ ዬሱሰ እድ ሀይለ ዘዋከ እ ዮዶሰ መሠኮ ኑ መሤ። ኑን አስ ጌሽ ሙጹሮነ ኔ ሀይለ ዘዋከ ኑ ጌሎሮንክያረ ኔ ቡሮ ዠሼ ባከ ኑ ኤኦሮንክያረ አያነ ጌሹነ ኦዴ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo heer heerina hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, kaballa Yesuus Kiristoos ama Maaraame Yesuus Kiristoosa amadda’a Waa’i mine waatto’isa sawwinoommo. Neesem muccur wodaninne ki mine waalloommisaa ki illagennem baddinoo’n uullinoommisaa ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne neese gudissaa hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaantina horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti Magano! Kabari Zabbunne ikko Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi amat Maaraam Yesuusa Magani keesammo mini iyyit waaltooga qaangaammi. Naoont gare wozaniin keesammo kii mini waannaammigiihaa saalu yoobaii bireentakki uurrii dandinaammigiihaa Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki qixxansinnenii kaa'llinnenii yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaattohu hegere Magano, kunni barrinni Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi ama Maariyaami Yesuusa Qullaawa Minekkira haadhe daase qaangeemmo. Ninkeno keeranchu wodaninni Qullaawu Minikkiwa dangammoranna albakkiinni mansummokkinni uurra dandiineemmo gede Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni qixxeessinkenna kaa'linke yine Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: O God, our heavenly Father, in your great kindness you revealed through your angel that your only Son would be born on this earth for us and for our salvation. Help us by your Holy Spirit to fulfill your will and always to give thanks for your kindness and mercy. In the name of your beloved Son Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር ሰማያዊ አባታችን ሆይ፣ በታላቅ ቸርነትህ ለደኅንነታችን ብለህ አንዱ ልጅህ በዚች ምድር እንዲወለድ በመልአኩ ገልጸህልናል፤ እኛም ስለ ቸርነትህና ወረታህ ምስጋና እያቀረብን በቅዱስ መንፈስህ ፈቃድህን ለመፈጸም እንድንችል እርዳን። ስለተወደደው ልጅህ ስለ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Waaqa irra kan jiraattu yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa keenyaa, isa guddaa arjummaa Keetiin fayyina keenyaaf jettee, tokkichi Ilmi Kee biyyaa lafaa kana irratti akka dhalatu ergamaa Keetiin nutti mul'ifteetta. Nus immoo waa'ee arjummaa Keetii fi gaarummaa Kee kanaaf galata Siif dhi'eessaa, jaalala Kee raawwachuu akka dandeenyuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu gargaari; Maqaa Isa jaallatamaa Ilma Kee Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nuuse ade afaaka yese Wonto! Keddaydese ne jhergetena numba loolusese hissina bidzi ne yele ha saha gara e yeluttenike afaase woosaxi badena nuuse otiko ne yese. Nuuse ne mato jhergete gishaara nuuse ne feyssho feysshi gishaara galatay nemba elluwaye. Ne Ayaana Geeshuna ne maxo alsese nu danda’oronike odde numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi eehutte ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑሴ አዴ አፋከ ዬሴ ዎንቶ! ኬደይዴሴ ኔ ዤርጌቴነ ኑምበ ሎሉሴሴ ህስነ ብድዝ ኔ ዬሌ ሀ ሰሀ ገረ ኤ ዬሉቴንኬ አፋሴ ዎሰሥ በዴነ ኑሴ ኦትኮ ኔ ዬሴ። ኑሴ ኔ መቶ ዤርጌቴ ግሻረ ኑሴ ኔ ፌይሾ ፌይሽ ግሻረ ገለተይ ኔምበ ኤሉወዬ። ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኔ መሦ አልሴሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኦዴ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኤሁቴ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanni Waa’a, kiihaanninne lophphaakkoo biijoominne neese gatisseena yitaa kiikka mexxo’o Beeto ka uullanne qaramoo’isa ki asse’amaanchi kollinne kuttaatto. Neesem ki biijoo’m bikkinaa uwwitti luwwi bikkinaa galata hincaa’nnummuuyyi ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne kiikka keesamaakkoo doo’lla wonshinona at hara’mme. Ee hundam iittamaakkoo ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan heaanti nii anna Magano! Nees faissonneta yit abbatanki biizimaan iittitaanti beetukki tanni uulla aleen ilamanogii samee soqqamaanchiintakki kulteentinne. Naoot biizimakkitanneehaa assitoonti abbatanki hujetanneehaa galati aassinaanke. Ammoo Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki sawwittakki wiinshinunta kaa'llituntanne iittitaanti beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Magano Gordu Annanke, bayiru shaqqillikkinni gatonkera yite Mittu Beettikki tenne baattora ilamanno gede sokkaasinchu widoonni xawisoottonke. Ninkeno shaqqillikkiranna assootikkira galata shiqinshanni Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni fajjoottore wonsha dandiinammora kaa'linke. Baxamino Beettikki Yesuusira yite huuccattonke maccishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God our Father, we thank you for showing the glory of Christ to the disciples on the mountain. Help us by your Holy Spirit to walk through the darkness of this world remembering of the light of the glory of Christ, until we finally see his glory face to face. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን ቻይ እግዚአብሔር አባታችን ሆይ፣ በተራራ ላይ ለደቀ መዛሙርት የክርስቶስን ክብር ስላሳየሃቸው እናመሰግንሃለን። እኛም የክርስቶስን ክብር እያሰብን በዚህች ዓለም ጨለማ ተራምደን በመጨረሻ ለዘላለም ክብሩን እንድናይ በቅዱስ መንፈስህ እርዳን፤ በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa keenyaa, ulfina Kristos gaara irratti bartootatti waan mul'ifteef Si galateeffanna. Nus ulfina Kristos yaadaa, dukkana biyya lafaa kana keessa darbinee, dhuma irratti ulfina Isaa isa bara baraa akka argannuuf Hafuura Qulqulluu Keetiin nu gargaari. Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin, Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e nuuse ade maaqe Wonto! Bakka gara e erusichoshituse Kristosa kuxa fuula ne beyso gisha kuxay galatay neese elluwaye. Nunini Kristosa kuxa fuula gaxhisine ha saha cenchaanna aaxussi hangisine aallicira wonte e kuxa fuula nu beyoronike ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba maruwa.$Haanxho uddi eehutte ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ኑሴ አዴ ማቄ ዎንቶ! በከ ገረ ኤ ኤሩስቾሽቱሴ ክርስቶሰ ኩሠ ፉለ ኔ ቤይሶ ግሸ ኩሠይ ገለተይ ኔሴ ኤሉወዬ። ኑንን ክርስቶሰ ኩሠ ፉለ ገጽስኔ ሀ ሰሀ ጬንቻነ ኣሡስ ሀንግስኔ ኣልጭረ ዎንቴ ኤ ኩሠ ፉለ ኑ ቤዮሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ መሩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኤሁቴ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo Niyyanni Waa’a, duu’n hanenne ki losaanina Kiristoosika lomba moo’issitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Neesem Kiristoosika lomba sawwinummuuyyi ka tuunsi uullanne hee’nnaa lasaanchonne heer heerinam ixxi lomba moo’nnona ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne hara’mmitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti nii anna Magano! Awwanaanniihank Yesuusi Kiristoosi abbinni duuni aleen xuudissoontissahannii galaxxinaanke. Naoont Kiristoosi abbinni qaangan hiilimat wiintee tanni uulla aleen maramman zakkaanchoon doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heano abbinnis xuundunta Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaatto Kaaliiqa Annanke, ilaalu aana rosaanote Kiristoosi ayirrinye leellishoottonsahura galaxxineemmohe. Ninkeno Kiristoosi ayirrinye hendanni tenne alame tunsicho sa'ne goofimarchoho hegerera ayirrinyesi la'neemmo gede Qullaawu Ayyaanikkinni kaa'linke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohe. Hamii'ni.

eng: Dear God our heavenly Father, you earnestly desire that no sinner be lost, but that all should repent and return to you. Do not judge us according to our sins, but look instead on our faith in Jesus. Strengthen us by the power of your Holy Spirit to fear, love, and serve you, in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ቸር ሰማያዊ አባትና አምላክ ሆይ፣ ኃጢአተኛ ንስሐ ገብቶ ወደ አንተ እንዲመለስ ትወዳለህ እንጂ ጠፍቶ እንዲቀር አትወድም። ስለዚህ እንደ ኃጢአታችን መጠን አትፍረድብን። አንተን እንድንፈራና እንድናገለግልህ በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ ኃይል አበርታን። በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Waaqa irra kan jiraattu yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa gaarummaadhaan guutuu, namni cubbamaan qalbii diddiirratee gara Keetti akka deebi'u jaallatta malee akka inni badee, achumaan hafu hin jaallattu. Kanaafis akka baay'ina cubbuu keenyaatti nutti hin faradin. Akka nuyi Si sodaannuu fi Siif hojjennuuf humna Hafuura Qulqulluutiin nu jabeessi. Maqaa Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristosiin; Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nuuse ade! Jhergaxe maaqe afaase Wonto! Cubbaxi be cubbo dhaddi maaro gelli maaqorosa ne worgesa baaka e bayorosa worguwannako. Ye e gisha nu cubbo makko nu gara yaadhofuna. Nemba nu jhashoronikiyaara nemba nu kuxoronikiyaara ne Ayaana Geeshi osana numba minxuwa.$Haanxho uddi eehutte ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑሴ አዴ! ዤርገሤ ማቄ አፋሴ ዎንቶ! ጩበሥ ቤ ጩቦ ዸድ ማሮ ጌል ማቆሮሰ ኔ ዎርጌሰ ባከ ኤ በዮሮሰ ዎርጉወነኮ። ዬ ኤ ግሸ ኑ ጩቦ መኮ ኑ ገረ ያዾፉነ። ኔምበ ኑ ዠሾሮንክያረ ኔምበ ኑ ኩሦሮንክያረ ኔ አያነ ጌሽ ኦሰነ ኑምበ ምንሡወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኤሁቴ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Biijaalli iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanna, baaxiilaanchi baaxiilo biiraa yaa ki kollonne daba’llona hassootto bagaan bi’ona hassooyyo. Ee bikkina ni baaxii’llisa neesenne oogattitte. Keese baddinonaa kiina awwaandonaa ki Keesammi Ayyaa’n malaayyinne neese qoxxissoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Biiza samee anna Magano! Baaxiilaamu baaxiilas biira yi kiiba fanqalunta iittitaanti bagaan rehunta hassaantiba'a. Hikkannii baaxiilinne batinnegiin firditootinne. Kees waajjinuntaa kesaa soqqammuntaa Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki dikkisinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Shaqqado Gordu Annanna Magano, cubbaataamu eeggo e”e Atewa higara baxatto ikkinnina bae gatara dihasi'ratto. Kunni daafira cubbinke bikkinni yoo yitootinke. Ate waajjinammoranna soqqammammohera Qullaawu Ayyaanikki wolqanni jawaachishinke yinanni Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Lord God, we thank you for sending your chosen servant John the Baptist to prepare the way for your Son Jesus Christ by teaching and baptizing. Send your Holy Spirit to bring us to repentance, so that we leave the way of sin and follow our Lord Jesus Christ. For the sake of your holy name. Amen.
amh: እግዚአብሔር አምላክ ሆይ፣ የተመረጠ አገልጋይህን ዮሐንስ መጥምቁን በማስተማርና በማጥመቅ ለልጅህ ለኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ መንገዱን ያበጅ ዘንድ ስለላክኸው እናመሰግንሃለን። እርሱም እንዳለ ንስሐ ገብተን የኃጢአትን መንገድ ትተን ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን ለመከተል እንድንችል ቅዱስ መንፈስህ ያግዘን። ስለ ቅዱስ ስምህ ስትል። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa, Yohannis Cuuphaan, hojjetaan Kee, inni fo'amaan, barsiisuu fi cuuphuudhaan Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosiif karaa akka qopheessuuf erguu Keef Si galateeffanna. Akkuma inni jedhe, nuyi yaada garaa keenyaa diddiirrannee, karaa cubbuu dhiifnee, Gooftaa keenya Yesus Kristos faana bu'uu akka dandeenyuuf humni Hafuurri Qulqulluun Kee nuun haa gargaaru. Isa qulqulluu Maqaa Keetiif jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxo! Nu Wonto! Xharuttese Xhamaqe Yohanisey erusenani maaqe xhamaqena ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa oge e naqoronike ne anso gisha nemba galatako nu galate.$E otonike maaro gelli nu hangicho cencha oge dhaddi maadhi nu Laaxi Yesuusi Kristosaara wolko hamese nu danda’oronike ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba kiidhuwa.$Hayla ne sunxi gishame hissine nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሦ! ኑ ዎንቶ! ጸሩቴሴ ጸመቄ ዮሀንሴይ ኤሩሴነን ማቄ ጸመቄነ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ኦጌ ኤ ነቆሮንኬ ኔ አንሶ ግሸ ኔምበ ገለተኮ ኑ ገለቴ።$ኤ ኦቶንኬ ማሮ ጌል ኑ ሀንግቾ ጬንቸ ኦጌ ዸድ ማዽ ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሳረ ዎልኮ ሀሜሴ ኑ ደንደኦሮንኬ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ ኪዹወ።$ሀይለ ኔ ሱንሥ ግሸሜ ህስኔ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Waa’a, niina doo’llamaakkoo ki awwaadaancho Xammaqaanchi Yohaannisa losisaa xammaqonaa ki Beet Yesuus Kiristoosina googo gudisonaa asse’llitti bikkina keese galaxxinoommo. Ixxi yukkisanne ni baaxiilo biiraa yinaa baaxii’l googo ullaa ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoosa awwonneena xannoommisina kiikki Keesammi Ayyaan hara’mmoo’isina keesamaakkoo ki summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nii Qarichcho Magano! At doo'rritoonti soqqamaanchukki ikko xammaqaanchu Yohaannis rosisanii xammaqanii beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosii woqqaa qixxansunta sokkoontihannii galaxxinaanke. Naoont Yohaannis rosishshoganka baaxiilanne biira yin hiilatanne hujeechchi fanqanni Yesuusi Kiristoosa awwannaammigii Xummaancho Ayyaaniintakki kaa'llinne yinan xummaanchoank su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Kaaliiqa Magano, dooraminoha soqqamaanchokki Yohaannisi xammaqaancho rosiisatenna xammaqatenni Beettikki Yesuusi Kiristoosira doogo qixxeessanno gede assoottohura galaxxineemmohe. Isino yinonte gede eeggo e'ne cubbu doogo agurre Mootichanke Yesuusa Kiristoosa ha'runsa dandiinammora Qullaawu Ayyaanikki kaa'lonke. Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosira yite macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord Jesus Christ, you are our Lord and Savior, who willingly suffered and died on the cross for us sinners. You are the God who redeemed us from eternal death by dying on the cross and blotting out all our sins. As we celebrate this feast of your cross, sanctify us with your Holy Spirit. May we always live under your cross and keep your eyes fixed on you, so that we may walk according to your will. Hear our prayers for the sake of your holy name and glory. Amen.
amh: ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሆይ፣ ስለ እኛ ስለ ኃጢአተኞች ብለህ ፈቅደህ መከራን ተቀብለህ በመስቀል ላይ የሞትህልን ጌታችንና አዳኛችን ነህ። በመስቀል ላይ ተሰቅለህ በመሞትህ ከዘላለም ሞትና ኲነኔ የዋጀኸን አምላክ ነህና ኃጢአታችንን ሁሉ ደምስስልን። አሁን የመስቀልን በዓል ስናከብር በመንፈስ ቅዱስህ ቀድሰን፤ እኛ ም ዘወትር በመስቀልህ ሥር ተገኝተን እርሱን ከፊታችን አድርገን እንደ ፈቃድህ እንመላለስ ዘንድ ጥበቃህ አይለየን፤ ስለ ተቀደሰው ስምህና ስለ ክብርህም ስትል ጸሎታችንን ስማ። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Yesus Kristos Gooftaa keenyaa, nuyi warra cubbamootaaf jettee jaallattee, dhiphina fudhattee, fannoo irratti kan nuuf duute, Gooftaan keenyaa fi Fayyisaan keenya Si'i. Ati Fannoo irratti fannifamtee du'uu Keetiin, Gooftaa du'aa fi firdii bara baraattii nu furte dha; ammas cubbuu keenya hundumaa haxaa'ii nurraa balleessi. Ayyaana Masqalaa ayyaaneffachaa jirru kan keessattis Ati nu qulleessi; nuyis yeroo hundumaa fannoo Kee jalatti argamnee, isa of dura buufnee akka jaalala Keetti akka deddeebinuuf yeroo hundumaa nu eegi; isa qulqulluu Maqaa Kee fi ulfina Keetiif jettee kadhanna keenya nuuf dhaga'i. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nu Laaxo Yesuusi Kristosa! Nuume cubbaxitume hissine maddhaa gelli suxi mixi gara nuume haydha nu Laaxaara numba maaresaaray nembako.$Suxi mixi gara suxhutti ne haydhosuna koolo makkina haybowafaara yaa’afaara numba wozza Wontoko neni. Nu cubbo uddina attuwaye hidi hiwa/ucci ooxuwa./ Hatte ne suxhuttosa nu maxusune ne Ayaana Geeshuna numba haylonxuwa. Nuni uddi wogga ne suxi mixi oomo benti nemba nu buro gaddi ne maxoke kessi nu geloronike numba uddi woggaa kakkuwa.$Haanxho uddi haylondese ne sunxi gishamiyaara ne kuxa fuula gishamiyaara hissine nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑ ላሦ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ! ኑሜ ጩበሥቱሜ ህስኔ መዻ ጌል ሱሥ ምሥ ገረ ኑሜ ሀይዸ ኑ ላሣረ ኑምበ ማሬሳረይ ኔምበኮ።$ሱሥ ምሥ ገረ ሱጹት ኔ ሀይዾሱነ ኮሎ መክነ ሀይቦወፋረ ያአፋረ ኑምበ ዎዘ ዎንቶኮ ኔን። ኑ ጩቦ ኡድነ አቱወዬ ህድ ህወ/ኡጭ ኦሡወ።/ ሀቴ ኔ ሱጹቶሰ ኑ መሡሱኔ ኔ አያነ ጌሹነ ኑምበ ሀይሎንሡወ። ኑን ኡድ ዎገ ኔ ሱሥ ምሥ ኦሞ ቤንት ኔምበ ኑ ቡሮ ገድ ኔ መሦኬ ኬስ ኑ ጌሎሮንኬ ኑምበ ኡድ ዎጋ ከኩወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ሀይሎንዴሴ ኔ ሱንሥ ግሸምያረ ኔ ኩሠ ፉለ ግሸምያረ ህስኔ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoosa, ni baaxii’l bikkina yitaa iittitaa masqalanne hawwo aa’llaa saqalantaa lehimminne heer heer lehiinsii oogatiinsii bito aa’llittok ni baaxiilo shiinshitaa hoore. Kaba ki Masqa’l Ugudom ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne niina maasse’llaa uwwe. Neesem ballina ballina ki masqa’l gadanonne inkaa ixxom ni illagenne issinaa ki doo’llisa daba’llammona at hundi ammanem niinninne ikkaa neese egettoo’isinaa ki keesammi summi bikkinaa lombi bikkinaa ni uunxato macceessoo’isinaa keese uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Nii Qarichcho Yesuusi Kiristoosa! Baaxiilaammata inkoommi niitannee yit gagakki higissi aassit hawwa aaqqitoontina niitannee retoonti Qarichchunnee Zabbunnee ateet. At masqali aleen saqalant ret doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka ikkaa rehoochchii xeleeliichchii faissoontinne Qarichchu kees ikkoontitannee baaxiilanne horanka / gu'mmanka faun yi. Teesu ka masaali ayyaani bari abbinsaniyan Xummaanchoanki Ayyaaniin maassainne. Ammoo naoot horanta jaata masqalikki bireen dagammi Kiristoosa bireentanne assin kii sawwittigiin fanqalaa'llammunta at qorabinne yinan Xummanchoanki su'mmina abbinnikkitannee yit uusatunne maccootunta uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Mootichanke Yesuusa Kiristoosa, ninke cubbaataammaho yite hedde qarra adhite masiqalu aana reyottonkehu Mootichinkenna Gatisaanchinke Ateeti. Masiqalu aana sutante reyakkinni hegere reyonninna reyote yoowiinni woxxoottonke Maganootina cubbonke baala huninke. Xa Masiqalikki Ayyaana ayirrinseemmo yannara Qulaawu Ayyanikkinni kereensinke. Ninkeno wo'manka woyite masiqalikki hunda leelline Iso albankeenni wodhine fajjokki gede ha'rammammora agarooshshikki baxxoonkenke. Qullaawu su'mikkiranna ayirinyikkira yite huccattonke macciishshi. Hamii'ni.

eng: O Lord our God, you are Lord of all nations on earth. We praise you for sending your servants to call and renew your church to its proper function. Now in our time, raise up among us preachers and teachers who are enlightened by your Spirit, whose voices will awaken your church and proclaim the reality of your kingdom. Keep them faithful to your Word and strengthened by it. Be their strong defender before their enemies. In the name of your Son, our Lord Jesus Christ, Amen.
amh: ሁሉን ቻይና ቸር ጌታ የሆንክ እግዚአብሔር አምላካችን ሆይ፣ ቤተ ክርስቲያንህን ወደ ትክክለኛው ተግባርዋ እንዲጠሯትና እንዲያድሷት ወንዶችና ሴቶች አገልጋዮችህን ስለላክህ እናከብርሃለን። በእኛም ዘመን ከመካከላችን በመንፈስህ የሚቀጣጠሉ፣ ድምፃቸው ቤተ ክርስቲያንህን የሚያነቃቃና የመንግሥትህን እውን መሆን የሚያውጁትን ነቢያትንና መምህራንን አስነሣልን። በቃልህ ውስጥ አጽናቸው፣ በጠላቶቻቸውም ፊት ብርቱ ተከላካይ ሁንላቸው። ስለ ልጅህ ስለ ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም ብለህ፣ አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Gooftaa keenyaa, Waldaa Kristaanaa Kee gara hojii ishee isa sirriitti akka waamanii fi akka haaressaniifis tajaajiltoota Kee warra dhiirotaa fi dubartootaa waan ergiteef Si galateeffanna. Bara keenya keessas raajotaa fi barsiisota dubbiin isaanii Waldaa Kristaanaa Kee dadammaqsuu fi dhugummaa mootummaa Keetii labsu kan Hafuura Qulqulluu Kee isaan haaresse nu gidduudhaa akka nuuf kaaftuuf Si kadhanna. Dubbii Keettis isaan jabeessi; diinota isaanii durattis gaachanaa fi da'oo cimaa ta'iif. Maqaa Ilma Kee Yesus Kristosii jettee. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e jhergaxe maaqe nu Laaxo! Nu Wonto! Ne zawaxita aade hanta gara u ooworonikiyaara u killonxoronikiyaara ne maraxita busho na’e ne anso gisha nemba kedda keddako nu hise. Nu beraaka nu giddaafa ne Ayaanana kundi ne katona ne zawaxita birkusesitaara ne kaatetey aade maaqenike oobadhe kaayaxitaara erusesitaara nuuse densiko ne yese. Ne kato giddaa uso minxuwa. U iilaxiti buro gardi tucesha maaquwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ዤርገሤ ማቄ ኑ ላሦ! ኑ ዎንቶ! ኔ ዘወሥተ ኣዴ ሀንተ ገረ ኡ ኦዎሮንክያረ ኡ ክሎንሦሮንክያረ ኔ መረሥተ ቡሾ ነኤ ኔ አንሶ ግሸ ኔምበ ኬደ ኬደኮ ኑ ህሴ። ኑ ቤራከ ኑ ግዳፈ ኔ አያነነ ኩንድ ኔ ከቶነ ኔ ዘወሥተ ብርኩሴስታረ ኔ ካቴቴይ ኣዴ ማቄንኬ ኦበዼ ካየሥታረ ኤሩሴስታረ ኑሴ ዴንስኮ ኔ ዬሴ። ኔ ከቶ ግዳ ኡሶ ምንሡወ። ኡ ኢለሥት ቡሮ ገርድ ቱጬሸ ማቁወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo biijaalli Waa’a, amma’nnaano hanqo’an ihaakkoo ki baxina weeshshamisinaa areessamisinaa kiina awwaaddam goonaa meentoo asse’llitti bikkina keese lonsinoommo. Ni doollennem ni lambe’iinsi ki Keesammi Ayyaaninne aphphoo keeno, ixxuwwi sagarim amma’nnaano baqaa’oo keeno, ki adilla’n hanqo’ooma alallaatoo keeno, hiraagaanoo losisaanoo niina ki’ise. Ki sagarinnem qoxxise. Ixxuwwi diina’innem qoxxaallisa uullixxantoo’isina ki Beet Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti biiza nii Qarichcho Magano! Amma'nnaanni maabaru gare amma'nnati woqqaan maramunta assitaagiihaa keesammo minikkin kii laagagiin haareessaagiihaa goonahaa meentuhaa hujeehanki sokkoontihannii galaxxinaanke. Hittigunta kanni nii doollaanin mereeroontanne Ayyaaniintakki sohanteera ikki laagaantassa amma'nnaanni maabara baq-baqqattaana wommoomakki waaltaaiita ikkooga qaagissaa hiraagaannuhaa rosisaannuhaa aassinne. Isso'oonta laagaantakki qaarsissa. Ammoo diinnaakkaachchissa qorabbi faisissa yinan beetoanki Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Baala Dandaattohunna shaqado Mooticha ikkoottohu Magano ananke, beetekiristaanekki halaalanyu loosisera woshshitannonna haa'roonsitannose gede labballonna meento soqqamasinekki soottohunnira ayirrisi'neemmohe. Ninke woggaranno mereeronke Ayyaanikkinni bubbannore, huuronsa beetekiristaanekki kakkayissannorenna gashshoottikki halaalanchimma dudubbannore himanaanonna rosiisaano kayisinke. Qaalikki gidono kaajjishinsa, diinnansa albaanni jawaata gargaraancho ikkinsa. Beettikki, Mootichinke Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mira yite. Hamii'ni.

eng: Almighty God, you have sent your servants to carry your message of love to people of all ages. We ask you to revive in us the memory of these servants of yours, whose faithful witness to the gospel led them to pass through the road of the cross. Give us your grace to follow them in their path of faith and devotion. Give us the courage to bear witness throughout our lives to the victory of your Son over sin and death. In the name of our Lord Jesus Christ. Amen.
amh: ሁሉን ቻይ እግዚአብሔር አምላክ ሆይ፣ የአንተን የፍቅር መልዕክት የሚያስተላልፉ ወንዶችና ሴቶች አገልጋዮችህን አንተ በየትውልዱ ልከሃል። ለወንጌል ምስክርነት ታማኞች መሆናቸው በመስቀል ጎዳና እንዲያልፉ ባበቃቸው በእነዚህ አገልጋዮችህ መታሰቢያ እንድታነቃቃንና በሄዱበት የእምነትና የመሰጠት መንገድ እንድንከተላቸው ጸጋህን እንድትሰጠን እንለምንሃለን። በኃጢአትና በሞት ላይ ልጅህ ስለተቀዳጀው ድል በሕይወታችን ሙሉ ምስክርነት መስጠት እንድንችልም ድፍረትን ስጠን። በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ስም። አሜን።
gaz: Hundumaa kan dandeessu yaa Waaqayyo Abbaa keenyaa, ergaa dubbii Kee jaalalaan kan labsan tajaajiltoota Kee warra dhiirotaa fi dubartootaa dhaloota dhufaa darbaa baroota keessatti ergiteetta. Dhuga-ba'umsa Wangeelaaf amanamoota ta'uu isaaniitiin karaa fannoo irra akka isaan adeemaniif warra isaan dandeessifte tajaajiltoota Kee, yaadannoo isaanii kanaan akka nu dadammaqsituu fi adeemsa amantii fi of-kennuu isaan deeman duukaa akka buunuuf, ayyaana Kee akka nuuf baay'iftuuf Si kadhanna. Cubbuu fi du'a irratti mo'icha Ilmi Kee argate bara keenya guutuu dhugaa ba'uu akka dandeenyuuf ija jabina nuuf kenni. Maqaa Gooftaa keenyaa Yesus Kristosiin; Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’e Wonto! Ne eeha woosso ohesita asanxe maacho woggana woggana anxiyaako ne yese. Modhe Odo ohese bidzi muxhurona suxi mixi/madha ogena/ handi u garoronike ha ne mato ha maraxita maxutte wonte numba ne birkusoronikiyaara u hando aadexo ogenaara bemba aadexome hissine garssi inguso ogenaara nu hamoronike axuse ne keenge ne maxo modhete nuuse ne addusorosako nemba nu shi’e.$Ne yeley hayboni maaqqe cubboni e iisho gisha nu yese bera aallo facete keenguwa ato nu zeeroronike naase axita numba mahuwa.$Haanxho uddi ne yele Yesuusi Kristosa sunxuna nemba nu shi’esa siwwa. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ ዎንቶ! ኔ ኤሀ ዎሶ ኦሄስተ አሰንሤ ማቾ ዎገነ ዎገነ አንሥያኮ ኔ ዬሴ። ሞዼ ኦዶ ኦሄሴ ብድዝ ሙጹሮነ ሱሥ ምሥ/መዸ ኦጌነ/ ሀንድ ኡ ገሮሮንኬ ሀ ኔ መቶ ሀ መረሥተ መሡቴ ዎንቴ ኑምበ ኔ ብርኩሶሮንክያረ ኡ ሀንዶ ኣዴሦ ኦጌናረ ቤምበ ኣዴሦሜ ህስኔ ገርስ እንጉሶ ኦጌናረ ኑ ሀሞሮንኬ አሡሴ ኔ ኬንጌ ኔ መሦ ሞዼቴ ኑሴ ኔ አዱሶሮሰኮ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤ።$ኔ ዬሌይ ሀይቦን ማቄ ጩቦን ኤ ኢሾ ግሸ ኑ ዬሴ ቤረ ኣሎ ፈጬቴ ኬንጉወ አቶ ኑ ዜሮሮንኬ ናሴ አሥተ ኑምበ መሁወ።$ሃንጾ ኡድ ኔ ዬሌ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰ ሱንሡነ ኔምበ ኑ ሽኤሰ ስወ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xantoo ni Moollanni Waa’a, kiikka iitti asso afissam goon awwaadaanoo meenti awwaadaanoo at qaranchi hundannem asse’llaatto. Mishiraachchi saga’l assina amma’nnanto’oo keen ihimmi saqalanchi googinne higgamisa issu ka ki awwaadaano tiirakkam ugudinne neese baqaa’lloo’isinaa ixxuwwi matto’i amma’nnaxxaannonnee gaga uwwimmi googonnee neesem ixxuwwa awwonnoommisina ki eroomma niina issitoo’isina keese uunxinoommo. Lehoo baaxiiloo ki Beet kaa’ukkisa neese niihaannonne heechchanne wo’m naqaashshuwwi inkeena xannoommisina niina iggimma uwwitoo’isina ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoos summinne uunxinoommo. Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka danditaanti Qarichcho Magano! Iittat wiintee kii sohinuta kultaa keenu goonahaa meentuhaa doollaan horaanin at sokkayyoont. Isso'oot mishiraachchi laagata kultota amma'nnanteera ihussa xuudisii Kiristoosi hawwi beeqqamaannu ikki higgunta assitiyan amma'nnati daafiin retooga qaangan qaannuntaa isso'oot marantoo amma'nnati woqqaan isso'ooganka marammuntaa aassanchakki batisinne. Beetukki Yesuusu baaxiilahaa rehutaa qeello qeelu heechchaantanne xuudisii dandeenunta maqoo aassinne yinan Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosi su'mmiin uuccinaanke. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka dandaatto Kaaliiqa Magano, Ateta baxillu sokka sayissannore labballonna meento soqqamaanokki sootto. Danchu Duduwi farci'rara ammanantinore ikkansa masiqalu doogo widoonni higge sa'ara kaa'loottonsarinni Qaangammora baqqi assattonkeranna hadhutera ammanatenna aamamate doogonni ha'runsineemmonsa gede eltokki aattonkera huucci'neemmohe. Cubbunna reyote aana Beettikki afi'rino qeellere heeshshonke wo'matenni farci'ra dandiinammora jawaante uyinke. Mootichinke Yesuusi su'minni huucci'neemmohena macciishshinke. Hamii'ni.

eng: Our Father in heaven,$hallowed be your name.$Your Kingdom come,$your will be done,$on earth as in heaven.$Give us today our daily bread.$Forgive us our sins,$as we forgive those who sin against us.$Lead us not into temptation,$but deliver us from evil.$For the kingdom, the power and the glory are yours.$Now and for ever.$Amen.
amh: አባታችን ሆይ፣ በሰማይ የምትኖር፣$ስምህ ይቀደስ፤ መንግሥትህ ትምጣ፤$ፈቃድህ በሰማይ እንደሆነች እንዲሁም በምድር ትሁን፣$የዕለት እንጀራችንን ስጠን ዛሬ፤ በደላችንን ይቅር በለን፣$እኛም የበደሉንን ይቅር እንደምንል፤$ወደ ፈተናም አታግባን፣ ከክፉ አድነን እንጂ፤$መንግሥት የአንተ ነውና ኃይልም ምስጋናም ለዘላለሙ። አሜን።
gaz: Yaa Abbaa keenyaa, waaqa irra kan jiraattu,$Maqaan Kee haa qulqullaa'u,$Mootummaan Kee haa dhufu,$Jaalalli Kee waaqa irratti akka ta'u,$Akkasuma lafa irratti haa ta'u;$Kan nu ga'u buddeena keenya har'aa nuuf kenni,$Yakka keenya nuuf dhiisi;$Nuyis kan nu yakkaniif akkuma dhiifnu,$Qoramatti nu hin galchin;$Hamaa nu oolchi malee,$Mootummaan kan Kee ti'oo,$Humnis, galannis, baruma baraan. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Nuuse ade, afaa yeseyo!$Hayla ne sunxi kuxuttuwaye.$Ne kaatetoy yowwaye.$Ne maxoy afaa be hantuttenike yeydiwo ha sahaani maaquwaye.$Hanzose maaqe boora nuuse inguwa.$Nuu miidhasituse attuwaydi hiya nu yesenike nenini nu miidhosa attuwaydi hiwwa.$Ye iita garafa nuu maaruwa baaka naadhi beene abako nu gara oodofuna.$Kaatetoy, osay, kuxay koolona neesuko.$Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኑሴ አዴ፥ አፋ ዬሴዮ!$ሀይለ ኔ ሱንሥ ኩሡቱወዬ።$ኔ ካቴቶይ ዮወዬ።$ኔ መሦይ አፋ ቤ ሀንቱቴንኬ ዬይድዎ ሀ ሰሃን ማቁወዬ።$ሀንዞሴ ማቄ ቦረ ኑሴ እንጉወ።$ኑ ሚዸስቱሴ አቱወይድ ህየ ኑ ዬሴንኬ ኔንን ኑ ሚዾሰ አቱወይድ ህወ።$ዬ ኢተ ገረፈ ኑ ማሩወ ባከ ናዽ ቤኔ አበኮ ኑ ገረ ኦዶፉነ።$ካቴቶይ፥ ኦሰይ፥ ኩሠይ ኮሎነ ኔሱኮ።$አሜን።
hdy: Iimanenne hee’lloo Niyyanna,$ki summi keesamaakkoohan ihona.$Ki adillan waarona;$ki doo’l iimanenne ihukkisam uullannem ihona.$Niina kaballina hasisoo hurbaata uwwe.$Neese hawwodu kee’n jolle «Ullaammo» yinummisam$ni jolle «Uraammo» yihe.$Neese joriinsi gatise bagaan keenanchanne aagissitte.$Adillan, malaayyii lombii doolli hundinam kiina ihona.$Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Samaan yoonti nii Annaa!$Muccurukki su'mmu abbun!$Wommoomakki waaltun!$Hasukki / shenikki samaan ikkogan uulla aleenii ihun.$Baree hasissaanne ichchata aassinne.$Naoot wolo keeni baisu faun yinoommigan$nii baishshataa faun yinne.$Hiilimaachchi faisinne bagaan luushshaan aagissootinne.$Wommoomat, maqoohuu abbinnuhuu$doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka kesaa ihun. Amii'nni.
sid: Annanke Gordoho hee'rattohu,$Su'mikki qullaawa ikko.$Gashshootikki dayo,$Fajjokki gordoho ikkitinonte gede,$Baattote aanano ikkito.$Techo barrita sagalenke uyinke.$Wolootu sao agurreemmonte gede,$Ninke saono agurinke.$Bushu coyiwiinni gatisinke ikkinnina,$Jifote giddora eessitootinke.$Gashshootuno, wolqano ayirrinyuno hegerera Atehona.$Hamii'ni.

kqy-latin: Aadexesiti yenawo ee’isine be aadexo u adduse
kqy-ethiopic: ኣዴሤስት ዬነዎ ኤእስኔ ቤ ኣዴሦ ኡ አዱሴ

eng: I believe in God, the Father almighty,$creator of heaven and earth.$I believe in Jesus Christ, God's only Son, our Lord,$who was conceived by the Holy Spirit,$born of the Virgin Mary,$suffered under Pontius Pilate,$was crucified, died, and was buried;$he descended to the dead.$On the third day he rose again;$he ascended into heaven,$he is seated at the right hand of the Father,$and he will come again to judge the living and the dead.$I believe in the Holy Spirit,$the holy Christian/catholic church,$the communion of saints,$the forgiveness of sins,$the resurrection of the body,$and the life everlasting. Amen.
amh: እኔ ሁሉን በሚችል፣$ሰማይንና ምድርን በፈጠረ፣$በእግዚአብሔር አብ አምናለሁ።$ደግሞም በአንድ ልጁ፣$በመንፈስ ቅዱስ በተፀነሰ፣$ከድንግል ማርያም በተወለደ፤$በጴንጤናዊው በጲላጦስ ዘመን መከራ በተቀበለ፣$በተሰቀለ፣ በሞተ፣ በተቀበረ፣$ወደ ሲኦል በወረደ፣$በሦስተኛውም ቀን ከሙታን በተነሣ፣$ወደ ሰማይ በወጣ፣$ሁሉን በሚችል በእግዚአብሔር አብ ቀኝ በተቀመጠ፣$በሕያዋንና በሙታን ሊፈርድ ከዚያ በሚመለስ፣$በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ አምናለሁ።$ደግሞም በመንፈስ ቅዱስ፣$በአንዲት ቅድስት የሐዋሪያት ቤተ ክርስቲያን፣$በቅዱሳን አንድነት፣$በኃጢአት ሥርየት፣$በሥጋ ትንሣዔ፣$በዘላለም ሕይወት አምናለሁ። አሜን።
gaz: Ani nan amana hundumaa kan danda'u Waaqayyo Abbaatti,$Uumaa waaqaatii fi lafaatti;$Tokkicha Ilma Isaa Yesus Kristos Gooftaa keenyatti,$Kan ulfeeffame Hafuura Qulqulluudhaan,$Kan dhalates Maariyaam durba irraa,$Kan dhiphates bara Philaaxos Phenxenichaatti,$Kan fannifames, kan du'e, kan awwaalames,$Si'olittis kan gadi bu'e,$Guyyaa sadaffaattis du'aa kan ka'e,$Gara waaqaattis kan ol ba'e,$Hundumaa kan danda'u gara mirga Waaqayyo Abbaas kan taa'u,$Achiis kan deebi'u warra jiranii fi warra du'anitti faraduudhaaf.$Nan amana Hafuura Qulqulluutti,$Tokkicha qulqullaa'aa Waldaa Kristaanaa,$Tokkummaa qulqullootaas,$Dhiifamuu cubbuus, du'aa ka'uu fooniis,$Jireenya bara baraas. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Tani uddi base danda’esuna, afaara sahaara meddhasuna, ade maaqe Wontonako ta aaddexe.$Assi bidzi e yelena, Ayaana Geeshuna xhiiqusuttaasuna, woduro Maariyamekofa yeluttaasuna, Phenxhenaxi Bhilaaxhose beraa maddhaa gelaasuna, suxhuttaasuna, haydhaasuna, moogguttaasuna, si’ooliya hoddhaasuna, hayso wonte haybowafa dendaasuna, afaaka kessaasuna, uddi base danda’e ade maaqe Wonto oshichi bade uttaasuna, en’a yeseesiti garaara haydhi yeseesiti garaara yaa’ese yaafa maaddhi yooneesuna, nu Laaxi Yesuus Kristosanako ta aadexe.$Assi Ayaana Geeshuna, anxuttaasituna eedha haylaara bidziyara maaqe uddiyade aytese Wonto zaway yesenike, yeydiwo haylaxiti bizetoy yesenike, cubbowafa maaroy yesenike, achona haybo denxoy yesenike, koolo makkina yesoy yesenikeko ta aadexe. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ተን ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤሱነ፥ አፋረ ሰሃረ ሜዸሱነ፥ አዴ ማቄ ዎንቶነኮ ተ ኣዴሤ።$አስ ብድዝ ኤ ዬሌነ፥ አያነ ጌሹነ ጺቁሱታሱነ፥ ዎዱሮ ማርየሜኮፈ ዬሉታሱነ፥ ጴንጼነሥ ጵላጾሴ ቤራ መዻ ጌላሱነ፥ ሱጹታሱነ፥ ሀይዻሱነ፥ ሞጉታሱነ፥ ስኦልየ ሆዻሱነ፥ ሀይሶ ዎንቴ ሀይቦወፈ ዴንዳሱነ፥ አፋከ ኬሳሱነ፥ ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤ አዴ ማቄ ዎንቶ ኦሽች በዴ ኡታሱነ፥ ኤንአ ዬሴስት ገራረ ሀይዽ ዬሴስት ገራረ ያኤሴ ያፈ ማዽ ዮኔሱነ፥ ኑ ላሥ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰነኮ ተ ኣዴሤ።$አስ አያነ ጌሹነ፥ አንሡታስቱነ ኤዸ ሀይላረ ብድዝየረ ማቄ ኡድየዴ አይቴሴ ዎንቶ ዘወይ ዬሴንኬ፥ ዬይድዎ ሀይለሥት ብዜቶይ ዬሴንኬ፥ ጩቦወፈ ማሮይ ዬሴንኬ፥ አቾነ ሀይቦ ዴንሦይ ዬሴንኬ፥ ኮሎ መክነ ዬሶይ ዬሴንኬኮ ተ ኣዴሤ። አሜን።
hdy: An hundam xanoohaannonne,$iimanee uullaa qooccukkaannonne,$Anni Waa’anne amma’nnoommo.$Odim matem Waa’i Beetonne,$Keesammi Ayyaaninne siiramukkaannonne,$baajaam Maaraameensi qaramukkaannonne,$Pheenxeenaawekkichchi Philaaxoos doollenne$hawwo aa’ukkaannonne,$saqalamukkaannonne, lehukkaannonne,$waammamukkaannonne,$Si’oolanne dillukkaannonne,$saxxi ballanne lehiinsi ki’ukkaannonne,$iimane marukkaannonne,$hundam xanoo Anni Waa’i makkanne afuurukkaannonne,$hee’llam keenonnee letam keenonnee oogateena$daba’llaa waaroohaannonne,$ni Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoosanne amma’nnoommo.$Odim Keesammi Ayyaananne,$matem muccur amma’nnaa’n wixxitenne,$xummaa’n mateeyyoomanne, baaxii’l uranchanne,$lehiinsi maarinne ki’immannee$heer heerina hee’oo heechchannee amma’nnoommo.$Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: An horanka / gu'mmanka dandanohanneen,$samaahaa uullataa qooccee Anna Maganoon amma'nnaammi.$Ammoo mexxoans Beetoon,$Xummaancho Ayyaaniin saleehammohanneen,$baajaame / meseleechcho Maaraameechchi ilammohanneen,$Pheenxe baadi Philaaxxoose doollaan hawwa aaqqeehanneen,$saqalammohanneen, reheehanneen, moogammohanneen,$xillaa bale aazi / fiissuta dirreehanneen,$sakki bari rehoochchi keohanneen,$samaa fullohanneen,$horanka / gu'mmanka dandano Anna Magani makkeen afuu'lleehanneen,$yooraanii retooraanii firdota fanqalli waalano Qarichchoanne Yesuusi Kiristoosaan amma'nnaammi.$Hittigunta Xummaancho Ayyaanaan,$mexxo xummaani amma'nnaanni maabaraan,$xummaani mexxoomaan,$baaxiili faun yannaan, maali keoon,$doollii horiinka / gu'mmiinka heaa heechchaan amma'nnaammi. Amii'nni.
sid: Ani wo'manka daandaannohunni,$Gordonna baatto kalaqinohunni,$Maganu Annunni amma'noommo.$Qoleno Mittu Beettisinni,$Qullaawu Ayyaaninni godowaminohunni,$Seemo Maariyaamenni ilaminohunni,$Phenxeenaanchu Philaaxoosi yannara qarra adhinohunni,$Sutaminohunni, reyinohunni, waamaminohunni,$Jeennaate dirrinohunni,$Sayikki barra reyotenni kainohunni,$Gordo fulinohunni,$Wo'manka dandaanno Magani qiniiteenni ofollinohunni,$Nooriranna reyitinorira yoo yaara hakkiinni higannohunni,$Mootichu Yesuusi Kiristoosinni amma'noommo.$Qoleno Qullaawu Ayyaaninni,$Mitticho qullaawa soqqamaasinete Beetekiristaanenni,$Qullaawootu mittimmanni,$Cubbu maaronni, maalu kaonni,$Hegere heeshshonni amma'noommo. Hamii'ni.

gaz: Dhuga-ba'umsa Amantii Kristaanaa isa kan Niiqiyaa

eng: We believe in one God,$the Father, the Almighty,$maker of heaven and earth,$of all that is, seen and unseen.$We believe in one Lord, Jesus Christ,$the only Son of God,$eternally begotten of the Father,$God from God, Light from Light,$true God from true God,$begotten, not made,$of one Being with the Father;$through him all things were made.$For us and for our salvation$he came down from heaven,$was incarnate of the Holy Spirit $and the Virgin Mary$and became truly human.$For our sake he was crucified $under Pontius Pilate;$he suffered death and was buried.$On the third day he rose again$in accordance with the Scriptures;$he ascended into heaven$and is seated at $the right hand of the Father.$He will come again in glory $to judge the living and the dead,$and his kingdom will have no end.$We believe in the Holy Spirit, $the Lord, the giver of life,$who proceeds from the Father,$who with the Father and the Son $is worshiped and glorified,$who has spoken through the prophets.$We believe in one holy catholic $and apostolic Church.$We acknowledge one baptism $for the forgiveness of sins.$We look for the resurrection of the dead,$and the life of the world to come.$Amen.
amh: ሁሉን በሚችል፣$ሰማይንና ምድርን፣$የሚታየውንና የማይታየውን በፈጠረ፣$አንድ አምላክ በሚሆን፣$በእግዚአብሔር አብ እናምናለን።$እርሱ ብቻ የአብ ልጅ በሚሆን፣$ዓለም ሳይፈጠር ከአብ በተወለደ፣$ከአምላክ በተገኘ አምላክ፣$ከብርሃን በተገኘ ብርሃን፣$ከእውነተኛ አምላክ በተገኘ እውነተኛ አምላክ፣$በህልውናው ከአብ ጋር አንድ በሆነ$በተፈጠረ ሳይሆን በተወለደ፣$ሁሉ በእርሱ በሆነ፣$ስለ እኛ ስለ ሰዎች ስለ ደኅንነታችንም ከሰማይ በወረደ፣$በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ከድንግል ማርያም ሥጋ ነሥቶ ሰው በሆነ፣$በጴንጤናዊው በጲላጦስ ዘመንም ስለ እኛ በተሰቀለ፣$መከራ በተቀበለ፣ በሞተ፣ በተቀበረም፣$በቅዱሳት መጻሕፍትም እንደ ተጻፈ$በሦተኛው ቀን ከሙታን ተለይቶ በተነሣ፣$ወደ ሰማይም በወጣ፣$በአብ ቀኝ በተቀመጠ፣$በሕያዋንና በሙታን ሊፈርድ ዳግመኛ በክብር በሚመጣ፣$ለመንግሥቱ ፍጻሜ በሌለው፣$በአንድ ጌታ በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ እናምናለን።$ከአብና ከወልድ ጋር በሚሰገድለትና በሚከበር፣$ከአብና ከወልድ በሚሠርጽ፣$በነቢያት በተናገረ፣$የሕይወት ጌታና ሰጪ በሆነ፣$በመንፈስ ቅዱስም እናምናለን።$የሁሉም በሆነች፣$በአንዲት ቅድስት የሐዋርያት ቤተ ክርስቲያንም እናምናለን።$ለኃጢአት ማስተስረያ በተደረገች፣$በአንዲት ጥምቀትም እናምናለን።$የሙታንን ትንሣኤና$ገና የሚመጣውን ዓለም ሕይወትም እንጠባበቃለን። አሜን።
gaz: In amanna hundumaa kan danda'u Waaqayyo Isa tokkicha Abbaatti,$Uumaa waaqaatii fi lafaa,$Uumaa wanta argamuu fi wanta hin argamne hundumaa.$In amanna kan dhalate tokkicha Ilma Waaqayyoo,$Yesus Kristos Gooftaa tokkichatti;$Biyyi lafaa utuu hin uumamin bara hundumaa dura Abbaattii kan dhalate,$Waaqayyo Waaqayyottii argame, Ifa Ifatti argame,$Waaqayyo Isa dhugaa Waaqayyo Isa dhugaattii argame;$Jiraachuun Isaa Abbaadhaa wajjin tokko kan ta'e;$Inni kan uumame utuu hin ta'in kan dhalatee dha;$Wanti hundinuu Isaan kan ta'e;$Waa'ee keenyaaf, waa'ee fayyina namootaatiif waaqa irraa kan gadi bu'e;$Hafuura Qulqulluudhaan Maariyaam durba irraa foon uffatee nama kan ta'e;$Bara Philaaxos Phenxenichaattis nuuf jedhee kan fannifame;$Kan dhiphate, kan du'e, kan awwaalames;$Macaafa Qulqulluu keessatti barreeffamee akka jiru,$Guyyaa sadaffaatti warra du'an keessaa kan ka'e;$Gara waaqaattis kan ol ba'e; gara mirga Abbaa kan taa'u;$Warra jiranii fi warra du'anitti faraduudhaaf lammaffaa deebi'ee ulfinaan kan dhufu;$Mootummaan Isaas dhuma kan hin qabnetti.$In amanna Hafuura Qulqulluutti;$Goofticha Isa jireenya kennu;$Isa Abbaa fi Ilma biraa ba'u;$Abbaa fi Ilmaa wajjin kan waaqeffamu,$Ulfina argachuun kan Isaaf ta'u,$Isa karaa raajotaa dubbatetti.$In amanna kan nama hundumaa kan taate tokkittii qulqullooftuu Waldaa Kristaanaa Ergamootaa;$Dhiifamuu cubbuu kan argachiisu cuuphaa tokkicha,$Du'aa ka'uu warra du'aniitii fi jireenya bara baraa isa dhufuuf jiruus in eegganna. Ameen!
kqy-latin: Uddi base danda’esuna$afaara sahaara$bentesaara bentuwasaara meddhaasuna$bidzi Wonto maaqeesuna$ade maaqe Wontonako nu aadexe.$$Esiwoy ade maaqe Wontose e bidzi yelena$sahay meddhutto baane$ade maaqe Wontokofa yeluttaasuna$Wontokofa benta Wontona$fo’ekofa benta fo’ena$aade Laaxukofa benta aade Laaxuna$Wonto maaqe adiyara$be yesona bidzo maaqeesuna$meddhuttase be maaquwasa yeluttaasuna$uddi basi esuna maaddhoosuna$nuu maareme hissine$hiyoni axe maareme hissine$afaafa hoddhaasuna$Ayaana Geeshuna woduro Maaramekofa$acho maadhi axe maaddhaasuna$Phenxhenaxi Philaxhose beraaka nuume suxhuttaasuna$maddhay e gara yoodoosuna$haydhaasuna$mooguttaasuna$hayla pissharowa e diizuttesenike$hayxo wonte haydhi yechashiti giddaafa$shahutti dendaasuna$afaa dhaddi kessaasuna$ade maaqe Wonto oshisha uttaasuna$en’a yeseesiti garaara haydhi yeseesiti garaara$yaa’ese lakkunxo kuxa fuulana yooneesuna$e kaatetose e aalliciray baasuna$esiwoy Laaxe maaqe Yesuus Kristosanako nu aadexe.$$Ade maaqe Wontowara$Wonto yeliyara yesine$esuse e dissuttesaara kuxuttesaara maaqeesuna$adekofaara yelekofaara kesseesuna$kaayaxiti otechooshuna$yesose e Laaxaara yeso ingesaara maaqeesuna$Ayaana Geeshunako nu aadexe.$$Uddiyade aytese$anxuttaasituna eedha$haylaara bidziyara maaqe$Wonto zaway yesenikeko nu aadexe.$$Cubbowafa maaresa maaddha$bidzi xhinqatey yesenikeko nu aadexe. Haydhasiti dendesaara$yoowese hine sahaara yesowarako nu kakke. Ameen.
kqy-ethiopic: ኡድ በሴ ደንደኤሱነ$አፋረ ሰሃረ$ቤንቴሳረ ቤንቱወሳረ ሜዻሱነ$ብድዝ ዎንቶ ማቄሱነ$አዴ ማቄ ዎንቶነኮ ኑ ኣዴሤ።$$ኤስዎይ አዴ ማቄ ዎንቶሴ ኤ ብድዝ ዬሌነ$ሰሀይ ሜዹቶ ባኔ$አዴ ማቄ ዎንቶኮፈ ዬሉታሱነ$ዎንቶኮፈ ቤንተ ዎንቶነ$ፎኤኮፈ ቤንተ ፎኤነ$ኣዴ ላሡኮፈ ቤንተ ኣዴ ላሡነ$ዎንቶ ማቄ አድየረ$ቤ ዬሶነ ብድዞ ማቄሱነ$ሜዹተሴ ቤ ማቁወሰ ዬሉታሱነ$ኡድ በስ ኤሱነ ማዾሱነ$ኑ ማሬሜ ህስኔ$ህዮን አሤ ማሬሜ ህስኔ$አፋፈ ሆዻሱነ$አያነ ጌሹነ ዎዱሮ ማረሜኮፈ$አቾ ማዽ አሤ ማዻሱነ$ጴንጼነሥ ጵለጾሴ ቤራከ ኑሜ ሱጹታሱነ$መዸይ ኤ ገረ ዮዶሱነ$ሀይዻሱነ$ሞጉታሱነ$ሀይለ ፕሸሮወ ኤ ዲዙቴሴንኬ$ሀይሦ ዎንቴ ሀይዽ ዬቸሽት ግዳፈ$ሸሁት ዴንዳሱነ$አፋ ዸድ ኬሳሱነ$አዴ ማቄ ዎንቶ ኦሽሸ ኡታሱነ$ኤንአ ዬሴስት ገራረ ሀይዽ ዬሴስት ገራረ$ያኤሴ ለኩንሦ ኩሠ ፉለነ ዮኔሱነ$ኤ ካቴቶሴ ኤ ኣልጭረይ ባሱነ$ኤስዎይ ላሤ ማቄ ዬሱስ ክርስቶሰነኮ ኑ ኣዴሤ።$$አዴ ማቄ ዎንቶወረ$ዎንቶ ዬልየረ ዬስኔ$ኤሱሴ ኤ ድሱቴሳረ ኩሡቴሳረ ማቄሱነ$አዴኮፋረ ዬሌኮፋረ ኬሴሱነ$ካየሥት ኦቴቾሹነ$ዬሶሴ ኤ ላሣረ ዬሶ እንጌሳረ ማቄሱነ$አያነ ጌሹነኮ ኑ ኣዴሤ።$$ኡድየዴ አይቴሴ$አንሡታስቱነ ኤዸ$ሀይላረ ብድዝየረ ማቄ$ዎንቶ ዘወይ ዬሴንኬኮ ኑ ኣዴሤ።$$ጩቦወፈ ማሬሰ ማዸ$ብድዝ ጽንቀቴይ ዬሴንኬኮ ኑ ኣዴሤ። ሀይዸስት ዴንዴሳረ$ዮዌሴ ህኔ ሰሃረ ዬሶወረኮ ኑ ከኬ። አሜን።
hdy: Hundam xanoohaannonne,$iimanee uullaa, moo’amoo luwwaa$moo’amoobee’i luwwaa qooccukkaannonne,$matem Anni Waa’anne amma’nninoommo.$Xale’i ixxi Waa’i Beet ihukkaannonne,$uulli qooccamoo’n Waa’iinsi qaramukkaannonne,$Waa’iinsi siidamu Waa’anne,$caakkiinsi siidamu caakkanne,$hanqo’i Waa’iinsi siidamu hanqo’i Waa’anne,$woro’l baxinne Waa’inne maqirem mat ihukkaannonne,$qooccamukkaannonne ihoo’n qaramukkaannonne,$hundi luwwim ixxenne ihukkaannonne,$niina manni oos gatimmi bikkina$iimaniinsi dillukkaannonne,$Keesammi Ayyaaninne baajaam Maaraameensi qaramaa$maarinne manchi ihukkaannonne,$Pheenxeenaawekkichchi Philaaxoos doollenne$ni bikkina saqalamukkaannonne,$hawwo aa’ukkaannonne, lehukkaannonne,$waammamukkaannonne,$Keesammi Maxaaffuwwanne xaafamukkisam$saxxi ballanne leto’i keeniinsi$annanni ihaa ki’ukkaannonne,$iimane marukkaannonne,$Anni Waa’i makkanne afuurukkaannonne,$hee’llam keenonnee letam keenonnee oogateena$la’mmeka lombinne waaroohaannonnee$ixxi adillaninam lasaanchi bee’i matem$Moollanni Yesuus Kiristoosannee amma’nninoommo.$Anninnee Beetinnee maqire otossakkamaannonnee lonsakkamaannonnee,$Anninnee Beetinnee hee’oohaannonne,$hiraagaaninne kuramukkaannonne,$foorina Moollannaa uwweena xanoohanee ihukkaannonne,$Keesammi Ayyaanannem amma’nninoommo.$Hundanem ihukkaannonne,$matem keesamaakkoo asse’ammaa’n wixxixxi minennem amma’nninoommo.$Baaxiilo haafimmina ihukkaannonne,$matem xammaqanchannem amma’nninoommo.$Lehiinsi ki’immaa, ka lasage waaroo uulli heechcham egelloommo.$Eeyya, ihona.
ktb: Horanka / gu'mmanka dandanohanneen,$samaahaa uullataa,$xuudamanoraa xudamumburraa qoocceehanneen,$mexxinsin Maganu ikko Anna Maganoon amma'nninaammi.$Is xallu Anna Magani Beetu ikkohanneen,$uullat qooccantu'nnaachchi Anna Maganiichchi ilammohanneen,$Qarichcho Maganiichchi dagammo Qarichchoon,$caakkiichchi dagammo caakkaan,$gare Maganiichchi dagammo gare Maganoon,$horoomantis Anna Maganiin mexxu ikkohanneen,$qooccammeeii ihu'nna ilammohanneen,$horurrunku isiin ikkohanneen,$manni oosuta inkoommi nees faisota yi sameechchi dirreehanneen,$Xummaancho Ayyaaniin baajaame / meseleechcho Maaraameechchi maala oddaqqi manchu ikkohanneen,$Pheenxe baadi Philaaxxoose doollaan niitannee saqalammohanneen,$hawwa aaqqeehanneen, reheehanneen, moogammohanneen,$xummaancho maxaaffaan xaafammoganka sakki bari retooriichchi annanna ikki keohanneen,$samaa fullohanneen,$Anna Magani makkeen afuu'lleehanneen,$fooliin yooraanii retooraanii firdota lanki kodata abbinniin waalanohanneen,$wommoomaahansin tungu / goofu yoobaihanneen mexxo Qarichcho Yesuusi Kiristoosaan amma'nninaammi.$Annoomaanii Beetoomaanii bargeen saggadeennosina / goonneennosina abbiseennosihanneen,$Anniichchii Beetiichchii fulanohanneen,$hiraagaannoon xahaaqqammohanneen,$heechchata aassaanchuhaa Qarichchuhaa ikko Xummaancho Ayyaanaan amma'nninaammi.$Horibiinka / gu'mmiinka ikko mexxo xummaancho soqqamaanni amma'nnaanni maabaraan amma'nninaammi.$Ammoo baaxiila faun yannii ikko mexxo xammaqanchaan amma'nninaammi.$Rehoochchi keuhaa ka zakku waaltaa heechchataa qoraphphinaammi. Amii'nni.
sid: Wo'manka daandaannohunni,$Gordonna baatto kalaqinohunni,$Illete leellannorenna leellannokkire kalaqinohunni,$Mitto Magano ikkinohunni,$Maganu Annunni amma'ninoommo.$Callichisi Maganu Annu Beetto ikkinohunni,$kalqe kalaqantara albaanni Magano Annaho ilaminohunni,$Maganuwiinni dayino Maganinni,$Xawaabbuwiinni dayino Xawaabbinni,$Halaalaanchu Maganiwiinni dayinohu Halaalaanchu Maganinni,$Maganimmasinna Maganu Annu ledo mitto ikkinohunni,$Kalaqaminoha ikkikkinni ilaminohunni,$Baalankare assinohunni,$Ninke mannu gato daafira yee gordunni dirrinohunni,$Qullaawu Ayyaaninni seemo Maariyaami giddo maala uddi're manna ikkinohunni,$Phenxeenaanchu Philaaxoosi yannara ninke daafira sutaminohunni,$Qarra adhinohunni, reyinohunni, waamaminohunni,$Qullaawa borro giddo borreessinoonni garinni sayikki barra reyotenni baxxe kainohunni,$Gordo fulinohunni,$Maganu Annu qiniiteenni ofollinohunni,$Nooriranna reyitinorira yoo yaara galagale ayirrinyunni daannohunni,$Gashshootisira gawalo nookkihunni,$Mittu Mootichi Yesuusi Kiristoosinni amma'ninoommo.$Maganu Annunna Beettu ledo kumbuullannisihunninna ayirrinsannisihunni Maganu Annunna Beettu giddonni fulannohunni,$Himanaano kultinohunni,$Heeshshote Mootichinna heeshsho aannohunni,$Qullaawu Ayyaaninni amma'ninoommo.$Wo'munkuta ikkitinoti,$Mitte qullaawa soqqamaasinete Beetekiristaane noota ammannoommo.$Cubbo agursiisate malaatira uyinoonnita mitte ximqate ammannoommo.$Reyitinori ka''a, kunni ka'a daggara noo gobbanna heeshsho agadhineemmo. Hamii'ni.

eng: Whosoever will be saved, before all things it is necessary that he hold the catholic faith. Which faith except every one do keep whole and undefiled, without doubt he shall perish everlastingly.$And the catholic faith is this, that we worship one God in Trinity, and Trinity in Unity; Neither confounding the Persons, nor dividing the Substance. For there is one Person of the Father, another of the Son, and another of the Holy Ghost. But the Godhead of the Father, of the Son, and of the Holy Ghost is all one: the glory equal, the majesty coeternal. Such as the Father is, such is the Son, and such is the Holy Ghost. The Father uncreated, the Son uncreated, and the Holy Ghost uncreated. The Father incomprehensible, the Son incomprehensible, and the Holy Ghost incomprehensible. The Father eternal, the Son eternal, and the Holy Ghost eternal. And yet they are not three Eternals, but one Eternal. As there are not three Uncreated nor three Incomprehensibles, but one Uncreated and one Incomprehensible. So likewise the Father is almighty, the Son almighty, and the Holy Ghost almighty. And yet they are not three Almighties, but one Almighty. So the Father is God, the Son is God, and the Holy Ghost is God. And yet they are not three Gods, but one God. So likewise the Father is Lord, the Son Lord, and the Holy Ghost Lord. And yet not three Lords, but one Lord. For like as we are compelled by the Christian verity to acknowledge every Person by Himself to be God and Lord, So are we forbidden by the catholic religion to say, There be three Gods, or three Lords.$The Father is made of none: neither created nor begotten. The Son is of the Father alone; not made, nor created, but begotten. The Holy Ghost is of the Father and of the Son: neither made, nor created, nor begotten, but proceeding. So there is one Father, not three Fathers; one Son, not three Sons; one Holy Ghost, not three Holy Ghosts. And in this Trinity none is before or after other; none is greater or less than another; But the whole three Persons are coeternal together, and coequal: so that in all things, as is aforesaid, the Unity in Trinity and the Trinity in Unity is to be worshiped. He, therefore, that will be saved must thus think of the Trinity.$Furthermore, it is necessary to everlasting salvation that he also believe faithfully the incarnation of our Lord Jesus Christ. For the right faith is, that we believe and confess that our Lord Jesus Christ, the Son of God, is God and Man; God of the Substance of the Father, begotten before the worlds; and Man of the substance of His mother, born in the world; Perfect God and perfect Man, of a reasonable soul and human flesh subsisting. Equal to the Father as touching His Godhead, and inferior to the Father as touching His manhood; Who, although He be God and Man, yet He is not two, but one Christ: One, not by conversion of the Godhead into flesh, but by taking the manhood into God; One altogether; not by confusion of Substance, but by unity of Person. For as the reasonable soul and flesh is one man, so God and Man is one Christ; Who suffered for our salvation; descended into hell, rose again the third day from the dead; He ascended into heaven; He sitteth on the right hand of the Father, God Almighty; from whence He shall come to judge the quick and the dead. At whose coming all men shall rise again with their bodies, and shall give an account of their own works. And they that have done good shall go into life everlasting; and they that have done evil, into everlasting fire.$This is the catholic faith; which except a man believe faithfully and firmly, he cannot be saved.
amh: ለመዳን የሚፈልግ ሁሉ ከሁሉም ነገር አስቀድሞ የሁሉ የሆነች የቤተ ክርስቲያን ሃይማኖትን እውነተኛ አድርጎ ሊቀበል ያስፈልገዋል።$ንጹሕና ሙሉ አድርጎ ያልጠበቀው ሁሉ ያለ ጥርጥር የዘላለም ጥፋት ይደርስበታል።$በሦስትነቱ አንድነቱን፥ በአንድነቱም ሦስትነቱን አምነን አንድ አምላክን እናመልካለን። ይህም እውነተኛ የክርስትና ሃይማኖት ነው።$ይህንንም የምናደርገው አካላቱን ሳንደባልቅ መለኮታዊ ህልውናውንም ሳንከፍል ነው።$ምክንያቱም የአብ አካል ለብቻው የወልድ ለብቻው፥ የመንፈስ ቅዱስም ለብቻው ስለሆነ ነው።$ሆኖም የአብ፥ የወልድና የመንፈስ ቅዱ መለኮት አንድ ነው፥ ክብሩ ሥልጣኑም እኩል ሆኖ ይኖራል።$ወልድ በህልውናው እንደ አብ ነው፥ መንፈስ ቅዱስም እንደዚሁ ነው።$አብ አልተፈጠረም፥ ወልድ አልተፈጠረም፥ መንፈስ ቅዱስም አልተፈጠረም።$አብ ወሰን የለውም፥ ወልድ ወሰን የለውም፥ መንፈስ ቅዱም ወሰን የለውም።$አብ ዘላለማዊ ነው፥ ወልድ ዘላለማዊ ነው፥ መንፈስ ቅዱስም ዘላለማዊ ነው።$ቢሆነም ዘላለማዊ የሚሆን አንድ እንጂ ሦስት አይደሉም።$ያልተፈጠረና ወሰን የሌለው ሦስት እንዳልሆነ እንደዚሁም ያልተፈጠረና ወሰን የሌለው አንድ ነው።$እንዲሁም አብ ሁሉን የሚችል ነው፥ ወልድ ሁሉን የሚችል ነው፥ መንፈስ ቅዱስም ሁሉን የሚችል ነው።$ቢሆንም፥ ሁሉን የሚችል አንድ አንጂ ሦስት አይደሉም።$ስለዚህ አብ አምላክ ነው፥ ወልድ አምላክ ነው፥ መንፈስ ቅዱስም አምላክ ነው።$ሆኖም አንድ አምላክ እንጂ ሦስት አማልክት አይደሉም።$ስለዚህ አብ ጌታ ነው፥ ወልድ ጌታ ነው፥ መንፈስ ቅዱስም ጌታ ነው።$ሆኖም አንድ ጌታ እንጂ ሦስት ጌቶች አይደሉም።$ምክንያቱም የክርስትና እምነት እውነተኛነት እያንዳንዱ አካል አምላክና ጌታ መሆኑን እንድናምን እንደሚያስገድደን ሁሉ የክርስትና ሃይማኖት ሦስት አማልክት ወይም ሦስት ጌቶች እንዳንል ይከለክለናል።$አብ በማንም አልተሠራም፥ አልተፈጠረም፥ አልተወለደምም።$ወልድ ከአብ ተወለደ እንጂ አልተሠራም አልተፈጠረምም።$መንፈስ ቅዱስ አልተሠራም፥ አልተፈጠረም፥ አልተወለደምም፥ ነገር ግን ከአብ የሚሠርጽ ነው።$ስለዚህ አብ አንድ ስለሆነ ሦስት አብ አይደለም፥ ወልድም አንድ አንጂ ሦስት ወልድ አይደለም፥ መንፈስ ቅዱስም አንድ እንጂ ሦስት አይደለም።$ከሦቱ አካላት አንዱ ከሌላው ቀዳሚነት ወይም ደኃሪነት የለውም፤ አንዱም ከሌላው የሚበልጥ ወይም የሚያንስ አይደለም።$ስለሆነም፥ ሦስቱ አካላት በእኩልነትና በዘላለማዊነት አንድ ናቸው። ከዚህ የተነሣም ከፍ ብሎ እንደተጠቀሰው ሦስቱ አካላት በአንድ መለኮት አንድ አምላክም በሦስት አካላት ይመለካል።$ለመዳን የሚፈልግ ሁሉ ስለ ሥላሴ እንደዚህ ማሰብ ይገባዋል።$ከዚህም ሌላ የዘላለምን ደኅንነት ለማግኘት የጌታችንን የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን በሥጋ መገለጽ በእውነት ማመን አስፈላጊ ነው።$ምክንያቱም ትክክለኛው እምነት ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ የእግዚአብሔር ልጅ አምላክም ሰውም መሆኑን አምነን ማስታወቅ ነው።$እርሱም ከዘመናት አስቀድሞ ከአብ የተወለደ አምላክ ከእናቱም በሥጋ በዓለም የተወለደ ሰው ነው።$የሚያስብ ነፍስ ያለችውና የሰውን ሥጋ የለበሰ ፍጹም አምላክ ፍጹም ሰው ነው።$በአምላክነቱ ከአብ ጋር የተካከለ፥ በሰውነቱም ከአብ ያነሰ ነው።$አምላክም ሰውም ቢሆንም አንድ ክርስቶስ እንጂ ሁለት ክርስቶስ አይደለም።$አንድ ነው ስንል ግን የሰውን ሥጋ ለበሰ እንጂ መለኮት ወደ ሥጋ አልተለወጠም።$በእርግጥ አንድ የሆነውም በባሕርያት መደባለቅ ሳይን በአካል አንድ በመሆኑ ነው።$ምክንያቱም የሚያስብ ነፍስና ሥጋ አንድ ሰው እንደሆኑ ሁሉ አምላክና ሰው በክርስቶስ አንድ ናቸው።$እርሱም ለደህንነታችን ሲል መከራ የተቀበለ፥ ወደ ሲኦል የወረደ፥ ከሙታን የተነሣ፤$ወደ ሰማይ የወጣ፥ በአብ ቀኝ የተቀመጠ፥ በሕያዋንና በሙታንም ሊፈርድ ከዚያ የሚመለስ ነው።$በመምጣቱ ጊዜም ሰዎች ሁሉ በሥጋ ተነስተው ስለ ሥራቸው መልስ ይሰጣሉ።$መልካም የሠሩ ወደ ዘላለም ሕይወት ክፉ የሠሩም ወደ ዘላለም እሳት ይገባሉ።$ይህ እውነትኛው የክርስትና እምነት ነው። ይህን የማያምንና አጥብቆ የማይዝ ሊድን አይችልም።

eng: The Lord bless you and keep you;$the Lord make his face shine on you and be gracious to you;$the Lord look upon you with favor and give you peace.
amh: እግዚአብሔር ይባርካችሁ፣ ይጠብቃችሁ።$እግዚአብሔር ፊቱን ያብራላችሁ፣ ጸጋውንም ይስጣችሁ።$እግዚአብሔር ፊቱን ይመልስላችሁ፣ ሰላሙንም ይስጣችሁ። በአብ፣ በወልድ፣ በመንፈስ ቅዱስ ስም፣ አንድ አምላክ። አሜን።
የጌታ የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ጸጋ፣$የእግዚአብሔር ፍቅር፣$የመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኅብረት፣$ከሁላችሁ ጋር ይሁን። አሜን።
